---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/74b16bfe-0e43-4c41-b172-4dcaee66c685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hello, I hope that you're doing great. The current administration keeps fumbling the ball as economic optimism is slipping away; GDP officially shrank in the first quarter due to Trump's tariffs. Meanwhile, Democrats are infighting. More Americans are souring on each party as their popularity descends to record lows.
People ask me all the time what the future of Independent politics looks like in the United States. Recently, I've been responding with two words:
"Mike Duggan."
Who is Mike? He's the three-term mayor of Detroit who won his last race with 72% of the vote. "Before I was mayor I was the CEO of a failing hospital system that had hour-long waiting times and was concerned about getting reimbursed. I said, 'let's get the wait times to under 30 minutes.' After we did that, morale improved and so did revenues. We became the #1 employer in the region. My employees started telling me that I should run for mayor."
Mike ran for mayor of Detroit back in 2013 and won as a write-in. I met him while I was on the campaign trail. "I was the first white guy to run for mayor in 40 years. I wanted to get the streetlights back on. I wanted to get the 911 response times down. I went to people's houses and sat down with them. If you invited me, I'd come. We did over 250 house parties. It turns out that most people want safe streets and to know their kids can walk home at night. I hired 350 police officers and funded violence prevention programs. Today, crime is down in the city." He turned Detroit from a city that was losing population to gaining people and businesses.
How did he do it? "We got beyond politics-as-usual in the city and brought people together. Black, white, whatever, families all want the same things. But I saw what was happening in Lansing where you have two parties that are swung by the extremes. Bipartisanship gets punished. I realized that what I've done in Detroit for the last 12 years is what is needed in Michigan. I've lived in Michigan my whole life. People are sick of the division." He could be talking about most of the country.
So Mike is now running for Governor of Michigan as an Independent. The popular mayor of a city that is 80% black turned in his Democratic party badge and said we need something different. "It's only by having an Independent governor that I feel we can do what needs to be done in Michigan. I'll work with people in both parties who want to make housing more affordable and get results. I get that feedback from voters every day, they are tired of the two parties." Again, this is playing out in state after state.
As you'd expect, there has been some blowback from within his old party. But over 100 black faith leaders have come out to endorse Mike because they know him. He's immensely popular in Detroit and people all over the state know that Detroit has been turned around due to his leadership. "Most everyone I talk to in the state wants pragmatic leadership that will get things done."
Imagine an Independent governor of an all-important swing state. Michigan will help determine the next President; heck, Mike himself could be a contender though that's not something he's thinking about. I've donated to Mike's campaign and I'd urge you to as well. Let your friends in Michigan know. Mike is going to compete for the governor's seat in Lansing, and if he gets the resources to make his case he can win. Wouldn't you vote for him?
Can an Independent give rise to a different, better form of politics in a major swing state? Mike has already done the improbable several times in Detroit and beforehand; I wouldn't bet against him.
For my interview of Mayor Duggan on the podcast, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/74b16bfe-0e43-4c41-b172-4dcaee66c685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To donate to Mike's campaign, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/c19daf06-1c28-466e-86e2-ba0250fe51f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To see what Forward is doing in every state click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/386fa64d-a29d-4d68-addb-2f8136c28d93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - we are growing quickly because people know we need a new approach. That's the case Mike is making, let's [help](https://substack.com/redirect/c19daf06-1c28-466e-86e2-ba0250fe51f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) him.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..S_0u80frnuHZu7CQ2I9sS10PbVhR8ABxq4-0pz8_6hM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162627208)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c14bc302-c298-4196-8e90-e12ccfd4f145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb60b74b3-3971-4879-a1b9-94f5a6372f2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, we are watching an unelected billionaire implement his bad ideas and the latest one has us rolling our eyes. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5b40c34-deff-43e3-97da-2ef3f8a84d02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Recently, his call to action with MAGA Republicans got Trump to sign an executive order to **_END_**_ _ public funding for NPR and PBS!_ We can't let him influence critical government decisions. [That's why our team prepared an open letter to Elon Musk opposing the GOP's plans. We only have limited room left, so please can you add your name today to save our beloved programming?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45858b1f-7fc0-4e8b-8b1a-ccfe27fc4de2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| To Elon Musk, No one elected you for public office, and no one wants you in office. Your lack of experience, lack of basic empathy, and inability to create a more efficient government is embarrassing. [That's why we, the people, are taking a stand against your dangerous influence in our government and condemning your alliance with Trump's MAGA agenda.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b83a32b-21e1-4849-8fa5-71fd19b1198e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe1fc761-48ec-404c-83e7-1f5379064219/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Sincerely, Peter

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 💥 A GIGANTIC ANNOUNCEMENT!
body:
Our grassroots conservative prayers have been answered! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=21925f5ecc&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6a0264b543&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")

| **MARCELL STRBICH STEPS UP TO RUN FOR OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE IN THE GOP 2026 PRIMARY ON MAY 5, 2026!**

We have a grassroots, patriot, combat veteran who has stepped up to selflessly run for Ohio Secretary of State in 2026, Marcell Strbich. Many of you know Marcell. You've heard him on the radio with Bob Frantz, Jack Windsor, and Brian Thomas. You've seen him on video with Emerald Robinson and Steve Stern. You've seen him testify at the State Capital on election integrity legislation. He can and will do the job to secure Ohio's elections and clean up Ohio's registered voter rolls, which contrary to what you hear from our current Secretary of State, are a MESS. Many of you know Marcell and personally endorse him. For those of you who don't, once you get to know him we're confident he'll have your endorsement too!

**To learn more about Marcell Strbich, go[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a62c1c68ae&e=5c740fa3e2) or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=164e84ab7b&e=5c740fa3e2)**

**Here's a video of what we all need to do. HINT: It's titled "DONATE • DONATE • DONATE!" and you can do it[ HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=224388b6cf&e=5c740fa3e2).**

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f84922fd21&e=5c740fa3e2 "Donate • Donate • Donate! Marcell Strbich for Ohio Secretary of State!")
---
DONATE • DONATE • DONATE! MARCELL STRBICH FOR OHIO SoS
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ** **

** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**

* * *

**A CONTINUING

CALL TO ACTION!**

* * *
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c76bb66938&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=32885cd85b&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=69ad59017c&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=eaf2d78ed1&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9229303648&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8408136016&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fb87eb361a&e=5c740fa3e2)

---

You May Find Valuable**

name: Seth Koslow
subject: $9 billion. Gone. Thanks to Bruce Blakeman.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
This wasn’t bad luck. It’s bad leadership. | | Friends,

Nassau County lost $9 billion because of Bruce Blakeman. **[I’m running for County Executive because Nassau deserves a leader who delivers, not one who governs by press conference. If you agree, chip in today to help power our campaign!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107101820/543617912/-1414184198?contactdata=LBpInBGJ6t20tmOw+3cEXOeK8O0kOmnJbRO85UNuVdZ9wq+VWMSWbP/XTDTpXxYbAfE2Km+noCujpat8K6OOjqR3oVriDu8IkrVPm4X54oA=&am=50.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTMyMjUzNGItYjAyOS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-tkQs4jx9HKSBKtwDvK2_tVEDLvD8S74MjiUs8_Shug=&emci=b89b7f55-3d29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1322534b-b029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17551891)**

As reported in _Newsday_ , the Sands casino and NYU Langone hospital projects are dead or dying – **costing Nassau nearly $9 billion in lost private investment**. That’s billions in potential tax revenue, thousands of good-paying jobs in health care, hospitality, and construction – all gone under Bruce Blakeman’s watch.

**This wasn’t bad luck. It’s bad leadership.**

Blakeman stood in front of TV cameras and promised “transformative” development. But when it came time to do the work – secure commitments, manage partnerships, and navigate challenges – he fumbled. Instead of results, we got vague statements, stalled negotiations, and excuses.

We can’t afford four more years of smoke and mirrors.

**[Let’s turn the page. Let’s win this race. Make a donation to support my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107101821/543617913/-1414184198?contactdata=LBpInBGJ6t20tmOw+3cEXOeK8O0kOmnJbRO85UNuVdZ9wq+VWMSWbP/XTDTpXxYbAfE2Km+noCujpat8K6OOjqR3oVriDu8IkrVPm4X54oA=&am=50.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTMyMjUzNGItYjAyOS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-tkQs4jx9HKSBKtwDvK2_tVEDLvD8S74MjiUs8_Shug=&emci=b89b7f55-3d29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1322534b-b029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17551891)**

Thank you,
Seth Koslow

## Collier & Horowitz: Goodbye to all that
Since David Horowitz died last week at the age of 86, I have pulled from our archives a few of the columns David sent us to publish on Power Line. David Horowitz’s Black Book of the American Left was published by Encounter Books in 2013. ## Trump on ‘Meet the Press:’ ‘People Have Been Killed, Maimed, Badly Hurt by Illegal Immigrants’ – RedState
Ever notice how the left loves to use the term "papers" when what they really mean is "identification?" That's because you really can't manage life in the modern world without some government-issued identification, which for most people takes the form of a state-issued driver's license or state ID card. But while "identification" sounds innocuous, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/sgw_27YavmgdcvekTJUVhhcvxypkBv4tiGtPB2X-4yAQJMBBnQ9zRvwgZIG4blcyYy5D1O4FvKX1U5yAhLREYqi8-hT7l8sZuWaStyN6K48s7mAe81KifasyZDTjAWXbWape5aYoyiD6sqEgakx5Mvg3ff2_ZGgoHDArM4TrYyUy3eHWzp0--v3yPQb2ftw-ah-K1uBLXiOhqQhRXxmiJvEqtCTUwBLtF5EYwcPUUc_cL3SfXGFOCJeJLayUeaPvFJDJbjd2zu-t5-8OSfaarz8emMepLPKwg6m42r6LoZcXObn9u0wvOYJi7lKcnzBVW4vzc583zKBeiCjXFTqfIQfGXaAA4o92F8qkKFNnWsfBISsg6hdYX_1qLKcsosShby2jdAmaAxXz/VEHMhctAe6WIUZOid7eoctTRI20nNI8q/8)

## Asylum Seekers Primarily Responsible for Large Spike in Homelessness
Between 2022 and 2024, the U.S. saw a record 43% rise in “sheltered homelessness”—staying in some sort of emergency shelter, as opposed to living on the street. | | Friend, Growing up, my family were people of faith. We had faith in God, faith in our country, and faith that the best days were yet to come.

I learned that as long as I kept that faith close to my heart, I could achieve anything.

**_And when I flew as an Apache Helicopter Pilot in the U.S. Army, I leaned on my faith more than ever._** **My faith helped me remain strong in combat. It gave me the courage to lead two platoons during Operation Iraqi Freedom.**
The U.S. Army showed me the best of America - and unfortunately right now, that’s the America the Left wants to destroy.

My name is John James, and I’m running for Governor to save my state from the Democrats who are so desperate to divide us.

**[**If we are going to unite our state and our nation under faith, patriotism, and American values, I need you to join me on this mission.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj81u3CAUhZ8G72zBvfhnFl4ksVypkbrJoko3EQE8ZmIMATxW8vQV1mjUbr_z6d5zhPWLmb560j4SgNmoSAAIPhCAz9fdhu1in3-U3c-H1_Kz-WXrnMLTTb3CXV6luHw8vvz-8C9_4vD9_OTwm17ZXU9fXt_l29NKW2GWTNuhUD1OivJC96zlDa8ZIivmvpOMI8C74sAE6LaDU_N-qhGVwq7DqTA9UKhpTWuGAIxWCHISuqW8ObGJK0Y4Pf5UwupgpGAx7SIE52wlnS2Wfk7Jx6PYSGCMWm5BV7tZg1bZIDBe3LyWF2F1LCcXSmsIjJMwaS6PmOC4JfsW3RakJjj44KLXMpn1TKDJkdXKbJbgcFt8wKRDRntgNyCF9cKcV4KDs2__qkb9z0IuGfJ9HFLYdBF65XezLCY2LeH0fAzO8649_A0AAP__Y16X6g)**

It’s no secret to anyone who is paying attention. The radical Left has launched an all-out war on the values my fellow servicemembers and I put our lives on the line fighting for. **You see it with the support of terrorism on college campuses and the Democrats cheering it on.**
The irony is, the more Democrats claim they’re fighting these evils, the closer they are to bringing them right here to our community.

I may have hung up my flight suit, but I’m not done fighting for America, and I’m going to need a co-pilot by my side if we’re going to finish this mission.

**[**Join our team today to DEFEND American values from the Left and get our country back on track.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj81u3CAUhZ8G72zBvfhnFl4ksVypkbrJoko3EQE8ZmIMATxW8vQV1mjUbr_z6d5zhPWLmb560j4SgNmoSAAIPhCAz9fdhu1in3-U3c-H1_Kz-WXrnMLTTb3CXV6luHw8vvz-8C9_4vD9_OTwm17ZXU9fXt_l29NKW2GWTNuhUD1OivJC96zlDa8ZIivmvpOMI8C74sAE6LaDU_N-qhGVwq7DqTA9UKhpTWuGAIxWCHISuqW8ObGJK0Y4Pf5UwupgpGAx7SIE52wlnS2Wfk7Jx6PYSGCMWm5BV7tZg1bZIDBe3LyWF2F1LCcXSmsIjJMwaS6PmOC4JfsW3RakJjj44KLXMpn1TKDJkdXKbJbgcFt8wKRDRntgNyCF9cKcV4KDs2__qkb9z0IuGfJ9HFLYdBF65XezLCY2LeH0fAzO8649_A0AAP__Y16X6g)**

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6yAQhp8GdrFgwLcFi1zkI51IXTSLKt1hwA2JMQ7YcZOnr5K63v7zzfyfRrq-tc1doHyDAE5WRwSA2BoBXI-TC-PZ7f-tiv_r4-qavbn0OYXtjN5ggTslz5fN4ePSHz7j7rHfevYgN7rgw703CzyXJsZJ2z7TfIe1YI0mHBtBc57xlDJG8UlkRUEVY1pxU2pSlqSWjKY5V43OClkrbAUQSElKUsoAKEkYqEaanPCspA3XFHHy6kmkM8EqSeMwyRC8d4nyDrfiNAx9fIlVCKop-KQbVWvG-LumvENQzcoIqjjWUQXbD9Z3EUE1dnNSG8Sq1wfZ7vvdTBbWE8NB6H6ybWtjliNOvv5u4puAnwAAAP__rid1cQ)
clean_body: | | | Friend, Growing up, my family were people of faith. We had faith in God, faith in our country, and faith that the best days were yet to come. I learned that as long as I kept that faith close to my heart, I could achieve anything. And when I flew as an Apache Helicopter Pilot in the U.S. Army, I leaned on my faith more than ever. My faith helped me remain strong in combat. It gave me the courage to lead two platoons during Operation Iraqi Freedom. The U.S. Army showed me the best of America - and unfortunately right now, that’s the America the Left wants to destroy. My name is John James, and I’m running for Governor to save my state from the Democrats who are so desperate to divide us. It’s no secret to anyone who is paying attention. The radical Left has launched an all-out war on the values my fellow servicemembers and I put our lives on the line fighting for. You see it with the support of terrorism on college campuses and the Democrats cheering it on. The irony is, the more Democrats claim they’re fighting these evils, the closer they are to bringing them right here to our community. I may have hung up my flight suit, but I’m not done fighting for America, and I’m going to need a co-pilot by my side if we’re going to finish this mission. Thank you, John James Former Apache Helicopter Pilot | | Paid for by John James for MI. 8050 Wolfson Lane, Grand Blanc, MI 48439. | | Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: MassGOP Events
subject: Reminder: 👉 👉 Send in your nomination for this years' Lincoln-Reagan Award
body:
May 29th: Honoring Legacy & Celebrating Leadership
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hdDewL1Ja_RpI9QB4o3Cf2_LsPS52E8WMu-qByjP9veLrGu2aNbb22zsExbIYlwCxLPIqTCF2m_MUE8N9B0f-Fj76wsv1qptBvUF_61W7DdBM6ihNJTfWLwOtXaG10aw0_BxSp02s0J8-4fVnUL2jw==&c=QAfGuuMnafbulcxLC7WsVBrojCBXL-wFH53yZ0b1K0aeQdn9Nd-N2Q==&ch=kC_tj4PurpR8d2MCe5Cd2hLOLIURsosl8yRZ9YUC01LEj_93_jGuiw==)

| Nominations are officially open for this year's Lincoln-Reagan Award!
---
| [NOMINATE A REPUBLICAN FOR THIS YEAR'S AWARD](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hdDewL1Ja_RpI9QB4o3Cf2_LsPS52E8WMu-qByjP9veLrGu2aNbb29BuX7DOEvuL5-LxuPaE1qpzBUXY0qlqijgLxDPjUtem9jzYDKpLMJYitOT7mzRLNqGP1rd76byZhCYiX0TIe86mSTc-Qpyq3RudndFZM3Bg1MI_Ds95GTYjwhw9a_zNNvcAki9xmXmQDhgA4WuUt6s=&c=QAfGuuMnafbulcxLC7WsVBrojCBXL-wFH53yZ0b1K0aeQdn9Nd-N2Q==&ch=kC_tj4PurpR8d2MCe5Cd2hLOLIURsosl8yRZ9YUC01LEj_93_jGuiw==)
---
Each year, the Massachusetts Republican Party bestows its highest honor - the Lincoln-Reagan Award - upon a Republican who exemplifies the values, vision, and tireless dedication of our Party's greatest icons: Abraham Lincoln and Ronald Reagan.
Do you know a standout Republican who has made a powerful impact in your community or across our state? It could be an elected official who's led with integrity, a grassroots warrior who never backs down, or an activist whose passion has inspired the next generation. Whether they're in the trenches or behind the scenes, we want to hear about them.
---
| | [NOMINATE A REPUBLICAN FOR THIS YEAR'S AWARD](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hdDewL1Ja_RpI9QB4o3Cf2_LsPS52E8WMu-qByjP9veLrGu2aNbb29BuX7DOEvuL5-LxuPaE1qpzBUXY0qlqijgLxDPjUtem9jzYDKpLMJYitOT7mzRLNqGP1rd76byZhCYiX0TIe86mSTc-Qpyq3RudndFZM3Bg1MI_Ds95GTYjwhw9a_zNNvcAki9xmXmQeE37h2Q3efk=&c=QAfGuuMnafbulcxLC7WsVBrojCBXL-wFH53yZ0b1K0aeQdn9Nd-N2Q==&ch=kC_tj4PurpR8d2MCe5Cd2hLOLIURsosl8yRZ9YUC01LEj_93_jGuiw==)
---

Republican Rep. Brandon Gill **[blasted Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett for selling out America](https://substack.com/redirect/79ec2ddc-31aa-46b1-9b79-d37a0ba1f055?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for personal and political gain by supporting her party's mass migration agenda.
He does not hold back...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/79ec2ddc-31aa-46b1-9b79-d37a0ba1f055?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/79ec2ddc-31aa-46b1-9b79-d37a0ba1f055?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[Crockett first jabbed at Republicans](https://substack.com/redirect/79ec2ddc-31aa-46b1-9b79-d37a0ba1f055?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for supporting Trump's deportations. "My colleagues from across the aisle have decided that they are going to make immigrants the boogie man, it's insanity to me!" she said. "They have compassion for victims, which they should, but they have no compassion for people that are contributing to making us great in this country."
The congresswoman listed several recent violent crimes, asking the witness for each case if an immigrant or American citizen commited the crime. All cases she provided were done by American citizens, "In fact, each of these cases it was white supremacists! The last unanimous consent that I'll ask for is this article that states white supremacists are behind over 80% of extremism related murderers in 2022!"
Rep. Gill did not waste a second to respond, "Nothing excites me more than the thought of President Trump initiating the largest deportation effort in American history!" he fired back at Crockett. "Americans have learned first hand that importing the third world will turn America into the third world!"
Gill went on to ask rhetorically why so many Democrats support mass migration efforts, **["Perhaps its because they benefit from it politically?!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/79ec2ddc-31aa-46b1-9b79-d37a0ba1f055?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"Counting non-citizens in congressional apportionment has resulted in more seats for blue states and fewer congressional seats for red states," he explained. "The political party that has nothing to offer their voters but inflation, censorship and transgenderism is weaponizing mass illegal immigration to their own political benefit!"
Watch Gill go off on Crockett and the Democrats:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/79ec2ddc-31aa-46b1-9b79-d37a0ba1f055?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**Wall Street Elites Are Manufacturing Billions Using Your Retirement**
In the chaos of the recent crash, the media had their scapegoats ready.
* "It's Trump's fault!"
* **" Trump's tariffs caused this."**
* **" Trump's tariffs are putting the economy in jeopardy."**

They used fear to push millions of Americans into panic. They distracted you with headlines.
**Hard-working people like you saw their retirement accounts shrink by the minute while the elites made billions with your 401(k) as their bait.**
It's the same script, over and over again, and you're not supposed to notice.
**President Trump saw this coming, and he fought hard to preserve a[little-known IRS loophole](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa2fc1b-4eaf-4bb4-bb74-cba44784acc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that gives you the power to exit this broken system with your retirement savings intact.**
It's tax-free, penalty-free, and a fully legal exit plan designed to protect your wealth from the greed of the elites pulling the strings.
**All of the details are inside our emergency[2025 Wealth Protection Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa2fc1b-4eaf-4bb4-bb74-cba44784acc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**

# **Rand Paul SHUTS UP Blumenthal for trashing DOGE and Elon Musk holding the federal gov 't accountable**
Sen. Rand Paul made Sen. Richard Blumenthal **[put his foot in his mouth](https://substack.com/redirect/a4562219-9cf7-4717-a186-3b4eb19d17a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after he strongly criticized Elon Musk and DOGE for auditing federal spending and removing fraud, waste and abuse on behalf of the American taxpayer.
"How could you possibly be against ending $2 million for sex change surgeries in Guatemala?!!" Paul snapped at the Democrat.
[Watc Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a4562219-9cf7-4717-a186-3b4eb19d17a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a4562219-9cf7-4717-a186-3b4eb19d17a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Blumenthal called DOGE a "Musk power-grab," and said the tech billionaire was "giving America the middle finger."
"He's seizing power, engaging in the biggest heist of information in America's history, delving into agencies and destroying them when his own corporations profit from contracts with them,..." Blumenthal rambled for a while before getting tired.
Paul argued back that he hasn't heard any Democrats actually defend the cartoonish waste uncovered and made public by DOGE, such as sex change surgeries, global DEI programs and other left-wing ideologically-driven initiatives. The Senator then made the case that the President has every right to "pause and audit spending,.. to crassly say 'it's illegal, it's unlawful!' well, auditing spending is what government should do!"
"$4.8 million ofr social media influencers in Ukraine! If people want to defend that, step up and defend it!" Paul continued.
Watch the senate clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a4562219-9cf7-4717-a186-3b4eb19d17a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: In FOX News Sunday Appearance, DNC Chair Martin Slams Trump for Disastrous First 100 Days in Office
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2a5036c341&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
| | | | |
---
| | | | | **In FOX News Sunday Appearance, DNC Chair Martin Slams Trump for Disastrous First 100 Days in Office**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | DNC Chair Ken Martin made his [first Sunday Show appearance](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=19982da2df&e=d6c5c7d7ec) on Fox News Sunday, where he slammed Donald Trump and the GOP for tanking the economy and threatening to gut essential programs for working families in order to give handouts to billionaires. Chair Martin laid out how Trump is steering the US economy toward a recession, putting critical programs like Medicaid on the chopping block, and breaking promises he made to the American people. While Trump fails to deliver for hardworking Americans, Democrats are holding him and Republicans accountable.
**Find highlights from Chair Martin’s interview below:**
---
|
---
| | | _**On Trump tanking the economy:**_

“Most Americans and most economists believe we are headed towards a recession. ... The economy is failing the American people. Donald Trump said he would lower prices, prices are increasing. ... He said he would have a booming economy, the economy has shrunk, the GDP shrunk in the first quarter.”

“The tariffs that he’s put on for sure are going to increase prices for the hardworking Americans ... many of them who voted for him. So the reality is that’s where we’re focused on right now.”

_**On Trump and the GOP’s disastrous budget:**_

“This budget [Donald Trump and the GOP are] bringing forward which will cut Medicaid, all to give a tax break to the richest people in this country and corporations, and not helping hardworking Americans. ... Donald Trump made a lot of promises to Americans last year, and this budget that he’s bringing forward is actually going to increase prices for the most hardworking Americans.”

_**On Democrats fighting for working families and holding Trump accountable:**_

“That’s where Democrats’ focus is at right now: Squarely on making sure that we stand up for hardworking Americans who are being left behind in this Trump economy, which is already failing 100 days in.”

“I’m here to win elections and that’s what I’m fiercely focused on right now is building the infrastructure to do that. Look, we’ve had 100 town halls in over 45 states just in the last six weeks alone because Republicans have refused to listen to their constituents. ... We’re gonna make damn well sure that Americans see what exactly is happening to thousands and hundreds of thousands of people’s lives throughout this country.”
---
| ###
---
|
---

name: David Hogg
subject: Big news about our future plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Will you help us rebuild the Democratic Party with younger leaders?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T754ce820-5d34-4664-892f-1ca2e940f5df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, we have some big news to share:

Leaders We Deserve is launching a $20 million investment to usher in the next generation of Democrats who will go to the mat every day for the American people and use every tactic and tool to stop Trump’s radical right-wing, economically illiterate agenda.

[Will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help us primary out-of-touch, ineffective Democrats and rebuild the party with the next generation of leaders?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a095251-0c4d-414f-ac72-f7f62326c45d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Today’s party politics has an unwritten rule on both sides: If you win a seat, it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. That is a culture that we have to break.

And while we need to continue to pressure our current leaders to do more, part of the pathway forward requires us to start mounting primary challenges to Democrats in solidly blue districts who are failing to deliver for the people.

Too many elected leaders in the Democratic Party are either unwilling or unable to meet the moment and are asleep at the wheel while Trump is demolishing the economy, challenging the foundations of our democracy, and creating new existential crises for our country by the day.

Younger leaders simply bring a different level of urgency that we just aren’t seeing in our politics right now. We grew up with the existential threat of climate change bearing down on us. Adolescence today means active shooter drills and wondering if you’re going to survive math class. And we are told every election is the most important of our lifetime – that we must protect democracy at all costs – all while democracy continues to fail us.

It’s not because democracy can’t work, but because our politicians have failed to make it work for the people, and instead made it work for the special interests destroying our future. We can do something about it, Peter. We can ensure that Democrats are fighting for us – or we can replace them with younger leaders who will. [Can you pitch in $10 now, split between our organizations, to help us power this game-changing fight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e8e1ebb-9aed-480a-bd04-844b55171692/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Like so many, I care deeply about this party. I want this party to be strong. It’s personal to me. When my father was diagnosed with Parkinson’s almost 15 years ago, the only reason my family stayed afloat was Social Security. And the only reason we were able to get Social Security was because the Democratic Party fought for it. With all its flaws, the Democratic Party has played a critical role for progress in this country. Revitalizing and rebuilding it is important work. This party is worth fighting for, and not just for the sake of opposing Trump. What that looks like right now is electing younger leaders who have the energy, passion, and vision to meet this moment with the urgency our country deserves. Through all of this, some incumbents will rise to the challenge and emerge stronger. Others will demonstrate why they should be replaced. Either way, we all win. [If you're ready to jumpstart the next generation of Democratic leadership, please donate $10 right now to be split between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action and stand with us in this important fight.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42c57cef-078b-4227-ab78-7d9a811a7554/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your support, David Hogg

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7edbf822-f967-4ce1-b327-a24b17b81aa4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Calls on Democratic State Rep Candidate Lisa Field to Come Clean About Lobbying Hypocrisy in Ethics Disclosure
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R88d-4VxWHXwXpIVilEigQ7KCk4BhSt78bRf4PyvPD3HSOEBbPSIf6YAEM6wZbPQWAwDI8aSXJO5dDbNbj7S5fTsmoWl8nZ9otDQW2ZGbWmtlg_2xjbrvnOTBMfLv10yUS8Vb4_PN-3Ms_KhmVp43A==&c=69tb-VsfYsJVza_GEeRezMcCezfq0zPUbxrWDny9UmGRk5izfRCQ8w==&ch=Pm8DhhWnkNHLKPMZDU_jVGmMO4WQDiFh8FjPsKr7Iu2WswRVdg49UA==)
---
| MassGOP Calls on Democratic State Rep Candidate Lisa Field to Come Clean About Lobbying Hypocrisy in Ethics Disclosure
---
---
| BOSTON, MA -- The Massachusetts Republican Party is repeating its call for Lisa Field, the Democratic candidate for State Representative in the 3rd Bristol District, to come clean about her lobbying conflicts of interest, many of which were disclosed in past lobbyist reports she has filed with the Secretary of State's office.
On Monday, Field released a commercial where she once again failed to disclose that she is a lobbyist for the Massachusetts Nurses Association. As a lobbyist, she was also involved in passage of Clean Air Taunton and has lobbied for higher taxes.
"Honesty is always the best policy. Unfortunately, Lisa Field is hiding the truth about her time as a paid lobbyist. She has not done anything selflessly for the community or been a volunteer like Republican candidate and Taunton City Councilor Larry Quintal. Her activities have been part of her position as a highly-paid lobbyist, underscoring her lack of civic commitment to the communities of Taunton and Easton," said MassGOP Executive Director John Milligan.
According to lobbyist disclosures filed in 2021 with the Secretary of State's office, Field listed opposing "Aires gasification facility in Taunton" as a lobbying effort on her behalf.
"Field claims she knows the financial hardships facing residents in Taunton and Easton, but the facts say otherwise: She advocated for siphoning more money out of residents' paychecks with an increased employee payroll tax of 2.5%. She also lobbied for a 10% payroll tax on the self-employed and higher taxes on savings accounts," said Milligan.
Documentation from the Secretary State's office shows that Field has lobbied in favor of legislation containing these tax increases over the past four years.
According to the Secretary of State's database, Field has been a paid professional lobbyist since 2016. She has collected $273,183.43 for lobbying activities performed through 2024.
According to records with the Office of Campaign and Political Finance, Field is listed 36 times as a registered lobbyist. OpenSecrets.org lists Field as a lobbyist 26 times.
###
---
---

name: Team Stevens
subject: null, do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Counting on your help to shape our campaign strategy

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2258?t=1&akid=91%2E49239%2EUyHyck)
---
null, our battleground campaign to win in Michigan and flip the Senate blue is powered by and for everyday people like you – not billionaires and megadonors.
**That’s why we’re inviting a select group of our most engaged supporters to participate in a brief strategy survey, and we’re counting on your response by midnight tonight. Your grassroots insights will be critical to helping us spread our message, mobilize voters, and win this race.**
**[Will you take a moment now to complete our strategy survey so we can fight back against the GOP, win in Michigan, and flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2259?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=91%2E49239%2EUyHyck)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2259?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=91%2E49239%2EUyHyck)
---
Michigan is the key to winning back Senate control for Democrats, and our race is the only open seat rated as a “Toss Up” by _The Cook Political Report_. That means all eyes are on us – the stakes truly couldn’t be higher. The future of our economy, Social Security and Medicare, our democracy, and our personal freedoms all hinge on winning this race.
**That’s why we need to build the strongest possible strategy, and we need your input to do that. Will you take a minute or two now to complete our strategy survey?**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Confirm Ed Martin to Drain the Swamp!
body:
Contact your U.S. Senators and tell them to confirm Ed Martin for U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** We have watched the abuse of the American legal process weaponized against conservatives for decades and it's time that comes to an end. All Americans deserve the right to a _fair_ trial and that isn't going to happen, especially in D.C., without serious changes to the judicial system. **T****his is why we are urging you to **[**contact your U.S. Senators**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aac6a9bf/1edb9794aac5ee50)** to confirm Ed Martin for U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia.****************************** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aac6a9bf/1edb9794aac5ee52)
---
| **** ************ Ed Martin is currently acting U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. He is already in this position and doing well. He is a seasoned legal veteran who stands up for the Constitution and the rights of all Americans. He is a man of integrity and principles, and has vast levels of experience navigating complex legal challenges, while also ensuring that government power remains within its set boundaries.
We need your help to get him confirmed. The Left, unsurprisingly, does not want to relinquish control of the judiciary in Washington, D.C. After all, they successfully used it to persecute conservatives for a very long time. Therefore, this is one of those nominations they are fighting tooth and nail--which means we must fight back. In fact, there haven't been confirmation hearings for U.S. Attorneys for decades, but Democrats are trying to force hearings in order to try to do what they do best: destroy good men who are poised to do good things for the country.
**ACTION:** **[Use our action page](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aac6a9bf/1edb9794aac5ee54 "https://action.teapartypatriots.org/petition/ed-martin")** to quickly send a pre-written email to both your U.S. Senators with the click of a button, after which, you can choose to be connected directly to your senator's office by phone. We also provide a phone script for you to use. It's SO EASY and will take only a few minutes to do. **_Remember, calling is extremely important in this battle, so please say YES to making your calls!_****_
_**It 's not enough to elect a conservative president. We must ensure that the president is able to get his nominations confirmed, so that the agenda we voted for is actually implemented. Conservatives will continue to be persecuted in D.C. if the Senate does not confirm Ed Martin.
**COMING SOON:**
> Keep an eye on your email over the next few days. The markup for the reconciliation bill is happening this week, and we'll be sending out a how-to guide so you can take effective action.
> We'll all need to be calling and emailing our members of Congress to urge them to pass the pro-growth reconciliation budget bill. The Left is already demanding, "Don't cut any spending!" If we want real cuts and a path forward for President Trump's America First agenda, we have to speak up too.
> And if you're able to hold a sign-waving event near a member of Congress's office--or even just at a busy intersection--that helps. Dropping off a letter works too. Lots of ways to make your voice count.

**Thank you for taking action and please share the action page with others!****
**In liberty,
Jenny Beth**** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aac6a9bf/1edb9794aac5ee56)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aac6a9bf/1edb9794aac5ee58)
---

To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:**[Tea Party Patriots Action](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aac6a9bf/1edb9794aac5ee5a)** 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314Woodstock, GA 30189
Want to change how you receive these emails?You can **[unsubscribe](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aac6a9bf&sd=1edb9794aac5f209&n=11699e4c01bd75a "https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aac6a9bf&sd=1edb9794aac5f209&n=11699e4c01bd75a")** or **[update your preferences](http://$\[li:updateprofile\]$/)**.****

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7f2cec5jaem5ep1tgcq0sqcqkti9c16vdi18ic0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1o34clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9jftndp15bl2akt4nc5giqkv039gspt8g64fuho_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1o34clh2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zold2vm6u7sfqucb8rumjjsarko5kng1idgkqjso_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1o34clh2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhooig36vbf01vcakb8q1gao336inqu2r6dmv3j8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1o34clh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8kr9rkt8qgv6cu2frprkofretu05i55a21rs4ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1o34clh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The people in power either don't notice or don't care.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dignity of Work PAC
body:
We should all be concerned.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107117142/543653859/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk4MzVmMC1iOTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oa934jWl5ial2gysV6oShl8Xt-1FDW-Jg1zr8HoMJtI=)
---
I'm concerned, friend. Americans are working harder than ever with less to show for it. And the people in power either don't notice or don't care. This recent court ruling is just one example:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107117151/543653861/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk4MzVmMC1iOTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oa934jWl5ial2gysV6oShl8Xt-1FDW-Jg1zr8HoMJtI=)
If this is the first you're hearing about this case in Texas with massive national implications, you're not alone. Here's what happened:

One judge in one district struck down a Department of Labor rule that would have significantly increased the amount of people eligible to receive overtime pay. **As a result, 4 million hardworking Americans will not get the overtime pay they earn. This goes to the heart of what the Dignity of Work means – if you put in the extra hours, you should earn extra pay, period.**
**Things like this are happening far too often, friend – and no one is fighting back.[That's why I founded the Dignity of Work PAC: to elect leaders nationwide who will fight for workers. And if you believe in this critical mission, I'm asking you to chip in $5 today to join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107117157/543653863/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk4MzVmMC1iOTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oa934jWl5ial2gysV6oShl8Xt-1FDW-Jg1zr8HoMJtI=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107117173/543653865/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk4MzVmMC1iOTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oa934jWl5ial2gysV6oShl8Xt-1FDW-Jg1zr8HoMJtI=)
---
The Dignity of Work is the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live or what kind of work you do. **Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.**
But too many of our leaders seem to have forgotten this – or in the case of President Trump, Elon Musk and their billionaire allies, they never understood it to begin with.

Donald Trump harnessed workers' legitimate anger and desire for change to win an election, but it’s clear from his first 100 days in office: He is not leveling the playing field for workers, he’s making things worse. **Together, we can elect leaders who will fight for change that benefits working people – not Big Tech CEOs.**
**[Are you with me, friend? If your answer is yes, please chip in $5 or more to help us invest in candidates across the country who will fight for workers and create an economy where they can thrive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107117177/543653867/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk4MzVmMC1iOTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oa934jWl5ial2gysV6oShl8Xt-1FDW-Jg1zr8HoMJtI=)**
Thank you for being a part of this movement.

In solidarity,
Sherrod
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tClQUZwGoEOS_rmuR1aPwA2?unsubscribedata=MdBpCKnn8SKWhe1tOjBD6PH7OZmxLh%2BQlDPAjHMIwBaoTj64bawoZE8KbcMqQHYlK1II8c237kP53PHOfsXOU3FkAnWGWD5747CHGqriG12B3vZjknHUJC09dSy5wCXGTF%2BvJvaiOKV%2FaR7JhbyL4oavaOhu9ScexsHU2SAdg849HJ%2FQcVS0TAvoX5Fj%2BxLajYKtGlIoJk%2BuJjbfmBV1TW9wKbPTxa1afuzQsB3FwnNE%2Fdhx9rRuvhybmxdXv6pahNgn27ablWbbbYJ3fP%2FoQMt7TuGzDjqMaz6A3jRw4Wyq0X7ScA7BSCsB2WbBaBlf3%2FzA6i6VqQiIyyR%2BkCPzVY8JObEv7zQ4iBqXVgmih%2FKvv33R7evF%2FoH275%2BLa%2F6PC38VwkRB4H6qR32ojyd3I4uO4oEaSWTZWmIkT4yIarE67T%2BP%2BWnfrA8lhMNpAu1q) Dignity of Work PAC

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Hitting the road later this month
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I’ll be going out to Pennsylvania for my first out-of-state townhall in a district Republicans have refused to show up in.
#

Peter, I’ll be going out to Pennsylvania for my first out-of-state townhall in a district Republicans have refused to show up in.
We’ve done a bunch of townhalls across Arizona over the last two months. Republican leadership told their members not to head out and answer to their constituents, and that didn’t sit right with me. So, I made it a point to go to the redder parts of my state and reach the people we need to be speaking to.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25.XT1Xme&refcode=em250505-1-90&t=1&akid=3856%2E734936%2Ew3PWzg)
What I’ve found out there might surprise you. The people in those districts aren’t die-hard MAGA fanatics. They’re regular folks who care about their communities — and they’re getting more and more fed up with Trump and Elon Musk as they mess with their jobs, their retirement funds, and the programs they depend on.
So, I figured, why not take this on the road? I’ll be out in PA-12, which is Representative Brian Fitzpatrick’s district. He’s been doing telephone townhalls lately, which is kind of admitting you don’t want to show up and face the music in person. We’ve got to flip this district blue if we want to retake the House, so I’m happy to get the word out and let folks know whose fault it is that the economy is in shambles while prices continue to rise.
I just finished a campaign for Senate last November, but I can’t sit around and do nothing while the GOP lets Trump tear our country apart. I’ve got young kids, and I’m going to make sure I’m fighting as hard as I can so my son and daughter have a bright future.
It might be the Marine in me, but I can’t back down. Not now. Not with so much at stake.
None of this work comes cheap, though. And that’s why I’m writing to you this morning.
[**Please. If you can afford it, could you chip in something to my campaign so I have the resources we’ll need to keep fighting back on Republicans’ home turf? Anything helps, and these donations add up fast when we’re all chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25.XT1Xme&refcode=em250505-1-90&t=2&akid=3856%2E734936%2Ew3PWzg)

name: Giffords.org
subject: This email is just five sentences
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

— the last thing you probably want to read on your Monday is another political email, so we’ll keep this to just five sentences (promise).
A majority of Americans agree that we need to do more to stop senseless gun violence. But when it's time to act, too many elected officials put the NRA’s interests above the will of the people.
It’s wrong — and it’s time to step up and fight back against the gun lobby head-on.
[**Donate and stand with Gabby Giffords today: We can defeat the gun lobby’s grip on our government, but only if we have the courage to take on the tough fight right now.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250505-1-b&t=1&akid=10390%2E3935704%2E3VnYTh)

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: The good news…and the bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friend — Just a quick moment of your time. We have some good news, and some bad.
**The good news:** In the 100 days since Trump has taken office, the opposition to his far-right presidency has gained a lot of momentum.
Protesters have taken to the streets, voters are flooding Congressional town halls, and Trump’s approval ratings are sinking. Importantly for campaigns like ours, we saw a huge influx of fundraising as people realized that we need to build a movement in defense of democracy.
**The bad news:** In April, things changed. Donations slowed down, and we saw less energy from the grassroots across the board. Right now our fundraising is projecting way behind where we wanted to be for the quarter. That’s really tough timing for us.
A lot of the races that will define the midterm elections are coming into shape right now, with new candidates jumping in and the far-right’s billionaire donors setting their strategy for MAGA victory. We have to start getting involved in these crucial battlegrounds before we get left in the dust.
So that leaves us with two choices: either we need A LOT more donations between now and the end of the deadline, or we will need to make detrimental budget cuts.
We don’t want to have to do that.
So please: [**Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today. We have to start building our war chest so we can take on the Republicans who refuse to hold Trump accountable, and win pro-democracy majorities in Congress next year.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-may25.cks14D&refcode=em250505-1-360&t=1&akid=5541%2E196590%2EtBy9Zx)

clean_body: Friend — Just a quick moment of your time. We have some good news, and some bad. The good news: In the 100 days since Trump has taken office, the opposition to his far-right presidency has gained a lot of momentum. Protesters have taken to the streets, voters are flooding Congressional town halls, and Trump’s approval ratings are sinking. Importantly for campaigns like ours, we saw a huge influx of fundraising as people realized that we need to build a movement in defense of democracy. The bad news: In April, things changed. Donations slowed down, and we saw less energy from the grassroots across the board. Right now our fundraising is projecting way behind where we wanted to be for the quarter. That’s really tough timing for us. A lot of the races that will define the midterm elections are coming into shape right now, with new candidates jumping in and the far-right’s billionaire donors setting their strategy for MAGA victory. We have to start getting involved in these crucial battlegrounds before we get left in the dust. So that leaves us with two choices: either we need A LOT more donations between now and the end of the deadline, or we will need to make detrimental budget cuts. We don’t want to have to do that. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for being part of this team, and believing that our democracy is worth defending from Trump and his authoritarian movement. — Mandela Barnes The Long Run PAC

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1324qtrsb2l41hjal89in59nt7r72b4mbmh75c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1p74clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7cto8v9ic5r52f8db6e0irut646fj6qht9mckh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1p74clh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf7voi3gs4jap7ngbq73c0j43vh3hgqrb2daj8f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1p74clh2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z67nlt6l4qrm93snvfsd10m2hr7fh6t4m3t4aek0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1p74clh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztr6eh1um53bb8dp148suffh4dts6qpc1a7efac0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm1p74clh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Robert, State GOP Membership Services
subject: My heart breaks as I write this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst

Friend.
I was reviewing our State GOP Membership Rolls and heart sank when I saw your 2025 State Republican Membership Card has lapsed.[!!️UPDATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztbbe2fdlbsq5jssalp4tu0rhkv5200c1sl9pu9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm9o74cth2bs)I remember the day you joined us, the passion and energy you brought to our team. We shared a commitment to Conservative values and a vision for a better future. But now, it feels like that's all slipping away...
Life gets busy, and sometimes things fall through the cracks. But the thought of not having your voice, your support, and your commitment to our cause is a hard reality to face.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today, one last time. [I want to personally invite you to renew your membership for 2025.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi3300svlsjtuaerpf81ub9rghrag0rmefdsnr1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm9o74cth2bs) It's not just about the money; it's about standing with us against the Radical Left and fighting for what's right.
If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst.
I fear that we'll lose another vital voice in our fight for Conservative values...
Please, don't let that happen.
Renew your membership and send a message that you still stand with State Republicans TODAY! [!!️UPDATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl04d0bjiatutp4iqpj1j44484fi75qfabja41ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5hm9o74cth2bs)Sincerely,

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I just introduced legislation to require transparency on wrongful deportations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, this is important:
I’ve introduced legislation to require the Trump Administration to produce a report detailing the steps they’re taking to ensure compliance with court orders related to the wrongful deportation of U.S. residents to El Salvador.
The resolution also requires that the Administration confirm whether U.S. security assistance has been used to support the illegal detention of U.S. residents, and to assess El Salvador’s human rights record.
I need your help to show strong public support for this legislation. Will you add your name today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2_DXbgGXyUieMrg6aBF6lg2]
Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele has rounded up tens of thousands of Salvadorans without due process and jammed them indefinitely into overpopulated torture centers — and now he’s trying to do the same to people living in the United States.
This is a violation of our country’s founding principles. That’s why I’m forcing a vote to make the Administration explain its actions to the American public and bring the Bukele regime’s human rights abuses to light.
Before the Senate votes on this measure, I'd love to know if it has your support. Add your name today to say you’re on board. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2_DXbgGXyUieMrg6aBF6lg2]
Thank you for reading, and for speaking out on this important issue.
-Tim Kaine

name: Robert, State GOP Membership Services
subject: My heart breaks as I write this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst

Friend.
I was reviewing our State GOP Membership Rolls and heart sank when I saw your 2025 State Republican Membership Card has lapsed.[!!️UPDATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP >>
](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2rr1thbphtsgjpkpgll016lbnoje9mj6cd4nta0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm0pr6c5h2bs)I remember the day you joined us, the passion and energy you brought to our team. We shared a commitment to Conservative values and a vision for a better future. But now, it feels like that's all slipping away...
Life gets busy, and sometimes things fall through the cracks. But the thought of not having your voice, your support, and your commitment to our cause is a hard reality to face.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today, one last time. [I want to personally invite you to renew your membership for 2025.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z99t9c2v14elh9k55hdugkbqlsdqs7ppkt0jqe0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm0pr6c5h2bs) It's not just about the money; it's about standing with us against the Radical Left and fighting for what's right.
If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst.
I fear that we'll lose another vital voice in our fight for Conservative values...
Please, don't let that happen.
Renew your membership and send a message that you still stand with State Republicans TODAY! [!!️UPDATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP >>

name: Dan Carr
subject: Faith Meets Freedom
body:
Let us not be spectators--but salt and light!!

| |
---|---|---
|
# Faith Meets Freedom
### Let us not be spectators--but salt and light!!
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| May 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
**Why Christians Must Get Out and Vote - And Stay Engaged in the Political Arena**
In a time of cultural confusion and moral decline, Christians cannot afford to remain silent. Some believers have been told that politics is too corrupt for Christians, or that our true citizenship is in heaven, so we shouldn't get involved. But both Scripture and history show that God's people have always been called to stand for truth in every arena, including government.
[Click Here To Finish Reading ](https://substack.com/redirect/188c55dc-65ab-42a0-8b02-97d5e29f536b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[The](https://substack.com/redirect/188c55dc-65ab-42a0-8b02-97d5e29f536b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Article: ](https://substack.com/redirect/188c55dc-65ab-42a0-8b02-97d5e29f536b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Good morning, Derek
body:
Please don’t scroll past this short read.
---
️Good morning, Derek — we hope you won’t scroll past this short read. It’s Monday, May 5. We’re just over 100 days into Trump’s presidency, and the consequences have been disastrous: He’s ignored a unanimous order from the Supreme Court, enacted tariffs that will skyrocket costs, and allowed an unelected billionaire to dismantle key government agencies and fire thousands of federal workers. _And that was just the first 100 days._ Republicans have proven they won’t check Trump’s power — so we need to elect more Democrats who will. To do that, we’re investing in every single state party, sending $1 million a month to Democrats across the country who are doing on-the-ground organizing work and laying the groundwork to win future elections in their communities. That’s the only way we’ll elect more Democrats at all levels of government — and it’s only possible with your help. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up to support this work. [**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government is worth $3 to you, then we’re asking you to make that contribution today. If you’re on the fence, please remember any contribution makes an impact when the stakes are so high and we have work to fund in every single state.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250505_3328_fr&refcode2=3345_22930333_Yas0pK&akid=3345%2E22930333%2EYas0pK)

name: Natalie Jones
subject: 🔔GOOD NEWS 🔔Hidden Fees Legislation Signed!
body:
Good news from the governor's office!
| | |
---
| |
---
| 🔔GOOD NEWS 🔔Hidden Fees Legislation Signed!
---
| Friends-
Good news from the governor's office! On Friday, Governor Youngkin signed SB 1212 & HB 2515- legislation to ban hidden fees- into law. This came after the governor's edits to the bills, which allowed exemptions for food delivery services and gyms, were rejected by the General Assembly. We are so happy to see this legislation signed into law in its original form, without loopholes for corporations to take advantage of.
---
---
| |
---
| [Read More Here](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hHqmjMQMIuUDRR4lq1mbtY49qOhYu9CMOjDreNXRgZ4Zrhh5CNQtUUWHtSdW1nyX_RUZl8ibzPpMFUQubZPeWI3Tq-bH1LBYAfh7ziyPi3_iGE9r5eokELfhiaWDt2xfeaSHCspHkHFAuOU7k0e9ji08TcRKd2ZcsJFgVBqbM6MkAR4yu45e4cCG6cmdylRZC2-RbyZ2nIALMzd8f83gkKWzqc8ym-gHbLVj4DEMOZrxppTJ6XgX9ziZ2dc7Xxum&c=ssjmeH7vTiUapT-BjGpFRSfy-E4QdjLRM5OUEUbfkACXhdNoFHXECA==&ch=XuhFdeB175Fq-Lbo92_fRjgmNuCRQo1l9NdKIh2cqqK_Zfg4XKgOfQ==)
---
---
| The law will now help Virginians keep more of what they earn by requiring all mandatory fees on a purchase to be disclosed upfront, ensuring consumers know the total cost of a good or service before checking out and promoting truth in pricing, saving families [$3,200 annually](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hHqmjMQMIuUDRR4lq1mbtY49qOhYu9CMOjDreNXRgZ4Zrhh5CNQtUUWHtSdW1nyXbantx4gNs48_iAh9f6bTKJ_uSXcKvnRViB6npl9oWF8LJ50wQ3flrv21NQV6iFQ7-Rg39VxGsiejzDtH7ldF47h5oSGGE7C9CYRCDsaUCuc=&c=ssjmeH7vTiUapT-BjGpFRSfy-E4QdjLRM5OUEUbfkACXhdNoFHXECA==&ch=XuhFdeB175Fq-Lbo92_fRjgmNuCRQo1l9NdKIh2cqqK_Zfg4XKgOfQ==).
We are so grateful for your support in getting this important legislation passed and signed into law.
Natalie Jones Communications Director
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hHqmjMQMIuUDRR4lq1mbtY49qOhYu9CMOjDreNXRgZ4Zrhh5CNQtURs5CZA1Kq3sfmAh8VXHAIgNMr8SInapjE8jTQtAaFQOuCjBVNYLDFOCksYTe6Z29zEAyr9hoPSiFQ32_h4BM7ucsKmwC4VFwwZfSDiRkntWHGPAwgcKRE0=&c=ssjmeH7vTiUapT-BjGpFRSfy-E4QdjLRM5OUEUbfkACXhdNoFHXECA==&ch=XuhFdeB175Fq-Lbo92_fRjgmNuCRQo1l9NdKIh2cqqK_Zfg4XKgOfQ==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hHqmjMQMIuUDRR4lq1mbtY49qOhYu9CMOjDreNXRgZ4Zrhh5CNQtURs5CZA1Kq3saY2meyGue-USa_UGtdmm_g1HEojph08RM0fCFSSoogpuSso2wgt9k9w4jBcYjffnLTGFi68MCGCu6PQ6zixw8se9szGdFPMT&c=ssjmeH7vTiUapT-BjGpFRSfy-E4QdjLRM5OUEUbfkACXhdNoFHXECA==&ch=XuhFdeB175Fq-Lbo92_fRjgmNuCRQo1l9NdKIh2cqqK_Zfg4XKgOfQ==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hHqmjMQMIuUDRR4lq1mbtY49qOhYu9CMOjDreNXRgZ4Zrhh5CNQtURs5CZA1Kq3swWvuxqlbhouJf2rsAu0bwVtQ8_Q4wgeTnlLgTr1_Tn38Xd8a0H3wW9TXVTQ7k_r1rEwIcgHOsQpZW2If_t9w8PvU-axz_TKLDcqluKRbOfc=&c=ssjmeH7vTiUapT-BjGpFRSfy-E4QdjLRM5OUEUbfkACXhdNoFHXECA==&ch=XuhFdeB175Fq-Lbo92_fRjgmNuCRQo1l9NdKIh2cqqK_Zfg4XKgOfQ==)

body:
Peter, this is my most urgent request yet.

---
| | | Peter, this is my most urgent request yet. I’m launching an emergency petition to prove Americans overwhelmingly oppose the Republican scheme to privatize Social Security. [I need your help to reach 10,000 signatures before midnight to send far right extremists a powerful message: Hands off our Social Security.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107124313/543671647/-1184644151?source=20250505_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ZhYTNiNi1jMzI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mI0hryNJL8ymHrCBMoVJyc6fPz9Kp-JBMiqfy0I10g=&emci=57fac9d7-d325-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=57faa3b6-c329-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21290350) [_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: We can’t let Republicans slash our hard-earned benefits. Republicans are working behind closed doors to privatize Social Security.
We must stop them.
That’s why I’m officially launching a critical petition to send the powerful message that our earned benefits are non-negotiable. Period. Full stop.
Seniors have paid into Social Security and worked hard to retire with dignity.
[We need to act now. Millions of Americans are depending on us to step up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107124317/543671651/-1184644151?source=20250505_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ZhYTNiNi1jMzI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mI0hryNJL8ymHrCBMoVJyc6fPz9Kp-JBMiqfy0I10g=&emci=57fac9d7-d325-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=57faa3b6-c329-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21290350)

Will you add your name next to mine to stop the GOP’s heartless threats to cut Social Security? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107124318/543671652/-1184644151?source=20250505_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ZhYTNiNi1jMzI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mI0hryNJL8ymHrCBMoVJyc6fPz9Kp-JBMiqfy0I10g=&emci=57fac9d7-d325-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=57faa3b6-c329-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21290350)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: DOGE has been a complete failure
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1627%2E791427%2E2Z_sDR)
Friend,
Elon Musk needs to face the facts. **DOGE has been a complete failure.**
They set out to slash $2 trillion from the federal budget through unconstitutional cuts. They have fallen laughably short of that goal, and spending is up under Trump.
They promised to make our government more efficient. Instead they caused chaos and confusion that hindered all efficiency.
The only real result is that tens of thousands of federal workers are out of a job, agencies across the board that protect Americans are worse off, and regular folks are left without the services and programs they depend on.
**DOGE failed because Elon Musk and Donald Trump don’t see government as a way to help people, but a roadblock to them and their billionaire buddies amassing more wealth and power.**
The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, the EPA, the Department of Education — all of these now-gutted institutions exist to stop Wall Street, corporations, and billionaires from ripping off the American people and making an extra buck in any way they can.
So yes, DOGE has been a failure. But we can bet that the Trump administration is going to keep trying to rip us off.
They’re already pushing for huge Medicaid cuts so they can pay for tax breaks for the ultra-rich. That would devastate millions of working class families.
We must keep up the fight against Trump, Musk, DOGE, and the entire far-right party that they lead. That is our responsibility right now as a grassroots movement committed to protecting democracy and lifting up the working class.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
* * *

Don't click away just yet —
Ilhan is just getting her reelection campaign off the ground and she’s counting on her top supporters to help us show that our campaign will be hard to beat.
She’s doing everything she can to take on the Trump administration, so your donation right now helps her focus on staying in the fight instead of raising money. [**Please, make a contribution to our campaign today. Show that you stand with Ilhan and this progressive movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250505-1-180&t=2&akid=1627%2E791427%2E2Z_sDR)
[DONATE $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&amount=5&refcode=em250505-1-180&t=3&akid=1627%2E791427%2E2Z_sDR)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=1627%2E791427%2E2Z_sDR)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1627%2E791427%2E2Z_sDR)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=1627%2E791427%2E2Z_sDR)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1627_791427_2Z_sDR&akid=1627%2E791427%2E2Z_sDR)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033
