| | | Team -- It's Adam Schiff, your DSCC Vice-Chair.

I'm starting to see a trend -- have you noticed it?

In Wisconsin, Democrats soundly defeated Elon Musk's Supreme Court candidate and saved the court's pro-rule-of-law majority.

In no fewer than seven states, Democrats have locked in _crucial_ special election victories already this year -- even **flipping** seats Trump carried by double digits.

And across the country, Americans are showing up in _droves_ to rally against Trump's chaotic and corrupt anti-democratic agenda.

**There's a real energy and opportunity right now -- and if we seize this moment, it would deliver a MASSIVE shock to Trump's authoritarian agenda. We've got to make this count, so I have to ask:**

| | | **I’m proud to be endorsed by Vote Mama, which elects more moms to public office.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6Ga_--4zVWj6DqJv8SzKwqC01VQiBffE6uzFmeQf6soZ1ifnToO_0rJ8wXa7E15j1Edg6ogHTZ3MUwkArGGM14wz_27I1sg3jxCsCzKSBubAKqA2diYVBJz1bUT47L9J19Upz-th81TRLu1THn4u-DWRAYh0STJ5aubrp-b_UqRSx-Ngbxv9GOVgv7MHrufu9jVzxOfsD7loI_AvcU8kQIhOSKBX_0LnzHQcWj9KNP-f/4g8/S3gPgu1fS0y0N9N1IQZDIA/h0/h001.wVYdpihLya21PbXMdob0_isNIYeJMqvhmauu8orGwIQ)**[As a mom of 4 in a red-to-blue race for Virginia House of Delegates, I need your help to deliver Trump and Musk a big defeat THIS November. Donate to elect more moms!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviDLsjkl4W45eYlyK1IsPmVDF_47VBno0hLuktmXDjmMB-CMRuzs4HREqb6LyA1OcSiAQxxZv5sxVOTSEJrTB1CdUv5_SKnpxEojldF8mmELpk_JtoczPlE_PlNOEx34k7DpPvaIlHwjHcjGW_Q7zyPJE-rek5v4dO-3GvgxVsiFXHH9rtL5n7XcQ9LpEPUEFGmkA4jwz6KmTMHaVrt599CKB1hpNLwriCCd5cmPNOrbd/4g8/S3gPgu1fS0y0N9N1IQZDIA/h1/h001.AlOc1Y3ey5yaO9ljasLSxZ7SPPMD-cTr-nMxHpEdSAo)**
* * *
In 2017, as Donald Trump rose to power attacking Latino families like mine, my young American-born son asked whether we should leave.
I said no, because we are Americans, period.
I ran for the Virginia House of Delegates, defeated a 16-year Republican incumbent, and became the first immigrant Latina ever to serve.
As a mother, I won’t let anyone go after my kids - especially Donald Trump.
**I’m proud to be endorsed by Vote Mama, which works to elect more moms to public office nationwide.**
My opponent, MAGA Republican Ian Lovejoy, voted against paid sick leave, commonsense gun safety laws, and protecting the constitutional rights of my daughters.
We don’t have to wait until 2026 to fight back: we can defeat Trump and Musk in this year’s nationally-watched Virginia House of Delegates elections.
**We’re defending a 51-49 Democratic majority, and I’m running in a prime pickup opportunity that Donald Trump lost.**
**[I’m a mom, social worker, and labor leader running to flip VA-HD22 THIS NOVEMBER. Stand with over 3,000 donors to our campaign and pitch in today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnitayrUQMA4_9RuxbSObTonGIBVsjOGlfA3fMfGoa4WEkUQBGubt9JNLpGYGF1XHKZf3DZjwsHdA31t9cLBKzJN5fONg29I3baAl4qYYsMyZWEXAyMwGE9ts5ZmakG2E6vMqffNH7_Br1KNdh95gkepsG4yIT8kA5i1FXLmcfCH4peyztI-ENZQliDn15nzY_VIfr-COOJbTImtK_DfYRNo7PmG2819i1M9DTsJ2Y6wP/4g8/S3gPgu1fS0y0N9N1IQZDIA/h2/h001.2dp1T1FyiMVZz27L9DM3w2__ppAazfdgIHsf5_AfRnY)

Hi Peter,
Welcome to this month's edition of the PADEMS Newsletter [https://www.padems.org/newsletters/] . Check out Pennsylvania's Democrats In Action across the state — Building Bridges to Victory in May!

We’re thrilled to introduce Austin Wise, the 2025–2026 President of the PA College Democrats!
A tried-and-true organizer, Austin has worked and interned on campaigns across western Pennsylvania — from local municipal races all the way to federal campaigns.
LEARN MORE ON PAGE 10 [https://www.padems.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/2025-05_PADEMS-NEWSLETTER.pdf]

The work is already underway to save our democracy here in PA! Join the movement by signing up for our online community via Slack [https://bit.ly/PAOnlineSlack] . This is your one stop shop to keep up to date with volunteer opportunities and community updates, make connections across the commonwealth and beyond, access training and resource materials, and even connect with local county parties! All strong movements come out of strong communities, and we’re building one online.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrikohfn7aqpsr8tnlbhoti9e60cpldd8c0v81fg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqh9ssvncu16h3ug3pqpsd0et6h8dpjg5cspdfv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl5nebt91rt4c2cs0mftorjg8llh0c67sogmlhg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsjl06f2o20n7qkmvvs1489bpe87ed7fis7vbo98_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs)**

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh3u6k63atpa64m00lqs7ohi5nkfqee7ct51iklg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl786t3tv2oah7loiecub2j99rb482d2cnkm4678_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5rtcldlf8c1bhp87vp1jgg4o0kk4i0fhgtnm59g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpehpv095k6u3m3opr59j9su27ghh872ulkiopn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zahs8bslrpema9etib60ftnu7m70r1pe887d8st0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmcob1chh2bs)

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Voting is more important than ever
body:
| | |
---
| | Fellow activist,

Last weekend, NPP celebrated our **FOURTH anniversary**! It has been four years of dedication, growth, and impact, and we are grateful to have had you by our side through it all.

Since our founding, we have assisted **more than 50,000** Pennsylvanians in registering to vote. Now, as our democracy is under threat like never before, we are more committed than ever to expanding the electorate and ensuring that every voice in Pennsylvania is heard.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YvwxRD5OXzY1UTI1eP6Zk35LIYFYSV7lBs1YvHT58fAXO7zt2QtkBKomTcgt7cFmxw-3D-3DqJ1c_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYgXzcwSm41teSl2LMxPEikr1gEsbD7Xi12yTj3UbfO952oIHoMuUxwSqdvKV7il6hvv2FXycCAuT9VMj8YGA1XgD7IEbvaO1hjAOpWL1nPWeLaJCcxvpx9jnexY68Ezyh-2BqQUZ5tRIlCiRy9zqNPeTmMCIauQnDQAKAkd4fzRhcWdJnmsZog3Pha51i1w8HJi "4th Anniversary New Pennsylvania Project")
Our impact is only **continuing** to grow. Thanks to your continued support, NPP has grown from a staff of _one_ in 2021 to a staff of _fifty_ now in 2025. As we have increased our capacity, we have also been able to expand our work to include twenty counties across the Commonwealth.

During our time together, we helped to usher in change in the PA State House for the first time in over a decade, and protected that majority throughout several special elections, including State House District 35 (Allegheny) and State House District 163 (Delaware). Across NPP’s Independent expenditure Get-Out-The-Vote (GOTV) programs spanning the past three years, **we knocked on more than 250,000 doors across Pennsylvania. Over the last three years, NPP made more than 200,000 calls, and had more than 500,000 conversations with voters on the ground. ** Thanks to our community of activists and supporters, we're expanding the electorate across the Commonwealth! We’re so happy to have your continued support.

Cheers,

Team NPP
---
| | |
---
| | Thank you for staying informed and engaged!
---
| | **Our Contact Information**
New Pennsylvania Project
P.O. Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
4126996771

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Addressing the rumors about running for U.S. Senate
body:
Please read this. There are a lot of rumors about me running for Senate. I need you to hear it from me first.
| | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9312271/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWU5NcHNCU2pQVw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDU/LbmNsRFo2dTNhaw/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MTZjM3FkdVFHbjlscw/gaBjfqA/s1t39baaad3)
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Friend,
I didn’t run for office 5 years ago to become famous or get invited to swanky cocktail parties in Washington, D.C.
I ran because I was sick and tired of seeing our country speeding towards a cliff with career politicians from both parties at the wheel, and I decided to do something about it.
Then I got to Congress and saw firsthand just how corrupt and broken our government really is, and let me tell you, one of the biggest hurdles we face in our movement to save America is the U.S. Senate.
**The worst of them is Jon Ossoff, or as I like to call him, Radical Transgender Activist Jon Ossoff.**
Ossoff is already working behind the scenes to impeach and remove President Trump from office, he even admitted it at his recent town hall.
**He’s even running his re-election campaign as if I’m already his opponent****, smearing me every chance he gets, and using my name to fundraise from liberal online donors.**
**_[That’s right... Jon Ossoff can’t raise money without using MY NAME](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.******
**[He is obviously terrified of me running for Senate... So maybe that’s exactly what needs to happen???](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
Friend: Before anything further happens - Before I move to the next step - **_[I need to hear from you](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.**
**I need to know if I should run for Senate in Georgia, and if I should I need to know if I will have your support or not.**
This would be the biggest fight of my life, the most important, the most brutal, and the most high-stakes.
_The radical Left_ ,_the fake news media_ , _the RINOs_ , _the globalist billionaires_ \- they would all come after me with everything they’ve got.
But I’m not afraid of them. I’m only afraid of running this race without the full support of the America First patriots who have had my back since day one...
**[So I need you to tell me now:](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
[SHOULD I RUN FOR SENATE?](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
_In Strength,_
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9312271/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDU/LbmNsRFo2dTNhaw/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MTZjM3FkdVFHbjlscw/gaBjfqA/sds62426cd0)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: American taxpayers shouldn't have to fund Pete Hegseth’s makeup studio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Last week, I introduced a really simple amendment in the House Armed Services Committee: No taxpayer funds should be used to build, maintain, or outfit a makeup studio for the Secretary of Defense.
Kind of absurd.
But here’s the more unbelievable part: Every single Republican on the committee voted *against* it!
To state the obvious — we don’t need a made-for-TV defense secretary. We don’t need someone more interested in their appearance than in ensuring the safety of our service members.
But according to CBS News, Secretary Hegseth has ordered a brand-new makeup studio at the Pentagon that will cost taxpayers thousands of dollars. (It would seem he’s more interested in concealing and covering up his mishandling of sensitive attack plans and his blemishes than in strengthening our national security...)
I know Republicans have been very busy avoiding their constituents lately, so I’ll share what I hear from MY constituents: Families are taking on debt just to cover basic needs. Groceries. Rent. Child care. Health care.
The idea that public funds should be spent making sure Pete Hegseth is ready for Fox and Friends at any moment isn’t just bizarre — it’s insulting.
And I think this makes it pretty darn clear that the “efficiency” and “waste” this Administration is obsessed with talking about isn’t actually about efficiency or waste. It’s about furthering their agenda, whether that’s giving billionaires huge tax breaks or making sure their guy looks good on camera. Put another way, it’s total bullshit.
A makeup studio won’t strengthen our national security.
It won’t protect our service members.
It won’t make Americans safer.
If Pete Hegseth wants to be camera-ready, he should do so on his own time, with his own personal funds (just like I do!) — and my Republican colleagues on the House Armed Services Committee should focus on actually working for the American people, not just wasting their money.
If you’re as fed up as I am, will you sign my petition to demand that Republicans get back to governing? Strong public support is a really helpful part of gaining momentum right now as Democrats do all we can to push back. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/wR3icJ_JDkGw5I4Mhq1WQg2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/wR3icJ_JDkGw5I4Mhq1WQg2]
Thanks for reading.
More soon,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

And I think this makes it pretty darn clear that the “efficiency” and “waste” this Administration is obsessed with talking about isn’t actually about efficiency or waste. It’s about furthering their agenda, whether that’s giving billionaires huge tax breaks or making sure their guy looks good on camera. Put another way, it’s total bullshit. A makeup studio won’t strengthen our national security. It won’t protect our service members. It won’t make Americans safer. If Pete Hegseth wants to be camera-ready, he should do so on his own time, with his own personal funds (just like I do!) — and my Republican colleagues on the House Armed Services Committee should focus on actually working for the American people, not just wasting their money. If you’re as fed up as I am, will you sign my petition to demand that Republicans get back to governing? Strong public support is a really helpful part of gaining momentum right now as Democrats do all we can to push back. [] SIGN THE PETITION [] Thanks for reading. More soon, Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za8c10fnp1cvpgcfj8v2eue9qckt1961lmqst70g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziig0da33rslsrdk6jsb19r7k98l4hpama4imc8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs65rjl69tk0hobphjgq9ofg4ri53i25l8jouhvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z30n74ia0g54b6c1f18q4c3b1abh08dcou1a5ga8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuk6006qadp364ovc9frd7urt0aplfr792m37fqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4bp79l0n9mte4tfmi4g4uiqvjmujs82ofh9u3og_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn68conld6fb5t27uskmt3lkk5arfpe10b878jug_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqlupa360beaa1b978pfio1caa057rup29dqbj20_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7kvlsgp769j1ns96k13t47lbt3t72pju4sfkd0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zum8flgmlhvbkrhq88a3rcj5rqgk6oa2rs8uk1bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm2pj6cph2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh9logo0rdjpg2206b7m805p5ji4io6rkk02l4ug_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1cdgmeob6cpj649fg)

I have a few pressing matters to discuss with you sooner rather than later. ")
** 1\. ** Republicans have an extremely slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, Democrats will retake **FULL CONTROL** to blockade everything your President wants to do

** 2\. ** The DNC Chair **JUST** announced their "largest-ever investment" into Democrat state parties, giving them a major leg up

** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats raising **$37 MILLION** in the first few months of the year
When I ran President Trump's first campaign back in 2016, I never had the luxury to beat around the bush or mince words around headquarters. I had to be blunt and tell it like it is...

And that's why I'm going to say this in no uncertain terms:

I'm getting VERY worried about the Midterms. The Democrat Machine and Socialists like AOC are barnstorming red territory we have to win, we're getting crushed in fundraising and resources are drying up, and we have virtually no buffer in the House.

And if this email fails, we'll lose.

I see no other option than to ask our best supporters for some help. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to save our vulnerable House Majority before our **FINAL** May deadline?

Unfortunately, I know from the campaign trail that fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat. And with the President's legislative agenda depending largely on Republican control of the House, I knew I had to email you ASAP.

Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST ten or twenty dollars.

clean_body: When I ran President Trump’s first campaign back in 2016, I never had the luxury to beat around the bush or mince words around headquarters. I had to be blunt and tell it like it is... | | | | | | "Kellyanne Conway" Hey there, it's Kellyanne... "This might just be the single most important email I’ve ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to discuss with you sooner rather than later. " 1\. Republicans have an extremely slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, Democrats will retake FULL CONTROL to blockade everything your President wants to do 2\. The DNC Chair JUST announced their "largest-ever investment" into Democrat state parties, giving them a major leg up 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats raising $37 MILLION in the first few months of the year When I ran President Trump's first campaign back in 2016, I never had the luxury to beat around the bush or mince words around headquarters. I had to be blunt and tell it like it is... And that's why I'm going to say this in no uncertain terms: I'm getting VERY worried about the Midterms. The Democrat Machine and Socialists like AOC are barnstorming red territory we have to win, we're getting crushed in fundraising and resources are drying up, and we have virtually no buffer in the House. And if this email fails, we'll lose. I see no other option than to ask our best supporters for some help. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to save our vulnerable House Majority before our FINAL May deadline? Listen, it's never my first instinct to ask folks for money. I 'm betting you probably get emailed often enough already (probably too much)... Unfortunately, I know from the campaign trail that fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat. And with the President's legislative agenda depending largely on Republican control of the House, I knew I had to email you ASAP. Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST ten or twenty dollars. "If everyone reading this gives that much, we’ll catch up just in time before our May deadline. Can I count on you?" name: Young Kim [Congresswoman CA-40]
subject: You’re like a needle in a haystack, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Whew, Friend... You’re like a needle in a haystack!

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze3rd5hsnnkf2vhh6mfr9s8eqoj6k45n8fc0a93g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm6p32c9h2bs)Whew, Friend... You're like a needle in a haystack!
Seriously, I've reached out to over 75 of my top supporters, and so far, you're the ONLY one who's opened my message and given me the time of day.
And believe me, Friend, I appreciate it more than you know...
But as much as I'd LOVE to sit here and let you know how much your continued support means to me, there's unfortunately some news that I need to share with you:
After the Left's embarrassing loss in November, they went straight to the drawing board and started crafting a new strategy to ensure their historic loss never happens again.
And the first weakness they found in the GOP's Majority is in California...
They instantly realized they could still flip THREE CA GOP seats to BLUE even in their down year. So, they've zeroed in on California Republicans for the 2026 cycle, and of course, they made sure to put CA-40 at the very TOP of their list of seats to target.
Then, they convinced one of their top far-Left recruits to throw their hat in the ring against me, gave my opponent every resource they could need to bring me down, and had their elitist billionaires fill their campaign checking account with $1 MILLION![DEFEND CA-40
](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z99lo3aunlj20ue9k49ik89458agkm4bjnvqd6eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm6p32c9h2bs)I want to make this very clear, Friend: They're going above and beyond to defeat me this cycle because they can't STAND the fact that an immigrant woman from South Korea aligns with the Republican Party.
I know how it sounds, but I'm serious... They hate me because I don't fit the box they want to put me in. They've been huffing and puffing about my place in Congress since I first flipped my seat red back in 2020.
Now, they feel like they have the perfect opportunity to kick me to the curb for good...
And if I'm being honest, Friend, the only thing standing in their way is YOU!
Unlike my radical opponent, I run a complete grassroots campaign that relies on a dollar here and there to keep the lights on around my campaign HQ. So, I'm not kidding when I say my campaign will go as far as my top supporters like YOU can take me, Friend.
That's why, as much as I HATE to ask for your hard-earned money, I don't have any other choice but to come to you whenever my campaign is in a bind. And again, with a MILLION DOLLARS at my opponent's disposal, we're not in the best spot...
[So, I'm humbly asking for your help tonight to help me close the gap and gain some momentum in this fight to keep CA-40 and our House Majority RED.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5cte8pbubjhj2flvkgsndc7lr81eomqlt25dfd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm6p32c9h2bs)[DEFEND CA-40
](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7bdm00bsgi5tfi5ns9ept80ifiak9i47u790l68_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jm6p32c9h2bs)I'm already beyond thankful you took the time to open this message and read it all the way through.
Young Kim(Congresswoman CA-40)| | |
---

Anaheim, CA 92817

subject: Response Needed: 📈 100 Days of Winning Survey re: Action Needed
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

President Trump just delivered the most consequential first 100 days of an American presidency in a generation.

But while the media ignores his wins and the Left tries to rewrite the narrative, we want to hear directly from YOU.

[👉So please take our 100 Days of Winning Survey now and tell us what you think about the job President Trump has been doing and what you want to see next.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Here’s just a few accomplishments from President Trump’s first 100 days:

✅ Signed the Laken Riley Act to stop violent illegal criminals
✅ Cut DEI mandates and brought merit back to government
✅ Created over 340,000 jobs
✅ Lowered energy prices and unleashed American energy

The results are real — but the fight isn’t over.

We need your voice to help push back against the spin and help us pave the way forward as we continue fighting against the Left to help President Trump keep his promises to the American people.

[Take our 100 Days of Winning Survey now and make your voice heard.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Thank you,

Team Crenshaw

name: Young Kim [Congresswoman CA-40]
subject: You’re like a needle in a haystack, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Whew, Friend... You’re like a needle in a haystack!

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0thubbldhqatmeon2vf2f7c6lg1srl78g4rb9jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmeo31c1h2bs)Whew, Friend... You're like a needle in a haystack!
Seriously, I've reached out to over 75 of my top supporters, and so far, you're the ONLY one who's opened my message and given me the time of day.
And believe me, Friend, I appreciate it more than you know...
But as much as I'd LOVE to sit here and let you know how much your continued support means to me, there's unfortunately some news that I need to share with you:
After the Left's embarrassing loss in November, they went straight to the drawing board and started crafting a new strategy to ensure their historic loss never happens again.
And the first weakness they found in the GOP's Majority is in California...
They instantly realized they could still flip THREE CA GOP seats to BLUE even in their down year. So, they've zeroed in on California Republicans for the 2026 cycle, and of course, they made sure to put CA-40 at the very TOP of their list of seats to target.
Then, they convinced one of their top far-Left recruits to throw their hat in the ring against me, gave my opponent every resource they could need to bring me down, and had their elitist billionaires fill their campaign checking account with $1 MILLION![DEFEND CA-40
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjvojmduq52a07sev5rntc6ts3dohrfb532bqimo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmeo31c1h2bs)I want to make this very clear, Friend: They're going above and beyond to defeat me this cycle because they can't STAND the fact that an immigrant woman from South Korea aligns with the Republican Party.
I know how it sounds, but I'm serious... They hate me because I don't fit the box they want to put me in. They've been huffing and puffing about my place in Congress since I first flipped my seat red back in 2020.
Now, they feel like they have the perfect opportunity to kick me to the curb for good...
And if I'm being honest, Friend, the only thing standing in their way is YOU!
Unlike my radical opponent, I run a complete grassroots campaign that relies on a dollar here and there to keep the lights on around my campaign HQ. So, I'm not kidding when I say my campaign will go as far as my top supporters like YOU can take me, Friend.
That's why, as much as I HATE to ask for your hard-earned money, I don't have any other choice but to come to you whenever my campaign is in a bind. And again, with a MILLION DOLLARS at my opponent's disposal, we're not in the best spot...
[So, I'm humbly asking for your help tonight to help me close the gap and gain some momentum in this fight to keep CA-40 and our House Majority RED.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2quqs1af9pmfeo07bqts5m7oimk36po5vpphs50_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmeo31c1h2bs)[DEFEND CA-40
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1hrkaj14ui8hndbloi6rc000m754q7oep6cam7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmeo31c1h2bs)I'm already beyond thankful you took the time to open this message and read it all the way through.
Young Kim(Congresswoman CA-40)| | |

clean_body: Whew, Friend... You’re like a needle in a haystack! , Friend... You're like a needle in a haystack! Seriously, I've reached out to over 75 of my top supporters, and so far, you're the ONLY one who's opened my message and given me the time of day. And believe me, Friend, I appreciate it more than you know... But as much as I'd LOVE to sit here and let you know how much your continued support means to me, there's unfortunately some news that I need to share with you: After the Left's embarrassing loss in November, they went straight to the drawing board and started crafting a new strategy to ensure their historic loss never happens again. And the first weakness they found in the GOP's Majority is in California... They instantly realized they could still flip THREE CA GOP seats to BLUE even in their down year. So, they've zeroed in on California Republicans for the 2026 cycle, and of course, they made sure to put CA-40 at the very TOP of their list of seats to target. Then, they convinced one of their top far-Left recruits to throw their hat in the ring against me, gave my opponent every resource they could need to bring me down, and had their elitist billionaires fill their campaign checking account with $1 MILLIONI want to make this very clear, Friend: They're going above and beyond to defeat me this cycle because they can't STAND the fact that an immigrant woman from South Korea aligns with the Republican Party. I know how it sounds, but I'm serious... They hate me because I don't fit the box they want to put me in. They've been huffing and puffing about my place in Congress since I first flipped my seat red back in 2020. Now, they feel like they have the perfect opportunity to kick me to the curb for good... And if I'm being honest, Friend, the only thing standing in their way is YOU! Unlike my radical opponent, I run a complete grassroots campaign that relies on a dollar here and there to keep the lights on around my campaign HQ. So, I'm not kidding when I say my campaign will go as far as my top supporters like YOU can take me, Friend. That's why, as much as I HATE to ask for your hard-earned money, I don't have any other choice but to come to you whenever my campaign is in a bind. And again, with a MILLION DOLLARS at my opponent's disposal, we're not in the best spot... already beyond thankful you took the time to open this message and read it all the way through. | Hey Peter,
Medley Long's special election for State Rep in Beverly & Wenham is just over one week away on Tuesday, May 13th. Join us for THE FINAL PUSH!!!
🚪 Door Knocking & Phone Banking in District
Meet up at 8 West St, Beverly
* Saturday May 10 & Sunday May 11
* Morning shift meets at 10a, afternoon shift meets at 3p
* P.S. - the campaign's home base on Election Day will be here too. Come over to make GOTV calls any time on Election Day May 13th.

📞 Phone Banking at MassGOP HQ
MassGOP HQ, 85 Merrimac St, Boston
* Wednesday, May 7 | 4:00 - 7:00 PM
* Thursday, May 8 | 4:00 - 7:00 PM
* Monday, May 12 | 4:00 - 7:00 PM

Whether you're a seasoned volunteer or it's your first time getting out there, we need your help to get Medley over the top.
It's crunch time. JOIN US TO MAKE THE FINAL PUSH!!
See you out there, MassGOP Field Team

subject: Let’s send my friend Haley Stevens to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107132365/543694060/289657007?refcode=250505_MFC_Stevens_AllredSigned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzVlZDg0Yy1jZjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Kdq95gUxMXCaO2twwkjqfz87xfn_IwuhC3OAuaUd3E=) Folks, my friend Haley Stevens just launched her campaign for the U.S. Senate in Michigan, and her race could very well be the one that decides the Senate majority. I know Haley is exactly the kind of person we need fighting for working families in the Senate right now. **But the GOP is already coming after her as a top target for defeat, so she needs your early grassroots support to hit the ground running and win this crucial battleground seat.** [**Can I count on you to join me in supporting Haley’s campaign by chipping in $15 – split with Seth Moulton – today? Every dollar will go a long way toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107132366/543694061/698416938?refcode=250505_MFC_Stevens_AllredSigned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzVlZDg0Yy1jZjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Kdq95gUxMXCaO2twwkjqfz87xfn_IwuhC3OAuaUd3E=) Haley and I both worked in the Obama administration during the Great Recession. Haley served as the chief of staff to President Obama’s Auto Rescue initiative, and she put her entire heart into supporting folks in Michigan during a time that was filled with so much uncertainty and anxiety. In the end, she helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs and stabilize our economy. We both went on to serve in Congress, where I witnessed firsthand that nothing comes between Haley and getting things done for working families. She is resilient and tough, and you can count on her to roll up her sleeves and go to bat for you any day of the week. At a moment when Donald Trump and Elon Musk are unleashing chaos in our country while working families pay the price, we need Haley’s voice in the Senate more than ever. The Cook Political Report has already ranked Haley’s race a “Toss Up” – and after Republicans spent nearly $80 million to try and buy Michigan’s Senate seat last year, they’re ready to spend even more this time around to finally flip this battleground seat red. [**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $15 or more – split between Haley’s campaign and Seth Moulton – to elect Haley Stevens in Michigan, flip the Senate blue, and put a stop to Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s chaos?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107132367/543694062/698416938?refcode=250505_MFC_Stevens_AllredSigned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzVlZDg0Yy1jZjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Kdq95gUxMXCaO2twwkjqfz87xfn_IwuhC3OAuaUd3E=) Thank you so much, Colin Allred

clean_body: | = Folks, my friend Haley Stevens just launched her campaign for the U.S. Senate in Michigan, and her race could very well be the one that decides the Senate majority. I know Haley is exactly the kind of person we need fighting for working families in the Senate right now. But the GOP is already coming after her as a top target for defeat, so she needs your early grassroots support to hit the ground running and win this crucial battleground seat. = Haley and I both worked in the Obama administration during the Great Recession. Haley served as the chief of staff to President Obama’s Auto Rescue initiative, and she put her entire heart into supporting folks in Michigan during a time that was filled with so much uncertainty and anxiety. In the end, she helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs and stabilize our economy. We both went on to serve in Congress, where I witnessed firsthand that nothing comes between Haley and getting things done for working families. She is resilient and tough, and you can count on her to roll up her sleeves and go to bat for you any day of the week. At a moment when Donald Trump and Elon Musk are unleashing chaos in our country while working families pay the price, we need Haley’s voice in the Senate more than ever. The Cook Political Report has already ranked Haley’s race a “Toss Up” – and after Republicans spent nearly $80 million to try and buy Michigan’s Senate seat last year, they’re ready to spend even more this time around to finally flip this battleground seat red. = Thank you so much, Colin Allred [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f7d40634fdda43ebb5f740971a77019b&_e=NA9B3XjH2jIJ1DAHK1ES5jXExluL4UbTKcsMwlDvQyuyMw0lW13rQXradUEZ5lCONy4101otp89zVMHZqwfKw7u0WzCIiSwYKItUsP8Z1sS5DxsdFHq4JXPitGnGKdZcx1C8yp044m1-Ng946C7ebHLolUzf7gHx0mQfj9t012rNREMr4uqHivmQkoCLVh6xCxDu9J9w52uJn-sj98nLjsTaEHSaE5-TO0F7QuzZ-npj5EBJ6Z5xANhbMTxhtqeLfDTJCVYAXsEqHkSGWH4uF4UI2ajcmoddxIxOfYaFf8k2RcCp2fOtHQ_cHgQFMH7_EYRE2tp9kIeCB2T6kOt95T83o_mEpEJBP_lb8HjtI0upmLQVkZvlVOhCsuSlm70s7NCXOrCaik9Fk_EbH21igIEzdFGAfsYmufHh0jPwmExkyH352Hc55WW1BIE3i1xf)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f7d40634fdda43ebb5f740971a77019b&_e=NA9B3XjH2jIJ1DAHK1ES5jXExluL4UbTKcsMwlDvQyuyMw0lW13rQXradUEZ5lCONy4101otp89zVMHZqwfKw7u0WzCIiSwYKItUsP8Z1sS5DxsdFHq4JXPitGnGKdZcx1C8yp044m1-Ng946C7ebHLolUzf7gHx0mQfj9t012rNREMr4uqHivmQkoCLVh6xCxDu9J9w52uJn-sj98nLjsTaEHSaE5-TO0F7QuzZ-npj5EBJ6Z5xANhbMTxhtqeLfDTJCVYAXsEqHkSGWH4uF_r8bHMudj4iaiQCXmHDy7CXqc_VDAasg7E6xLU1HnLKRecI5LNpp0oPNDslbuiU56Mztn1tY3sFXIsrxXCZenigAV6FVjtI8VbK7xFYxJqs5qAQ3YoYKuJDajlLlmcsxmAApH-IJVNb1LjVI0zwKgMw7nnnpkB0vaMXf-jvOBhA)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f7d40634fdda43ebb5f740971a77019b&_e=NA9B3XjH2jIJ1DAHK1ES5jXExluL4UbTKcsMwlDvQyuyMw0lW13rQXradUEZ5lCONy4101otp89zVMHZqwfKw3le77msfUlGPHzyf4ZwGVJlQMSlcsTqamyXRCIY9iw6MlPxqz_x-le19rQ7GF1XItOfSGtInCDcdM5SVwca_ofHHUsH_R1qrYtoSZOPwod0sXCpQqLl6ZjZfW0l0G56GB0333yMeKg0KquHjaZuRcNNX6db7R57wXn5_djgWvThePM7UmaD959t7abhAYw2pnn2t1lBYmNhGnE6lBNnKvkGmG05sW4-4cHbalk84vC4toryzPnwMIT7SKEc-0EjILipjOLgvBET79-nDgwpgYzWzSbYss8o3uw-fhsCm9d4yhp6sCuiY6h9wqZyPhvEsyvtYq-jFqPX1mxV3ibSoqs%3D)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f7d40634fdda43ebb5f740971a77019b&_e=NA9B3XjH2jIJ1DAHK1ES5jXExluL4UbTKcsMwlDvQyuyMw0lW13rQXradUEZ5lCONy4101otp89zVMHZqwfKw7u0WzCIiSwYKItUsP8Z1sS5DxsdFHq4JXPitGnGKdZcx1C8yp044m1-Ng946C7ebHLolUzf7gHx0mQfj9t012rNREMr4uqHivmQkoCLVh6xCxDu9J9w52uJn-sj98nLjsTaEHSaE5-TO0F7QuzZ-npj5EBJ6Z5xANhbMTxhtqeLfDTJCVYAXsEqHkSGWH4uFyAPqI9ZtHfDEDpFSPbjB164D7ykjmCOj-YC0CqqRJkx0NuYdcapiZL4mCRNpOMhXheo9_bWVvgtneaW4UwB6OLZ_A-ruDvy7D034jYnvbNhLXYbbz9_WsOB_QrD2cb_-1MZL1djk-CgZ7jTN_RpjMpnex-S8Vq6DzBeib9GTVWl)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f7d40634fdda43ebb5f740971a77019b&_e=NA9B3XjH2jIJ1DAHK1ES5jXExluL4UbTKcsMwlDvQyuyMw0lW13rQXradUEZ5lCONy4101otp89zVMHZqwfKw7u0WzCIiSwYKItUsP8Z1sS5DxsdFHq4JXPitGnGKdZcx1C8yp044m1-Ng946C7ebHLolUzf7gHx0mQfj9t012rNREMr4uqHivmQkoCLVh6xCxDu9J9w52uJn-sj98nLjsTaEHSaE5-TO0F7QuzZ-npj5EBJ6Z5xANhbMTxhtqeLfDTJCVYAXsEqHkSGWH4uFz8SoWF4tbwPty1UR68dSX3XoLHEkLYgJfXmGSrY34P_IomkETfl7Uls0OkRKSt5c4wC-u25WtlBU72be0DS8svJQifjm_fzVNDmYezA6mj6Bxe2XbaFOAJOIrPk03nnQnCRunbEIPoK578D4_fu1SVJzlBZ4VIhtiwu-RHoy7zJ)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f7d40634fdda43ebb5f740971a77019b&_e=NA9B3XjH2jIJ1DAHK1ES5jXExluL4UbTKcsMwlDvQyuyMw0lW13rQXradUEZ5lCONy4101otp89zVMHZqwfKw7u0WzCIiSwYKItUsP8Z1sS5DxsdFHq4JXPitGnGKdZcx1C8yp044m1-Ng946C7ebHLolUzf7gHx0mQfj9t012rNREMr4uqHivmQkoCLVh6xCxDu9J9w52uJn-sj98nLjsTaEHSaE5-TO0F7QuzZ-npj5EBJ6Z5xANhbMTxhtqeLfDTJCVYAXsEqHkSGWH4uF6xLYF4WnUJPxck55tTOKXiSYS-bailaufXJRU9EFLXpgzgiOTcr2KXzuCAkGkjxbK5NxWKwXFQuRJzSaUKUueuHBG_83Vs9pYCPjyExAFwwYamPkYspXwi8WD0CCRnr2MtV9RYqjW_z4KsrqkzGvrnTf1JzBcyvrd4VRPWKhhtH)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
Our next deadline is nearly here. We're missing the resources to keep going, and I thought reaching out to you might help.
I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cbdd661eb1e442d1aac41f76e3b84a77&_e=ORW_E5c1-ZY396VqgC2ZjCoCSrH1cBFp1cuefYhGuM-vf5pWgFnp2hKO9cAWYPtYt6FMXXfOvp-jbtaIdJUfMZuSYH45z_7WM-oILjt-G2RRbPfZN58Q1DAdM1fVsegMpaet9oIBO32qZ_jXI3AovGLt9GjPVB3xOVd1zZT2OAl3BcpN_KuWhBHyrcZk8UQiGvF3QOWzFF-ccDejSmjCfiv9XxRSLt4EOO1pUZGp8U8tub2DLG1PU6dqSgSGU9rFpRsWrS_bKS44Gyyo1XxgVUwSbXO4I3XLtcOfRnZ8nlCMwxMCy_bP0kRTLVYZe2us2tvNDDpSymtHhsYY8roFwDDhNdMXCBkIONjimaYrwS326Xzg6pV3TrmYQRCnVTnAab6KD1_sBXCMJv9d2LYpcF1iPLAkWzGFjg6kh9oaPPupc74777NfyJC5g8abwp35emzuaTxWiqAqakJ1yzyNWkGFUjyp1udAmYMGce34DIKODnasIFDhl2D5wbyqZxcE4b5G_TUPbL0mk_2nqQcOgIH6AOM6TZaeIeKtfPRvqN8zG5r17wKjHMHYk-i2xwdWrfV6EYGWOSCHXv47sdpUVg%3D%3D)
---

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cbdd661eb1e442d1aac41f76e3b84a77&_e=ORW_E5c1-ZY396VqgC2ZjCoCSrH1cBFp1cuefYhGuM-vf5pWgFnp2hKO9cAWYPtYt6FMXXfOvp-jbtaIdJUfMZuSYH45z_7WM-oILjt-G2RRbPfZN58Q1DAdM1fVsegMpaet9oIBO32qZ_jXI3AovJ0EqHREXn_qxrFxo80eGA3zDh5Vg-FAmBC3mWIT_spwGGBVcmjMGk5wXsJHNvxjBi5y4HCPQSmNRwZ6NmH0KuP51Xh4O_gYhuzt6VwAm1tdHGTtHAS_QrEfZRDxJ_Tl4gBtO2RLSh9l7C6yp9n2unfLewZO1LjXwUvWXOKSrsRJrwLVHdrPpbOJ_up0-rG39EBmSouJNML9X28_qMN_A9R_6yZJXfROfANtdQv6VkPHCrFLb0PJuskUxcxK8XJGLfLGevm8XgA7XU51JtC4kTO2fragLNYfe0zBtHMYf9rxyBJ5C3HOn1LAVkhuLBHRSuChWYeDI-tXto6jEmBAwS6qDgP_6HITBGf4YmeY7EOmbUJOkZrcRlBHJGBJKa-uIo3Jt0J9K-QGlxY81vkey58%3D)
After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business.

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cbdd661eb1e442d1aac41f76e3b84a77&_e=ORW_E5c1-ZY396VqgC2ZjCoCSrH1cBFp1cuefYhGuM-vf5pWgFnp2hKO9cAWYPtYt6FMXXfOvp-jbtaIdJUfMZuSYH45z_7WM-oILjt-G2RRbPfZN58Q1DAdM1fVsegMpaet9oIBO32qZ_jXI3AovJ0EqHREXn_qxrFxo80eGA3zDh5Vg-FAmBC3mWIT_spwZ2dH8B6c0mQLpm0_AWa1iV_elcTMHtTBdFQqUCImpUB8YNSZFfb48qyoUIuFySpqhg56YFZU8WHKYotTMIep-Z4cv5uFq8IBjriTjZc_v6oActwoBRR-xuvAz4uYdEzdN1RTv6fsYKfvIuxKsm-q0GoegHCOULdbSPMZiEXAq-AQav_GDCsf7H4buGn570BrgP7A-YsPIjPW87TEMvyDcFqSKsTFTIdD91XJdx0vNSMcqeipnpYcMO--rAchn5g1g0SPvKeiau_e4u6zxf53LKU3Aem1uhVkDBWXr_FA71Gcoyzs4X8N0dCqcWBt0CmcbfNm6MGQHt-CA7dWE83TO226gMkT3Zo4Q09znkenE1I%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office.****
**
Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won 't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cbdd661eb1e442d1aac41f76e3b84a77&_e=ORW_E5c1-ZY396VqgC2ZjCoCSrH1cBFp1cuefYhGuM-vf5pWgFnp2hKO9cAWYPtYt6FMXXfOvp-jbtaIdJUfMZuSYH45z_7WM-oILjt-G2RRbPfZN58Q1DAdM1fVsegMpaet9oIBO32qZ_jXI3AovGLt9GjPVB3xOVd1zZT2OAl3BcpN_KuWhBHyrcZk8UQi5T14A9aUmruv2Nnm9AdOP4aW2sMGZ1ladwSeUIfucZulpAgZhH4hd069-UNFoMZm97Q7SOkpZKzfMt-bYd_d9XZFuOUHUAE5S_mKGj0QLsOtKx75d89hmpTqH3O_2MdR3-8FU2FBleuTEUB5sQGmWu1wBZkVSWtczHHIfzzc4_rh6d14PFDo0enUDt0NWtPJF6XoHKPEZ60pSMSNKvsPY7jEfpcEHnHbiQwYQ4ukkGKf2xyM_zHwLlUh2gqDh9Lib5gVM9rUe9ChumZRCtDJYMlCHNM4tmNSybtUyxYvsnqpLFBCYE6vSjfNouNEFUWjPteAh_nIRRbeqrmvAp0TGy2URtrp7FtfhXjbebuTgW3Tdtmk2pj7p3OreBMHZ0Ltqted4XSONjkuwiHb6ytFqA%3D%3D)**

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

clean_body: Our next deadline is nearly here. We're missing the resources to keep going, and I thought reaching out to you might help. I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda! | Patriot, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office. Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won 't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you, and God Bless, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znt6acvc7pf210th2ffa2jorf340ou4d075l3clg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs)
---

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

**[Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh50u5mk4blf15e22qujfqjl6b61vqoh2lpv9808_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.
In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zai19ao7f2l3vhpjgs0l0pvua1m0llg6ie31562g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.")**

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | | [Chip In NOW!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv3c9fdd4oivhqvfvnum73u8m3a605kuuuacs3a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs "Chip In NOW!")
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,

Ryan Zinke
---
| |
---

name: Young Kim [Congresswoman CA-40]
subject: You’re like a needle in a haystack, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Whew, Friend... You’re like a needle in a haystack!

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbcj9a8t3t1gr37vi7cki0vka2u9clc368bdlc1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs)Whew, Friend... You're like a needle in a haystack!
Seriously, I've reached out to over 75 of my top supporters, and so far, you're the ONLY one who's opened my message and given me the time of day.
And believe me, Friend, I appreciate it more than you know...
But as much as I'd LOVE to sit here and let you know how much your continued support means to me, there's unfortunately some news that I need to share with you:
After the Left's embarrassing loss in November, they went straight to the drawing board and started crafting a new strategy to ensure their historic loss never happens again.
And the first weakness they found in the GOP's Majority is in California...
They instantly realized they could still flip THREE CA GOP seats to BLUE even in their down year. So, they've zeroed in on California Republicans for the 2026 cycle, and of course, they made sure to put CA-40 at the very TOP of their list of seats to target.
Then, they convinced one of their top far-Left recruits to throw their hat in the ring against me, gave my opponent every resource they could need to bring me down, and had their elitist billionaires fill their campaign checking account with $1 MILLION![DEFEND CA-40
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpdh5qbl4pcj88lkddof0jp402e03jh03op96hv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs)I want to make this very clear, Friend: They're going above and beyond to defeat me this cycle because they can't STAND the fact that an immigrant woman from South Korea aligns with the Republican Party.
I know how it sounds, but I'm serious... They hate me because I don't fit the box they want to put me in. They've been huffing and puffing about my place in Congress since I first flipped my seat red back in 2020.
Now, they feel like they have the perfect opportunity to kick me to the curb for good...
And if I'm being honest, Friend, the only thing standing in their way is YOU!
Unlike my radical opponent, I run a complete grassroots campaign that relies on a dollar here and there to keep the lights on around my campaign HQ. So, I'm not kidding when I say my campaign will go as far as my top supporters like YOU can take me, Friend.
That's why, as much as I HATE to ask for your hard-earned money, I don't have any other choice but to come to you whenever my campaign is in a bind. And again, with a MILLION DOLLARS at my opponent's disposal, we're not in the best spot...
[So, I'm humbly asking for your help tonight to help me close the gap and gain some momentum in this fight to keep CA-40 and our House Majority RED.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z76q7anpn24qvbh9gbhr4ks6k2lr4mhup8v3kle8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs)[DEFEND CA-40
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zanuo18k3ke3vfi5hnsep8qmofcem81trnlm5uo0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs)I'm already beyond thankful you took the time to open this message and read it all the way through.
Young Kim(Congresswoman CA-40)| | |
---

---

P.O. Box 17490
Anaheim, CA 92817

[Privacy Policy](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr6i71qqjvml6c50u2patnv2gfo4l4vr92q4m768_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c5jmep76cth2bs)

body:

# Monday, May 5, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1961, Alan Shepard became the first American to travel into space, launching aboard _Freedom 7_ in a Mercury-Redstone rocket. Shepard's calm, clear radio transmissions (_" Let's light this candle"_) made him an instant American hero. Watch [a short NASA documentary](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskL1q7DAUhJ9G6tbo395CxYXLss0mpEopJOvYVpClxT5rx28fnGcITDUDH8P3-XAPn3Iq45ufweJQXYF9zYAIixtrjlBinQEnKKng9My-AHonmNAXdsZFn_LhlCuAbk7rmspIox0ABEgKlrfKKKM4M3SyVx77YDrgg-IQe8k7bXTwRkURWGs0TfYkM800N1oz3egAvGu7q_dskKHTRDGICevSfNXzEAz5qBssTV9nmu2E-FyJ_EfEjYjbvu_NUV_4CnDuZ-Oxn4i8bUT-9-_378t47_Plgy42PveUc1pNSxQbZ5_yLxL_zMlmxU8AAAD__2lReuk). A new study confirms what every treadmill user already knows: [time stretches at the gym](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskD2OrDAQhE9jMpAxtmECBy8hm5duaDXQhl75B9meQXP7FXuGlSosVX36vp72CeQp7v8hoKku2YhX8VgrZrsnv2HcUsB6YKRYj9NDxApWcKFafsduQP5jpY1YbaBSKO7NZhyiwKFB049SSy17rpvDDGrTsDwmtUqh3cjdKGHs9Qha6IkvsiFzL3PFVa-V4qpTC_bTOD0AuBuWSTHJcaOacvedbiB0_pPemLs1hcabo9azsOEfEzMT83Vd3ZnOl4cccD0g0lruIhNzWQnjikzMoKVWUvKJiblSwDakN5a2-HRhbl3K7fEKEAsTc5PNdl7kPRU9Msn3AOR_n-ufqXsb8RMAAP__oNWIVw). But it's not just boredom--researchers think your brain and body might actually be changing how you perceive time mid-workout. Learn more in _Science_. Today's edition is brought to you by one of our favorite sponsors: [World Concern](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskc-K2zAQxp9GvsXIsuQkBx9Cg9hDd6HQ3W1PQpHGyhT9ceVJQt6-OAT6Ags6_X7om_mYz1fzajFiDm82wUhTMRluSwQiqCaU6CH7koDOkDHTeY42A1kjuFAbvj7jLca7kSYDmYTLgjk0fpwABPQNjN1WDnKQHR-a8zjYvRB7wSVI53a-69wkwU3d5PYnJSw0OK7JXHHVDUpx1aoTdLvtbm8tn_rTTjHJwSOV2v4p60IwxXu5Qm1dSU0cz0TzwvoDE5oJHfCKObS3UqN3JTuouS01MKFnG4AJrd_ffny8HD5ejpr1-kLJOJtmiyGz_vj--e2gv__--UsoJoZVLuVSHbD--Bz6xAk8XhLrj5AsxickqCuy7u8FFyQs-SlcyQSZ_qdsHt82j-JSqKaOfr5hjLgMWyZ5WO2jHn3Zfa6j-BcAAP__6xesCg).**** This Christian humanitarian organization is delivering critical aid to families in Somalia, where a devastating humanitarian crisis is unfolding.

|

## Trump Budgets for 'Golden Dome' for America
President Donald Trump’s 2026 budget proposal includes plans to develop a [_Golden Dome_ missile defense system](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskL3OqzAMQJ8GtqAQCKFDhruw9a53jELtgK_yg5K0qG__ifYVPsnjke1z_t3N3ZKnuP21AXV1yUQ8i8daMZstecAIKWDdMVKs--FtxGqN4EIyfo0BS_5tRhOxmkClUNxa0A5R4NCi7tU4jdPY86nd9Qg9Kgnz6gBgUrOUnK-K90oON9WvQ0v62swll_0kJZedXLGf1XyzlrthnWUzcgSqKXf_0_UQOv9OL8zdI4XW673WozTDn0YsjVjO8-wqBSzJUckW_UU1Yqn5GY7C1idsWNnlxCg-_BOwsC_IKJaDMgL7NmBXBOZSZjZgpodlH1WPrOyEHhqxtFnDcZL3VCbVjHwLlj4H2_prXV9a_AQAAP__txeV0g) modeled after Israel’s Iron Dome, which intercepts incoming missiles in the air. The proposed shield would be part of a [$113 billion boost to defense spending](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskLGO6yAQRb8GOkeAATsFxWvc5bVbIgKDzWoMlj2bKH-_crbYH1hpurk6uud-3PwtFCx1_h9WcJSbr_A8EIhg93PDBDW1FWiBWiotG4YKFLwSynTiPJ9CwZfXvgL5tRxHqTNPLgMo6Dk4OWirrZbC8sX1SWZzzdIKeY_DAHEwQcVgtNQ5jjby4k6yMMJIa4wwF3MHOQ7jNQSR-_tomBaQCrX98tnOQpDx1R6wX2JbObqFaDtY_4-piamJFlgK4vljatoalvhiakqQoR7A1GTUKKxUHe1f69b96Hanb_c2Qeh-s3x3aXsWxHLYgWkxr6G80Zz-bLeHU98BAAD__4N5h7I). Democratic lawmakers are calling for a review of [Elon Musk’s involvement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskDFuxCAQRU-DOyw8BtspKNK427QpEWvGNtkBVsCutbePnEg5QaSp5ktf77_Pi7lYTz5uHzagrmsyEY9CWCtmsyVyGF0KWHeMPtb9TjZitQYEKC7OM856ehlpIlYTfCk-bo3TKyJg36DuRjnIQXZiaHbdq6EXKzqpYJhEDwBWTiOMgLCOK0Lj9dkslFDdoJRQrbpiN43Tm7Vi7a-TYlKg8zXl9iudQLjSKz0xt0sKDem91nth_TuDmcF8HEeb8VExlzM_PymTYzA_CoPZYUhLttUvnOwR7A1z4Ysl4hmfHg8eHuVWeE6E_FcFP13wv_Edg7nJ2t0PT-TLMDIptmA9_dDUf9P51PAdAAD__2dsjxI) in the proposed project, given the likelihood that Musk’s SpaceX would win the bid on producing the system. Critics question the feasibility of replicating Israel’s system on the U.S. scale, but the administration claims it’s a necessary step toward national security.
## Bombing Thwarted at Lady Gaga's Brazil Show
Brazilian police say they thwarted a [planned bomb attack targeting Lady Gaga's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskMFuhSAURL8GdzWIoLhg0Y27122X5AJXpUGwevPM69c39BuazGKSSU5m5vNhHxBTzOsH7GhoKTbjfSUkwtOuJQXMoexIG-aYaTsSZCSwggv1xqtsgJheVtqMZPd4XTGvTTALosC-QdONcpCD7PjQbMb3gwOYvPaa6yC9g0l3ArlcAN3i-yaaSuaKq25QiqtWOez0qCcAvvROKyY5hkjlbL9KLYRLepUnnq0ve5PMRnRcrH9nYmZivu-7dc7XjIm5DmNihpOiT1itF3w61fH9k7E0pwnHHVOK1zAyydcdYvqj0r_d8jTiNwAA__-7G30e) free concert at Rio de Janeiro's Copacabana beach on Saturday, where more than two million fans gathered. Authorities [arrested two suspects](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskDHvpCAQxT-NdhhEQS0ortlur72SDDIiGxwMsmv221-47vp_Ms3MvLz83vvzNE8IMZD_DQfqsiVDeF8RS8FsfIoOyaUDy44UqOxnBMICRnAhGa9jHIT4NaMhLOYI1xXIt05viAKHFnU_jWpUY89Vu2tEtU6DnDanFo7bpnqc7GKdHdUygx3aoKszl1z2SkouO2mxn6d5AeDbYGfZjBxdKCl3r1SBcIvf9MHcreloo95LOa9m-NWIRyMe9313ZNeaqP4b8TjTydZ3LO-M_2-siuopAhE6ZtNhA3kWwX2ZBw8sh8QcshdQwJxYXgkEr9xt1u68Q4zhUlMzcn9AiP94yo8V-tHibwAAAP__rW2SSg)--a man in Rio Grande do Sul and a teenager in Rio--accused of planning to use improvised explosives to gain notoriety on social media. Police indicated the plan was orchestrated by a large extremist network, which was "virtually recruiting participants to carry out attacks" with IEDs and [Molotov cocktails](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskLGu5CAMRb-GdB4RAkmmoNgm3dt2S8QMDmFFcATWG-XvV7xvWMlyY-vo3Pvny335lFOJv_2JlndyBT8tIzNWFykHLIFO5ANLKnxc2Rdk75RUBmQfF3zKt9OuILsztZZKHILdERVOA9px0bOe9Sjn4bCTUtpjWJegZlzkpOd5HZ_Tsirz3PcpDMl2sjTSjLMx0jzMC8d1WZ_ey316rUZoiSEx1cdf6kK455u-sT7edA7ZHsxXE9MvoTahtnJf1LifhNo6WKhN_iwt1PahmgP0uEJt2Ycboo--QcDqS8QAuy8NrkzMGIAJXnS-4MAKCkY4U86JCjSuVCLURPCm8sbK8KarI4dqw_Xpb21ehJbx9Cn_ePJ_K_rbqn8BAAD___ndl0Q). Gaga's team said they were unaware of the threat until after the show, which went on with tight security including 5,000 officers, drones, and facial recognition tech.
## Cardinal's Viral Video Shakes Up Papal Race
With the papal conclave set to begin Wednesday, two prominent figures have emerged: Italian Cardinal Pietro Parolin, the Vatican's Secretary of State, and Filipino Cardinal Luis Antonio Tagle, who went viral on TikTok for singing John Lennon's _Imagine._ [See the video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskL1urDAUhJ_GdBcZ_2C2cHGl1XabKlFK62AfwJGxCZwF8fYReYZIU81In0bf59M9IaaYxzeY0dJQXMZjS0iEqxtLCphDmZEmzDHTtCTISOAEF_ofv-ICxHQ65TKSm-O2xTxWwQ6IAmWFtjGqVa1qeFtNtuGyAQMdDMYr44NGbYQIQWhuuPR9Fe1F5prrptWa61r32HSmuwHwQfadZopjiFTW-qtch3BIZ9lxrX2Zq2QnomVj8j8TDyYex3HUZ3nRq8drvxogPzH52Jm8i_28tcv79_3DV6sNyxFTiltrmOLjDDH9IunPnOxW_AQAAP__ZHR7AQ). The upcoming papal election has drawn heavy [interest on prediction markets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskD3OpDAMhk8DHciYhGGKFNvQzbZbRiEx4FVIUPAOmtuvmDN8kqvH0vv352VfjiOn9bfbyciSbaLrjCRCxa45Bkoh7yQbJU6yHdElEmcRUDdwnw2O48cqm0jszufJaa2DWYiQ-ppM91CDGlQHQ72Z_klqRJwhKOo8AMKIelEeUXmaSdVsbmXQoLtBa9CtnqkbH-PTOVj6edSVAgosubR_8x2IlvjJbyqtz3sdzSZynFX_q8Kpwum6rjbN_m50_2-SSwwVTkc-qFmKS57PCqeZRDitzRcf-fgXXWH5ND4nH92bmuKTQ1DDqOpiwnFxjHwOj0rBujuOX3f5sfneBv8HAAD__6SfiyY) like Kalshi, a U.S.-based exchange regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, where over $4 million has been wagered on potential successors--Parolin and Tagle among the favorites. clean_body: President Donald Trump’s 2026 budget proposal includes plans to develop a modeled after Israel’s Iron Dome, which intercepts incoming missiles in the air. | | | | | | Monday, May 5, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1961, Alan Shepard became the first American to travel into space, launching aboard Freedom 7 in a Mercury-Redstone rocket. Shepard's calm, clear radio transmissions (" Let's light this candle") made him an instant American hero. Watch . A new study confirms what every treadmill user already knows: . But it's not just boredom--researchers think your brain and body might actually be changing how you perceive time mid-workout. Learn more in Science. Today's edition is brought to you by one of our favorite sponsors: .** This Christian humanitarian organization is delivering critical aid to families in Somalia, where a devastating humanitarian crisis is unfolding. | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Trump Budgets for 'Golden Dome' for America President Donald Trump’s 2026 budget proposal includes plans to develop a modeled after Israel’s Iron Dome, which intercepts incoming missiles in the air. The proposed shield would be part of a . Democratic lawmakers are calling for a review of in the proposed project, given the likelihood that Musk’s SpaceX would win the bid on producing the system. Critics question the feasibility of replicating Israel’s system on the U.S. scale, but the administration claims it’s a necessary step toward national security. Bombing Thwarted at Lady Gaga's Brazil Show Brazilian police say they thwarted a free concert at Rio de Janeiro's Copacabana beach on Saturday, where more than two million fans gathered. Authorities man in Rio Grande do Sul and a teenager in Rio--accused of planning to use improvised explosives to gain notoriety on social media. Police indicated the plan was orchestrated by a large extremist network, which was "virtually recruiting participants to carry out attacks" with IEDs and . Gaga's team said they were unaware of the threat until after the show, which went on with tight security including 5,000 officers, drones, and facial recognition tech. Cardinal's Viral Video Shakes Up Papal Race With the papal conclave set to begin Wednesday, two prominent figures have emerged: Italian Cardinal Pietro Parolin, the Vatican's Secretary of State, and Filipino Cardinal Luis Antonio Tagle, who went viral on TikTok for singing John Lennon's Imagine. . While some conservative groups express concern over Tagle's progressive image and the implications of the song's lyrics, many younger Catholics have and the trending hashtag #TagleCore. The upcoming papal election has drawn heavy like Kalshi, a U.S.-based exchange regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, where over $4 million has been wagered on potential successors--Parolin and Tagle among the favorites. () ➤Former National Security Advisor Mike Waltz's firing last week was partly due to his coordination with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu to destroy Iran's nuclear arsenal through military force, according to senior Trump officials. () ➤ Texas Gov. Greg Abbott on Saturday signed the nation's largest school voucher law, opening up $1 billion in public funds over two years to allow all 5.3 million K-12 students to use state money for private education. () ➤ A study by the Media Research Center concluded that 92% of media coverage of President Trump's first 100 days in office was negative. () ➤ Texas residents voted on Saturday to make Elon Musk's SpaceX headquarters its own official city, named Starbase, with the majority of the eligible voters being SpaceX employees. () | Flying together with our sponsor Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. And now, children are wasting away from malnutrition, crying themselves to sleep from the sharp hunger pains in their bellies... The situation in Somalia is desperate. People are dying. You might not have known that. There are no news crews there. Yet, it’s one of the largest humanitarian crises in the world today. Millions are at risk of starvation, as the fragile nation teeters on the brink of another famine.... Christian humanitarian organization World Concern is present in Somalia and in the hardest-hit areas around the globe , providing urgently needed food, water, and emergency supplies to families in need. . | ➤Los Angeles Dodgers star pitcher Roki Sasaki, who was signed from Japan this offseason, recorded his first career MLB win over the weekend. () ➤Four-time Grand Slam winner Naomi Osaka won her first WTA title since becoming a mother in July of 2023. name: A Quick Poll: (DOTL)
subject: re: Elon Musk buying MSNBC?!?!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Only a few hours left to submit

|
---
**Peter you are receiving this message because you have not completed our poll about Elon Musk’s proposed buyout of MSNBC!**

**Here’s the problem, Peter:** Trump gave Musk unrestricted access to Americans' private data and the power to cut critical federal programs like Social Security.

If Elon Musk buys MSNBC, he could build a right-wing media monopoly – **giving him control of both the federal government and the media.**

name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump is defunding NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
My kids, just like people my own age, have woken up excited to see their favorite PBS characters.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107135024/543702364/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGEyMDUzNy1kNDI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY3v6Y00qrKRatIsrM-tJu1M7fuRQ9cfkei6F20us3s=&emci=8e64b768-c329-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=48a20537-d429-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Late last week, Trump signed an executive order that illegally cuts off federal funding for NPR and PBS. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107135025/543702365/-1197072038?refcode=2025-05-05-pbs&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=48a20537-d429-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGEyMDUzNy1kNDI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY3v6Y00qrKRatIsrM-tJu1M7fuRQ9cfkei6F20us3s=) NPR and PBS are non-profit, public news sources that provide free and unbiased reporting, educational and arts programming, and critical emergency broadcasting. In many rural areas, as local newspapers have closed, public radio has become the only reliable source of local news and information and all this stands to be defunded by Trump. So many of us know Mr. Rogers' kind smile and guiding words. His legacy was possible because of PBS. My kids, just like people my own age, have woken up excited to see their favorite PBS characters. **PBS, like NPR's headlines and voices, are a part of Americans' lives. They are there because they are trusted. They are relied on.** **Choosing to dismantle this legacy is a shameful, shortsighted betrayal of the public good.** It's clear that Trump and Musk will go after any institution that won't fall in line with their out-of-touch vision, and they're banking on Republicans standing by while they continue their rampage. I will not sit by while Trump further erodes our institutions and programs that so many rely on, and I will do everything I can to ensure that PBS and NPR stay fully funded. clean_body: My kids, just like people my own age, have woken up excited to see their favorite PBS characters. | | | | Late last week, Trump signed an executive order that illegally cuts off federal funding for NPR and PBS. = NPR and PBS are non-profit, public news sources that provide free and unbiased reporting, educational and arts programming, and critical emergency broadcasting. In many rural areas, as local newspapers have closed, public radio has become the only reliable source of local news and information and all this stands to be defunded by Trump. So many of us know Mr. Rogers' kind smile and guiding words. His legacy was possible because of PBS. My kids, just like people my own age, have woken up excited to see their favorite PBS characters. PBS, like NPR's headlines and voices, are a part of Americans' lives. They are there because they are trusted. They are relied on. Choosing to dismantle this legacy is a shameful, shortsighted betrayal of the public good. It's clear that Trump and Musk will go after any institution that won't fall in line with their out-of-touch vision, and they're banking on Republicans standing by while they continue their rampage. I will not sit by while Trump further erodes our institutions and programs that so many rely on, and I will do everything I can to ensure that PBS and NPR stay fully funded.
