subject: FWD: Trump’s Dictator-Style Parade…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re waiting for you to take action!
| | Social Security is on the chopping block,
Medicare is under ATTACK,
And DOGE is dismantling our government as we speak...

__But the Army just CONFIRMED Trump’s nearly $100 MILLION parade:__

**_“Nearly 7,000 troops, tanks and parachute jumps: Army confirms military parade coinciding with Trump's birthday”_**

**_So why are we still waiting on top Democrats (like you!) to sign our EMERGENCY petition demanding Congress CANCEL this self-righteous, North Korea-style military parade!?_**

[**Please take action, friend: Sign on to tell Congress to CANCEL Trump’s DISGUSTING, waste of taxpayer dollars, Military Parade before midnight TONIGHT! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250505_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO TELL CONGRESS: CANCEL TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250505_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-)
---
— The Voter Protection Project
**\- - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - -**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250505_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-)
_Trump’s priorities are CRYSTAL clear, folks:_

**Funding Social Security, Medicare & the Department of Education?** NOPE! ❌
**Funding a $92 MILLION parade to boost his own ego?** No problem! ✅

But Trump is NOT a dictator, and we are NOT his subjects.
We’re FIGHTING BACK, team:

[**10,000 URGENT SIGNATURES NEEDED: Cancel Trump’s DISGUSTING, wasteful taxpayer-funded, Military Parade ASAP! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250505_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-)
[ADD YOUR NAME TO TELL CONGRESS: CANCEL TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250505_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-)
---
If Trump can find the funds to host a self-righteous, North Korea-style military parade, he can find the funds to save Social Security. __It’s that simple.__

**_But Trump wants us to sit back and do _NOTHING_ while he wastes MILLIONS of dollars to praise himself, spending taxpayer dollars that could be used on essential programs like Medicare and Social Security!_**

[**That’s why we urgently need your support. Sign on to our emergency petition IMMEDIATELY to call on Congress to CANCEL Trump’s Birthday Military Parade! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250505_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-)
[ADD YOUR NAME TO TELL CONGRESS: CANCEL TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250505_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-)
---
This is abhorrent.

Thank you for taking action,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19755%2E878179%2EwO80F-)

name: Jeff Harris
subject: Are you ready to lead?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Tired of the division, incompetence and corruption coming out of Republican leadership in Washington D.C. and the Statehouse? Tired of bad policies that hurt people, communities and our collective future? Tired of Republican leaders that care more about pushing their far-right wing ideology than solving problems? Then, join us in building the bench of future Democratic leaders across this state by [applying to be a part of the Emerging Leaders Project’s 2025-2026 class](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107145504/543739519/1184560282?refcode=250505elp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAzMjA4NS1mMDI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grtnxuohKIrMczr8xupvHq42mCCP8hSQ8M_jbyUnLa4=&emci=8628e74f-e629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ec032085-f029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) or recommending someone to the program. **Each year the Emerging Leaders Project selects up to 40 Hoosiers, between 21 and 40 years old, to participate in this free, year-long training program.** Those selected attend a series of conferences in Indianapolis that cover all aspects of running for office, public policy, and party building. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107145505/543739520/1184560282?refcode=250505elp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAzMjA4NS1mMDI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grtnxuohKIrMczr8xupvHq42mCCP8hSQ8M_jbyUnLa4=&emci=8628e74f-e629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ec032085-f029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) Now accepting applications for its 12th class, the Emerging Leaders Project has helped hundreds of young Democrats become more active in the party and run for office. From state legislators to countywide elected officials, municipal officeholders and Democratic Party leaders at the local and district levels, the Emerging Leaders Project has an impressive track record of success. [See our list of Alumni here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107145506/543739521/99084163?refcode=250505elp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAzMjA4NS1mMDI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grtnxuohKIrMczr8xupvHq42mCCP8hSQ8M_jbyUnLa4=&emci=8628e74f-e629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ec032085-f029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) Let’s continue to grow our party across the state by recruiting, training and engaging more young people in the process. [Help to spread the word and be sure to apply before the July 15th deadline to be considered for the new class!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107145507/543739522/1184560282?refcode=250505elp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAzMjA4NS1mMDI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grtnxuohKIrMczr8xupvHq42mCCP8hSQ8M_jbyUnLa4=&emci=8628e74f-e629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ec032085-f029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) Democratically yours,
Jeff Harris
Chair, Emerging Leaders Project

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: Heartbroken and enraged.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250505-1339-foote&t=1001&akid=1339%2E342411%2EM5-2gL ]Squad Victory Fund

Content warning: This message references sexual assault and violence.

Hello Peter,

In late April, I was in Louisiana where my colleagues Senator Markey,
Congressman McGovern, and I conducted oversight of two ICE detention
facilities where Mahmoud Khalil and my constituent, Rümeysa Öztürk are
currently being held.

Neither of them has committed any crime. Rümeysa should be back in our
home state, in the Massachusetts 7th. Mahmoud should be with his wife and
their newborn son.

Detaining them serves no purpose other than to silence dissent, to stoke
and instill fear — which is exactly what a dictator does.

We had the chance to meet with Rümeysa and Mahmoud during our visit. What
we saw and heard was harrowing. It was heartbreaking, and it is enraging.

They are being denied proper medical care. They are being deprived of
sleep. They are not being fed nutritious meals.

Rümeysa herself shared the story of having to wait three days, despite
repeated requests, simply for toilet paper. She has suffered multiple
asthma attacks. The medical care is grossly insufficient and culturally
incompetent. Rümeysa shared that a nurse removed her hijab without
consent.

The cruelty is the point.

They are humiliated daily, degraded, and denied the basic necessities of
any human being.

Despite these horrific experiences, Rümeysa and Mahmoud’s first priority
was not to make an appeal for their own respective cases. Instead, they
put their own well-being to the side to advocate for those who are
detained with them.

Rümeysa is a qualified researcher. She's been actively listening to and
spending time with the women that she is confined with, hearing their
stories, and came with copious notes that she had collected.

She shared stories of women being ripped away from their babies, women
with breast cancer who can't get the care that they need, and pregnant
women denied prenatal care.

When I asked her if anyone she knew had experienced sexual abuse or
assault, she told me she did not have the consent to share.

Before we met with Rümeysa, we went to one of the dorms. I was the only
woman in our delegation. When I entered, women clad in orange scrubs fell
into my arms.

They were desperate and crying and fearful. They kept saying, “I want to
talk to you. I want to tell you what's happening here, but will you
protect us when you leave? Who will protect us?” They were visibly
shaking.

These are private detention centers operated by billion dollar
corporations. Like my opposition to private prisons and profiting off of
mass incarceration, I vigorously oppose these companies making money on
disappearing immigrants.

This visit was not about optics. It was about accountability. It was about
affirming that no one in America, regardless of background, immigration
status, political beliefs, and more, should have their constitutional
rights to free speech and due process ripped away.

I feel a responsibility to carry the stories that I heard in my heart and
for that to inform my strategy and my advocacy.

This is what it means to conduct real-time oversight. This is the type of
bold activist leadership that this moment demands.

We must hold ICE and this hostile, lawless administration accountable.

We must protect our democracy and the fundamental rights of everyone who
calls America home. And we must bring Rümeysa and Mahmoud home now.

-Ayanna

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1339%2E342411%2EM5-2gL

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Sarah McBride
subject: The Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Last week, I proudly helped lead the reintroduction of the Equality Act in Congress.
#
In 2019, I helped pass the _Equality Act_ through the House of Representatives as an advocate. Back then we had support from both Democrats and Republicans, and although we’ve come a long way on these issues since I was younger, in recent months, it’s felt like we’ve been taking steps back.
**That’s why last week, I proudly helped lead the reintroduction of the _Equality Act_ as Delaware’s Congresswoman and a co-chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus.**
While Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans play politics with the lives of LGBTQ+ people in Delaware and across the country, I’m working to make sure we ensure freedom and fairness for _every_ American, no matter how you identify or who you love.
**No one should be denied safety, dignity, or opportunity because of who they are.**
[**If you agree, will you sign on to my petition calling on Speaker Johnson to bring the _Equality Act_ to a vote as soon as possible?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/ms_em_20250505_equalityact?source=em20250505-1969&akid=1969%2E21716%2EMrYy6E)
**[Add your name »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/ms_em_20250505_equalityact?source=em20250505-1969&akid=1969%2E21716%2EMrYy6E)**
Thank you for your support,
Sarah

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250505-1&t=1&refcode2=1969_21716_MrYy6E&akid=1969%2E21716%2EMrYy6E)**

Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Back then we had support from both Democrats and Republicans, and although we’ve come a long way on these issues since I was younger, in recent months, it’s felt like we’ve been taking steps back. That’s why last week, I proudly helped lead the reintroduction of the Equality Act as Delaware’s Congresswoman and a co-chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus. While Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans play politics with the lives of LGBTQ+ people in Delaware and across the country, I’m working to make sure we ensure freedom and fairness for every American, no matter how you identify or who you love. No one should be denied safety, dignity, or opportunity because of who they are. Thank you for your support, Sarah

body:
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=393a59a6c9dc454db0e4c6d6cf12846f&_e=sVurJvWoax6Vk73bMOr2tMmZpeH3ihjhz3xML4cmoS1qImidDC_eWlYWp8E2zScfZMLKfTb0wXSYJYphv1tna-YhsNH3ccm_AKndgH8Izh6QxBlPw_9unlm5cMlUNqaJUFsm7E2UYPm_TWxmEybiWp77_emDzu0Ho9oXCLIJSS4ikiG4B_-KQ8br4bJcs_XcVzHD8lnGaLStYCLIJLfClWCZ2AkvSWl-3fF0gbWMmFGkZDm7LL2ylQI3ZajmfP3bmu91kkoT1rcgK571NHt-dPcZkpBvM8FDmGyNVy_8szVw8TYWQh5u-Gsq9No1JxhQJNIc58T7wl1uqkWL7gN5wG8UvBIfuhBdKwWxxs1mNlX2BAOty9h_bhcylrWSDJ1MNp9ORZu-sln8UiOgslHmX07PGQYYYtky6xknr4WSFcA%3D)

Fellow American,

When I look at Washington, I see too many politicians who are too comfortable.

They stay in office for decades and forget what public service is supposed to be about: Working for the American people.

**That 's why I introduced a resolution to mandate term limits for members of Congress, and that's why I'm writing to you personally today.**

We can bring about real change in Washington, but I need your support to make it happen. [Will you chip in $10 or more to get your "Term Limits Now!" sticker and voice your support for term limits?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=393a59a6c9dc454db0e4c6d6cf12846f&_e=sVurJvWoax6Vk73bMOr2tMmZpeH3ihjhz3xML4cmoS1qImidDC_eWlYWp8E2zScfZMLKfTb0wXSYJYphv1tna-YhsNH3ccm_AKndgH8Izh6QxBlPw_9unlm5cMlUNqaJUFsm7E2UYPm_TWxmEybiWp77_emDzu0Ho9oXCLIJSS4ikiG4B_-KQ8br4bJcs_XcVzHD8lnGaLStYCLIJLfClWCZ2AkvSWl-3fF0gbWMmFGkZDm7LL2ylQI3ZajmfP3bmu91kkoT1rcgK571NHt-dJYhFTZTVlVnXyEcMQyEioOF98KPnsmeVX1LqcIZByHce0UxoRrtKM55-tqFjdeLgNNtyGeAuWvdtrIJjB67Q_UP2nR9S4gcVUlnGc3YMVJZTWeXqmcFO3eZjlol8fb05f2B30oqnvKfdjIph8rAA_w%3D)

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=393a59a6c9dc454db0e4c6d6cf12846f&_e=sVurJvWoax6Vk73bMOr2tMmZpeH3ihjhz3xML4cmoS1qImidDC_eWlYWp8E2zScfZMLKfTb0wXSYJYphv1tna-YhsNH3ccm_AKndgH8Izh6QxBlPw_9unlm5cMlUNqaJUFsm7E2UYPm_TWxmEybiWp77_emDzu0Ho9oXCLIJSS4ikiG4B_-KQ8br4bJcs_XcVzHD8lnGaLStYCLIJLfClWCZ2AkvSWl-3fF0gbWMmFGkZDm7LL2ylQI3ZajmfP3bmu91kkoT1rcgK571NHt-dACKbiNmEhXhWMienDAnM0q4bZmDuqjZClV581JQEwFJ-9x1L5vNgwn-FofPnmsOrCAolkq9qLlPzn_zM_h0rahxRu3jrfS_IYpu3TUvOqXgnLt0hYnnZfhsoLXOHkRFzKUgpM4vWuXmZKaPvmzeWwA%3D)

**Our democracy cannot function without change.** We need new faces, ideas, and politicians who represent the people they are elected to serve.

I wasn't elected to maintain the status-quo in Washington. I made a promise to shake things up, get our country back on track, and solve the biggest issues our country faces.

But if we're going to shake up Washington and make a real impact on the lives of the American people, we must mandate term limits and end the era of career politicians.

83% of Americans support term limits for members of Congress._ _**[If you're one of them, chip in $10 or more today & I'll send you this "Term Limits Now!" sticker.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=393a59a6c9dc454db0e4c6d6cf12846f&_e=sVurJvWoax6Vk73bMOr2tMmZpeH3ihjhz3xML4cmoS1qImidDC_eWlYWp8E2zScfZMLKfTb0wXSYJYphv1tna-YhsNH3ccm_AKndgH8Izh6QxBlPw_9unlm5cMlUNqaJUFsm7E2UYPm_TWxmEybiWp77_emDzu0Ho9oXCLIJSS4ikiG4B_-KQ8br4bJcs_XcVzHD8lnGaLStYCLIJLfClWCZ2AkvSWl-3fF0gbWMmFGkZDm7LL2ylQI3ZajmfP3bmu91kkoT1rcgK571NHt-dHalAp7WVU1bzjI9rGT3kcmVYglj37DFtEGyG4DFxoF84vM_Tix3pEsC9CZsxsu97zDnPqxssFYoLsJVnTy6hTlaWZD8opSh2Ul3dSM-vUuWaInmhji7ONpH_mpbRyZZfGPZXmLiLjPhyvESO-vTwXY%3D)**

Your support is crucial.
[GET YOUR STICKER](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=393a59a6c9dc454db0e4c6d6cf12846f&_e=sVurJvWoax6Vk73bMOr2tMmZpeH3ihjhz3xML4cmoS1qImidDC_eWlYWp8E2zScfZMLKfTb0wXSYJYphv1tna-YhsNH3ccm_AKndgH8Izh6QxBlPw_9unlm5cMlUNqaJUFsm7E2UYPm_TWxmEybiWp77_emDzu0Ho9oXCLIJSS4ikiG4B_-KQ8br4bJcs_XcVzHD8lnGaLStYCLIJLfClWCZ2AkvSWl-3fF0gbWMmFGkZDm7LL2ylQI3ZajmfP3bmu91kkoT1rcgK571NHt-dCEt_EtIqiHzMoCKB5Ewwwc40nf_yUd2om1fsdOOp3nLU9hEhF3wUU1jBjJwFah_e3NbbOLLpB56OEZPnPaj1Pa2Zm0LSAVaLi-jg9BUV4hl91w44Jsg8FrYxGjKwyOk6ajU8gHlU9hV0ZSq1UolZvk%3D)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Teaching election conspiracy theories in high school?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=]
Popular Information: New Oklahoma curriculum includes pro-Trump conspiracy theories [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=]
This is hard to believe, Team, but it shows just how deeply misled some opponents of voting rights are.
Recent reporting shows that " beginning in the 2025-26 school year, thousands of high school students in Oklahoma will be required to learn about President Trump's debunked claims that the 2020 election was tainted by fraud. The lesson will not be part of a course on conspiracy theories, but an official component of the new social studies curriculum created by Oklahoma Superintendent of Public Instruction Ryan Walters ."
As fanciful as it sounds, here's a direct quote from the curriculum itself. Students will:
" Identify discrepancies in 2020 elections results by looking at graphs and other information, including the sudden halting of ballot-counting in select cities in key battleground states, the security risks of mail-in balloting, sudden batch dumps, an unforeseen record number of voters, and the unprecedented contradiction of “bellwether county” trends. "
Is it any wonder why faith and trust in our elections are declining? Opponents of voting rights pulling stunts like this shows why our work is so critical. It's on us to ensure accurate, truthful statements are made about our electoral system -- all while we work to register new voters, activate registered voters, and fight suppressive laws to make sure every vote counts.
Please, we can't afford to let attacks on our elections like this slide. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help discredit conspiracy theories about our elections and so much more >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=15.00&tknfa=UwM8rY-8VRegfdfzkLRaibJa3gPcffc0AB17ain1_sw=&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&tknfa=UwM8rY-8VRegfdfzkLRaibJa3gPcffc0AB17ain1_sw=&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=50.00&tknfa=UwM8rY-8VRegfdfzkLRaibJa3gPcffc0AB17ain1_sw=&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100.00&tknfa=UwM8rY-8VRegfdfzkLRaibJa3gPcffc0AB17ain1_sw=&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250.00&tknfa=UwM8rY-8VRegfdfzkLRaibJa3gPcffc0AB17ain1_sw=&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=]
In March, Oklahoma Superintendent of Public Instruction Ryan Walters said the purpose of this new curriculum was to teach " students to think for themselves " and " not be spoon-fed left-wing propaganda ." According to Walters, there are " legitimate concerns " about the integrity of the 2020 election that were " raised by millions of Americans in 2020. "
We know he's wrong. We know there are no "discrepancies" in the 2020 election results that validate the claims of Trump and his allies that the results were fraudulent. We know Mail-in Ballots are safe and secure. We know that ballots were "suddenly dumped" because certain states forbade mailed ballots from being counted before Election Day (precisely to fuel these conspiracies). We know these "legitimate concerns" were debunked as lies.
We know we can make our country the democracy we've all been promised. But we need your help, especially when we are confronted by obvious partisan lies from elected officials like this and the support they receive from dark money groups like The Heritage Foundation and the so-called "Moms for Liberty".
Help restore our democracy with $25 or however much you can to protect the right to vote and so much more from the threats we're facing across the country >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=QuJJXLnJELDQddmgISTOyHUx32MrhThWotBLQiMJqU20eHSrUfgfV+MZndghWWqvtNTzwmxvxvLXCmmsXRV1TgqO+5GkR2a4aIk1RK53lbo=]

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The counter to drag queen story hour
body:
Will I see you there?| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e2aceb8a4c84420c98be6395a4f9c859&_e=Nf9Ui57zpjVPGz4AztxWJ47ICRDxsnLbSlKZpX_teouVEHy_Yl6BOnCDpYPCZ-eIB1TryL_MneMM2gNE70uLpozO1PK3_vBjCEagN9UuZL1J-jsBHKuAgX75Pt9KCyI34xr587vL9rMSU64iwJ0Fu2d1LQ_6JttCYACWk9_xZguXFLWP6gi_QxoLcCBjFeaH5TzGAtFuVSpfyj9Dh5ulshm5oglVk51KGx7fqcRNTZVXiM1E5KozKejozStaL7qkEP7sHNokRJ3IvNBoujlmz-LHHfvfAmctGM2_Inl_WGJuclntbJr9Bkc0v_XnGantzNY2z5WfhdS7NlINTkSzohGClOOJfZpi5OtLupVSPyW3CbtelYqs5XHHB2p9zn_ELdMcCLjbayPIk_jDgMYz8tlBvJUmavUKFmN6uEpEW-Q%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e2aceb8a4c84420c98be6395a4f9c859&_e=Nf9Ui57zpjVPGz4AztxWJ47ICRDxsnLbSlKZpX_teouVEHy_Yl6BOnCDpYPCZ-eIB1TryL_MneMM2gNE70uLpozO1PK3_vBjCEagN9UuZL1J-jsBHKuAgX75Pt9KCyI34xr587vL9rMSU64iwJ0Fu2d1LQ_6JttCYACWk9_xZguXFLWP6gi_QxoLcCBjFeaH5TzGAtFuVSpfyj9Dh5ulshm5oglVk51KGx7fqcRNTZVXiM1E5KozKejozStaL7qkveaAAdfOJq0RJluqtOFZQi5msYd2ZvaNtzgE1rc8CzpL1DIO6Bp_8NNtB5Rnjmo3pItczvc7HCLfc_rhl86qRL9ZSJmVoyXitom0P8k1gQxoGlpekkQwYKdd-4EHzvRA_oYKX2gnFO0gs4vQwSJy1HnbDTGHkDlt2Tx3xhrrfbE%3D)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e2aceb8a4c84420c98be6395a4f9c859&_e=Nf9Ui57zpjVPGz4AztxWJ47ICRDxsnLbSlKZpX_teouVEHy_Yl6BOnCDpYPCZ-eIB1TryL_MneMM2gNE70uLpozO1PK3_vBjCEagN9UuZL1J-jsBHKuAgX75Pt9KCyI34xr587vL9rMSU64iwJ0Fu2d1LQ_6JttCYACWk9_xZguXFLWP6gi_QxoLcCBjFeaH5TzGAtFuVSpfyj9Dh5ulshm5oglVk51KGx7fqcRNTZVXiM1E5KozKejozStaL7qkFpMn8Vc9x1P8QkFHZmxqsPDLfYR7-AIfC-QzBBEj7PUl1-bdu8nzJo9mcrfAtw7Rd9fOrUUb8BzUqpd7RgvIolhPbeNp6B0UJ2esb_4yyIMmsWwm3aOmJJPKhQ-s3EaZFDi7ppX_2LxQLN7tBvx6NCuHNTM22I_Pb2WJOkX78Ps%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e2aceb8a4c84420c98be6395a4f9c859&_e=Nf9Ui57zpjVPGz4AztxWJ47ICRDxsnLbSlKZpX_teouVEHy_Yl6BOnCDpYPCZ-eIB1TryL_MneMM2gNE70uLpozO1PK3_vBjCEagN9UuZL1J-jsBHKuAgX75Pt9KCyI34xr587vL9rMSU64iwJ0Fu2d1LQ_6JttCYACWk9_xZguXFLWP6gi_QxoLcCBjFeaH5TzGAtFuVSpfyj9Dh5ulshm5oglVk51KGx7fqcRNTZVXiM1E5KozKejozStaL7qk0BXvNfipHworQ_7YbOnSNP5845UdERewRQZvZwCUsWI4DbeKRyXAYIL3jz558xupzsSbMAuFb9XVsFGRjmbqSewXtV4eFNWDz7AvgqLusXHUPz5eJ-AdoMbuj6_nRDHdUWAAT19BOwvd8Z2BXv_5E5xokKthVn0SXAEo3-TVvTk%3D)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. clean_body: Will I see you there?| | | | | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🛑**If you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities are providing a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the current administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---
[Will you chip in a gift of $10 right now to claim your 2025 membership, join our people-powered movement, and stand up to Republican extremism? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD8vBkRUhwe9sFsDwNEatP4bx7LDgklsBJWwnHPXWznkxVHePib__14oFMc1Q14l8dAlSWnfhODI88Rrn0zIs37X9LgxzF_5fhrkA5c13qStdJHOq7lM0LGd518vAqPO-VGBU85j4kEDbgcldJkbK9sFQqc4WC6j-OFrvwmL8Wv2pSiEwXh596zenLdMEfM8_zKpDdWxgefdmPZhe20FjIaHpPEc-auniG1fncCB-lJ8H5mb_yNOqtUWuHjfrr_j_VPiQgoOBgADOvcVKzm_gBaJ83i2pSZEX9kH8kzRmhU0wFJSeIAWKYLzZ8TClPBFdkCA6ESVa8Po4vtw2F6aTmuP4PSH6BN526OPmC0b3pR0kj-JamX8GImBh_EWqL2ukF/4g8/Piuwam92Ta6-TuQu8pPyzg/h0/h001.FOCKp9DCHvA-VxMn6vdCeWLAZ1eU3h2_Ugfy5-SVBYo)

Here’s the truth: **Our election this November in Virginia will set the tone for 2026 and beyond.**

It's no wonder that both Democrats and Republicans are spending vast sums of money to define the candidates early and get ads in front of voters — and the more folks hear about our opponent Winsome Earle-Sears, the more they realize she's in lockstep with Donald Trump's extreme agenda.

Sears has backed this White House's reckless policies and holds views that are wildly out of step with Virginians, from excusing DOGE’s threats to the jobs of hundreds of thousands of federal workers here in Virginia to praising Trump’s tariffs, which have left Virginia families and small businesses reeling.

We know that Abigail's message is resonating, but we're not taking _anything_ for granted.

That’s why we’re laying the groundwork now — and asking for generous donations to maintain our momentum.

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
In our previous edition we warned about the slippery slope we were in when it came to deportations.
Since, the Trump regime has wrongly detained dozens of U.S. citizens — including a ten-year-old Texas girl [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-citizen-child-recovering-brain-cancer-deported-mexico-undocumented-rcna196049] recovering from brain cancer, a 19-year-old U.S. citizen with learning disabilities who was [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/?fbclid=IwY2xjawJ2Qi9leHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFPbU5wOTFVREhWYktoNnc5AR7Fe9oVKjamHuG3WmhfyvfnCRNedF3MORvKe81-https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/] wrongfully incarcerated [https://popular.info/p/federal-immigration-authorities-wrongfully] for 10 days in a privately run immigration detention facility in Arizona or a 20-year-old born in Georgia [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-born-citizen-detained-ice-immigration-florida-rcna201800] , and arrested in Florida.
All mistakes, that cause fear in the American population. The deportation of Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, who, due to an “administrative error,” was sent to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador, does not help ease the fear.
The Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution [https://www.law.cornell.edu/wex/due_process] establish the right to due process — the Fifth Amendment says that “[n]o person shall ... be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.” The Fourteenth Amendment extends this obligation to the states.
No PERSON. This is true even for the undocumented, even if someone is here without authorization.
Due process for Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, should have included notice of deportation and the opportunity to contest it before it happened. Now even as the Supreme Court has ruled for his return, he has yet to be returned home
We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
Social Media of the Week
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202025-04-24%20110558.png] "I'll tell you what freedom is to me: no fear." – Nina Simone
Nina Simone was a classically trained pianist (not common for a young Black woman in the 1950s) who fused her foundation with jazz, gospel, blues, and folk to create a sound entirely her own, defying all genres.
She didn’t fit into a box or label, nor did she try to.
Simone was denied entry to a prestigious music school, the Curtis Institute of Music in Philadelphia, because of her race. This moment fueled her lifelong work in civil rights.
Her songs like “Mississippi Goddam” became an anthem for civil rights and Black empowerment nationally.
"An artist's duty is to reflect the times." – Nina Simone
#NinaSimone [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/ninasimone?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #BlackHistory [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/blackhistory?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #CivilRights [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/civilrights?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R]
SHARE ON FACEBOOK [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
Let's save our planet by saving our democracy.

Happy #EarthDay [https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/earthday/] from NPPEF - remember you have the choice to voice your vote for leaders and legislations that protect our only home, planet Earth.
SHARE ON INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7237344C447445787878394747342B75584E47375A57552F745265427662334B544A4A36505A58657A5871474B7A5A6E53705571424758325657365969365747/editor_images/WCM%20logo.JPG] #CourtsMatter
The U.S. Justice Department withdrew its lawsuit [https://triblive.com/news/pennsylvania/justice-department-drops-lawsuit-accusing-pennsylvania-city-of-diluting-power-of-hispanic-voters/] that accused the heavily Hispanic city of Hazleton in Pennsylvania of illegally diluting the political power of its growing Hispanic population. The department’s initial lawsuit, filed in January, said the “at-large” system of electing city council members, as opposed to electing them by district, was unfair to Hispanic voters and prevented them from getting elected to city council. Hazleton’s 30,000 residents are about two-thirds Hispanic, according to U.S. Census figures. One-third is non-Hispanic white.
Closer to Philadelphia, the largest health system in Delaware County began closing two hospitals [https://6abc.com/post/crozer-health-hospital-emergency-rooms-stop-accepting-patients/16228691/] Wednesday after a federal judge in Texas approved their bankruptcy proceedings. The emergency rooms of Taylor Hospital in Ridley Park and Crozer-Chester Medical Center in Upland are expected to close today, Friday, April 25th. Emergency medical services will end next Friday, on May 2. Crozer's ambulatory centers at Brinton Lakes, Broomall, Haverford, and Media are expected to remain open.
This November, voters will have the power to retain or vacate three seats of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
The votes cast by powerful Pennsylvania voters in November will impact our lives for years to come, as Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court will make decisions about our election administration, immigrant rights. access to abortion, the safety of our workplaces, how bankruptcies are handled, and the right to unionize. Make sure you can voice your vote!
CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/DelCo_2.png] We are hiring!
Let's provide civic education together!
We're looking for people passionate about voting rights in Erie, Lawrence, Lehigh Valley, Bucks, Montgomery, Chester, and Delaware County to help us shape the future of Pennsylvania.
Join our team and help us provide civic education in our communities and register folks to vote!
Positions start at $20 an hour.
Interested? Contact jobs@nppef.org
EMAIL US [jobs@nppef.org]
News You Can Use
State Rep. David Rowe (R-Union) wants to introduce a bill to make it easier for hunters and fishermen to get registered to vote [https://www.palegis.us/house/co-sponsorship/memo?memoID=46210] . He represents a lot of sportsmen in the rural 85th state House District, which includes parts of Union, Juniata, and Mifflin counties and all of Snyder County.
“The bill will not complicate the process of getting a license. The bill will not add another step to the hunting license process,” Rowe told Capital-Star [https://penncapital-star.com/government-politics/general-assembly/state-rep-david-rowe-wants-to-make-it-easier-for-sportsmen-to-register-to-vote/] . “Rather, it will simply make it more accessible. So, for sportsmen that are going to a state office, there will be paper registration forms available for them to simply grab.”
As a voting rights organization, we applaud all legislation that would make it easier for people to register to vote, and make our voices to be heard at the ballot box.
Meanwhile, Pennsylvania’s first two openly autistic legislators, State Reps. Jessica Behnam (D-Allegheny) and Abigail Sailsbury (D-Allegheny), condemned the comments made by the Department of Health Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., attacking autistic people [https://www.witf.org/2025/04/23/pa-lawmakers-some-on-the-autism-spectrum-denounce-rfk-jr-comments/] . They are also opposed to his plan to collect private medical records from US citizens to research autism. Remember that slippery slope regarding immigrant deportations?
And if you are waiting for a tax return but have defaulted student loans, there is a chance the government will garnish your return and even your wages. The Department of Education announced Monday it will restart collections on defaulted federal student loans on May 5 [https://thehill.com/homenews/education/5259465-education-department-defaulted-federal-student-loans-debt-collection-trump-mcmahon] , including potentially garnishing wages for millions of workers. The Treasury Offset Program allows the government to withhold federal payments such as tax returns for individuals in default. After a 30-day notice, the federal government could also begin garnishing a borrower’s wages. So make sure to check your statement.
NPPEF on the Ground
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/IMG_2941.jpg] Engaging the young
Regional Organizing Director, Daniel Levin providing civil education to students. Did you know that as long as a student is 18 years of age on or before the day of the next election - they can register to vote?
Many 17 year old students don't know this and might pass up the opportunity to register to vote, thinking they have to be 18 at time of registering.
It's our passion to bridge the gap here on civic education.
#YourVoiceYourPowerYourVote [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/yourvoiceyourpoweryourvote?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZUMQygtkxZAWe_o90AJM0cC0VjAXlJ-rbT6fE9ucNTrpJHemgLlRVUCqPnNZAw6Kfz8RmcfeGFf5svJw2gqUbbT7VJWgQU3OwY1FZk2y-Udf7JUM8Ji_X-C9F-QEt0Jlz0QoYYalvTffMiEWuDrtouxd1lju8yUMjOJKfBCjAqUIA&__tn__=*NK-R] #GoVotePA [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/govotepa?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZUMQygtkxZAWe_o90AJM0cC0VjAXlJ-rbT6fE9ucNTrpJHemgLlRVUCqPnNZAw6Kfz8RmcfeGFf5svJw2gqUbbT7VJWgQU3OwY1FZk2y-Udf7JUM8Ji_X-C9F-QEt0Jlz0QoYYalvTffMiEWuDrtouxd1lju8yUMjOJKfBCjAqUIA&__tn__=*NK-R] #StudentVoters [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/studentvoters?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZUMQygtkxZAWe_o90AJM0cC0VjAXlJ-rbT6fE9ucNTrpJHemgLlRVUCqPnNZAw6Kfz8RmcfeGFf5svJw2gqUbbT7VJWgQU3OwY1FZk2y-Udf7JUM8Ji_X-C9F-QEt0Jlz0QoYYalvTffMiEWuDrtouxd1lju8yUMjOJKfBCjAqUIA&__tn__=*NK-R]

name: Qasim Rashid, Esq.
subject: House Attempts to Pass Bill to Criminalize Criticism of Israel
body:
Corporate Democrats are joining MAGA Republicans to pass the worst suppression of free speech in modern history

| |
---|---|---

# [House Attempts to Pass Bill to Criminalize Criticism of Israel](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=162863755&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyODYzNzU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY0ODA0MjksImV4cCI6MTc0OTA3MjQyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ItBUnm0FF2syVbWj4GPdnmFG0B6xy-jCyWxCN3ergF8)
### Corporate Democrats are joining MAGA Republicans to pass the worst suppression of free speech in modern history
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| May 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=162863755&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyODYzNzU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjQ4MDQyOSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5MDcyNDI5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qxfcTYbfjQ4njZuU07qI4ChW9_tw2LlN_oD5BMPR3Uc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

If you care about democracy, free speech, or the right to dissent -- then you need to know about HR 867, the so-called "Countering Antisemitism Act." Despite the name, this bill isn't about protecting anyone from hate. It's about criminalizing Americans for engaging in peaceful protest. Specifically, it seeks to impose up to 20 years in prison and a $1 million fine for participating in or supporting boycotts against the state of Israel if those boycotts are initiated by international bodies like the United Nations.
Let me be clear: this bill is one of the most grotesque attacks on the First Amendment in modern American history. And shockingly, it's being supported not just by far-right Republicans -- but by five Democrats as well. **Let 's Address This.**
**Before you dive in, join 130,000+ activists and become a free or paid subscriber to our movement for justice.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gfUdn65fg6hguUt5ZzvMoPyppadYkjL4r59gLaK7wvw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162863755)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f8beb23d-51f8-4c6c-b255-310001ba7d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Arizona: Americans protest the attempt to criminalize peaceful boycotts of the Government of Israel
### A Direct Attack on Our Constitutional Rights
Boycott is a protected constitutional right. Human rights activists seek peaceful boycott to express their opposition to the Israeli government building illegal settlements on Palestinian land. [These settlements now exceed 700,000 illegal settlers](https://substack.com/redirect/43dc0251-3ced-478f-a5a6-c31e07b36681?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Settlers who are commandeering Palestinian homes, displacing Palestinian people, and destroying Palestinian rights. Those who condemn violent reactions to these illegal settlements should be at the forefront of condemning peaceful resistence to these illegal settlements. Instead, we find stunning hypocrisy that those who claim to oppose violent resistence, support violent occupation instead, and instead now seek to ban peaceful resistence.
The right to boycott is a foundational American tradition -- from the Boston Tea Party to the Montgomery Bus Boycott, peaceful economic protest is how Americans have held the powerful accountable for centuries. In fact, in _NAACP v. Claiborne Hardware Co._ (1982), the Supreme Court ruled that boycotts for political, social, and economic change are protected under the First Amendment.
HR 867 spits in the face of that legacy. It criminalizes peaceful dissent if that dissent challenges a foreign government that happens to be allied with the U.S. That's not democracy. That's tyranny.
### Meet the Democrats Who Co-Signed This Fascist Bill
These are the five Democratic members of Congress who co-sponsored HR 867 -- lending bipartisan cover to what amounts to a criminalization of conscience:
* [Rep. Gottheimer, Josh [D-NJ-5]](https://substack.com/redirect/abdbf11e-3fa2-47a3-a569-4bd8070e45e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): (202) 225-4465
* [Rep. Moskowitz, Jared [D-FL-23]](https://substack.com/redirect/90d82009-8559-427e-bfd6-bf3a41de8e2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): (202) 225-3001
* [Rep. Morelle, Joseph D. [D-NY-25]](https://substack.com/redirect/660ee8a2-2170-4e41-b275-b7f44e5f4a8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): (202) 225-3615
* [Rep. Davis, Donald G. [D-NC-1]](https://substack.com/redirect/d726ab52-39c9-4ed0-9159-cfc6a6eab132?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): (202) 225-3101
* [Rep. Gillen, Laura [D-NY-4]](https://substack.com/redirect/98791922-dd4c-49d5-9857-31dbfaf6a53f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): (202) 225-5516

Every one of these lawmakers swore an oath to uphold the Constitution. Every one of them is betraying it with this bill. Be sure to let them hear your opposition to HR 867. Here is a short script to use when you call or [email](https://substack.com/redirect/c9668e33-b00b-43e3-9f56-5a1c0a33f4c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) your member of Congress:
> Hi, my name is [Your Name], and I'm calling to urge you to **oppose HR 867**.
> This bill is an outrageous attack on our **First Amendment rights**. It seeks to criminalize peaceful boycotts--one of the most foundational tools of democratic protest. Under HR 867, Americans could face **a $1 million fine and 20 years in prison** just for participating in or supporting a boycott called by the United Nations or other international bodies.
> Boycotts helped end apartheid. They helped advance civil rights. And now, Congress wants to criminalize that legacy? This isn't about foreign policy--it's about **free speech**. Whether you support or oppose a specific boycott doesn't matter. What matters is that in a democracy, dissent is not a crime. I strongly urge you to reject HR 867 and defend our constitutional rights.
> Thank you.
### This Isn't New. It's Part of a Structural Effort to Criminalize Palestine Advocacy.
HR 867 is an extension of the Israel Anti-Boycott Act of 2018, and part of a growing pattern in U.S. policy. Already, at least 37 U.S. states have passed laws penalizing individuals, businesses, or contractors who boycott Israel. That's nearly 75% of the country criminalizing peaceful protest.
Why should you care -- even if you don't personally support the Boycott, Divestment, Sanctions (BDS) movement?
Because if the government can criminalize one form of protest, it can criminalize any form of protest. Today it's Palestine. Tomorrow it could be reproductive justice. Racial equity. LGBTQ+ rights. Labor unions. Police reform. Climate justice. Free speech is not free if it only applies to issues you happen to agree with.
### What Happens When Peaceful Protest Becomes Illegal?
Also, think about this. We specifically call people to reject violent protests and engage in peaceful protests. But now, if the American people cannot protest peacefully -- what's left? Silence? Submission? Complicity?
This bill sends a terrifying message: if you speak out against injustice, your government may imprison you. If you stand with oppressed people -- you may be financially ruined. This is not speculation. HR 867 calls for actual prison time of up to 20 years and financial destruction for dissenters of $1,000,000.
And all for what? To protect a foreign government from criticism? That's not national security. That's authoritarianism. A reminder once more that states don't have rights. People have rights. Jewish people have rights. Muslim people have rights. Christian people have rights. Atheists have rights. But governments and states do not have rights, and legislation that criminalizes peaceful opposition to a government is legislation that leads to autocracy.
**If you 're finding value in this content, join us and become a subscriber.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gfUdn65fg6hguUt5ZzvMoPyppadYkjL4r59gLaK7wvw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162863755)
### We're Pushing Back -- But We Need Your Voice
As I wrote this, thanks to growing public pressure HR 867 was just pulled from the voting calendar this week. This is a temporary reprieve. It's not gone and it's not dead. If anything, the bipartisan support behind it means it could come back at any moment, perhaps hidden in a larger appropriations bill or reintroduced under a new name.
We must stop this now. And we must make sure our lawmakers know: We will not trade away the First Amendment for political convenience or foreign allegiance.
### Here's What You Can Do:
Call and email your Representatives today. Tell them to vote NO on HR 867 -- and to denounce this bill publicly. I have provided a script and numbers above. This includes calling the five Democrats co-sponsoring this fascist bill.
Share this article. Help people understand what's at stake. Our free speech is not negotiable.
And if you value the work I do -- [please consider becoming a paid subscriber](https://substack.com/redirect/3e01625e-4ad1-4e63-9964-cc6d92886caa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to support independent human rights advocacy. I don't take corporate money. I don't work for any party machine. I write for the people -- and I speak truth to power no matter the cost.
## Conclusion
I've spent my life as a human rights lawyer defending people's right to speak, protest, dissent, and demand justice. What HR 867 represents is nothing short of a constitutional crisis.
This is not a left-vs-right issue. This is a freedom-vs-fascism issue.
You don't have to agree with the BDS movement to understand the stakes here. You just have to care about democracy. Because if HR 867 becomes law -- it won't stop with Palestine. It will come for every movement for justice.
Now is the time to rise. Now is the time to speak. Before they criminalize that, too.
Let's address this -- together.
**Before you go, know that your support makes my human rights advocacy possible. Enter your email below and join our efforts.**

President Trump and Senate Republicans need your input to help shape the future of U.S. defense. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=00eabc07512342d290336021f550c49c&_e=qAJIwaXx-lsQI316oQBT-nJnShhPdo8clg_REiANryZwIhOD1In30aSQQWbWzSdiY01BcfCPOz2Qr2JGEc8exW3jrFBzIj0EExy48-8UGTyCr3ctg7kVI2B3sIpHQ5lv5y50Sx5MxRewSRaz76apju0wLkb5Udt3g6ZdURGebNysv75jFDk1DYLLOHA91m1JHJXM13gADN2lrYfGmorDCUTCccPcZoKaNEl11Pe-Eug-gQRUYWH8lr57aJW3cswuezvNehr6PtQjGJZu9OgyOMVeKMj8aom9W4K6r8kF1D3iyeoh_0zbtEnVLRGBnrZK-Ln3Sb4J2Em4Kcnpl2uCVEJN1M13RXIcDryDKoh1YHzCfPdDnM6ieeFIR6HA8SSlDMjmf2XsiSTBbR1sJ66Dx8QyLNXirZ0En42CWQ6rL1nZx2sF11NU28l1zuUPSysDqfHy0OkK34_y6qujTxPIM400UReBr8xOlYWGNUUtVO5i4cDednPtelZA2Zj-VX4U)
President Trump is leading a **powerful America First comeback** --and on June 14th, he's taking it to the streets with a**historic military parade** honoring his 79th birthday and the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army.

But this isn't just about honoring our military--it's about reclaiming national strength and putting _American security, veterans, and defense back at the TOP of the agenda._

That's why President Trump and Senate Republicans are launching a [**National Security Survey**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=00eabc07512342d290336021f550c49c&_e=qAJIwaXx-lsQI316oQBT-nJnShhPdo8clg_REiANryZwIhOD1In30aSQQWbWzSdiY01BcfCPOz2Qr2JGEc8exW3jrFBzIj0EExy48-8UGTyCr3ctg7kVI2B3sIpHQ5lv5y50Sx5MxRewSRaz76apju0wLkb5Udt3g6ZdURGebNysv75jFDk1DYLLOHA91m1JHJXM13gADN2lrYfGmorDCUTCccPcZoKaNEl11Pe-Eug-gQRUYWH8lr57aJW3cswuezvNehr6PtQjGJZu9OgyOMVeKMj8aom9W4K6r8kF1D3iyeoh_0zbtEnVLRGBnrZK-Ln3Sb4J2Em4Kcnpl2uCVEJN1M13RXIcDryDKoh1YHxo3lpebFxVGjGbpEmePLjtgohuWSyIK-dQSAIO8a4W__HqXwj7OLUL-fQdJL_VvFzFKEdGbFBP7y1rpN3zsF6WCloK3uTol51wA8caoibI_3XYmAAVqz82V4ifYvn1-JqFuVD9OF5zjXJHiv7AKuvo)--and we need YOU to be part of it.

**🇺🇸 DO YOU BELIEVE IN AMERICA FIRST SECURITY?🇺🇸**
This survey will help shape the next wave of America First policy:

✅ Military readiness and modernization
✅ Veterans' care and respect
✅ Border security and law enforcement
✅ Standing up to global threats like China and Iran
✅ Defending peace through strength&mash;not weakness

Team, Local campaigns often run on shoestring budgets, which is why it’s so important that Martin’s **Lobo Leadership Fund** has the resources to support candidates who need it — candidates like **Juan Sanchez** , who recently announced his primary run for NM’s public land commissioner. Unlike presidential campaigns and battleground House and Senate races, local candidates often run on shoestring budgets. Grassroots support is key to running a successful local campaign. That’s where Lobo Leadership comes in. Through Martin’s leadership fund, we help ensure that resources are available to candidates like Juan who will stand up for New Mexico’s families and values. **Martin needs more pro-democracy partners up and down the ballot to fight for what’s right, and we can help make that happen. ** **[Please chip in what you can to Martin’s Lobo Leadership Fund so we can get local champions on the ballot and elected in this year’s elections and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107147944/543748296/1867566231?amount=3&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2JlN2UxZC1mODI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9R5lWT0oaHvGPuNZx6Ojlggiq-AbTiPr02oCLrMFUfQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107147947/543748298/1867566231?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2JlN2UxZC1mODI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9R5lWT0oaHvGPuNZx6Ojlggiq-AbTiPr02oCLrMFUfQ=)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Four fundamental freedoms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250505_fourfreedoms_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250505_fourfreedoms_act]
Hi folks,
I believe every American is entitled to four fundamental freedoms, and that belief has guided my work as both your Senator and the Superintendent of Denver Public Schools.
The freedom to rise, the freedom to learn, the freedom from violence, and the freedom to govern ourselves.
We can achieve the freedom to rise by making sure all Colorado families can get ahead, fighting childhood poverty, and building an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top.
We can achieve the freedom to learn by building a modern education system that serves all of our kids, pays our teachers well, and is committed to giving every child the same chance at a great education—no matter the zip code they are born into.
We can achieve freedom from violence by passing common-sense gun safety laws, fighting the opioid epidemic, and ending the extremism that continues to flourish on social media.
We can achieve the freedom to govern ourselves by reforming our electoral system so voters, not dark money, have the most power, and keeping the government out of our bedrooms and doctors' offices.
These four freedoms are why I’m running for Governor. I know it’s at home in Colorado, that we can secure these fundamental freedoms and provide the rest of the country with the hopeful, optimistic vision it so desperately needs.
Achieving these freedoms in our current political climate may seem next to impossible, but no matter how far off it may feel, they will always be worth fighting for.
Friend, I can’t do this without you. If you’re ready to fight for these freedoms with me, please consider joining my campaign today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250505_fourfreedoms_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250505_fourfreedoms_act]

Thanks,
Michael

clean_body: [] Hi folks, I believe every American is entitled to four fundamental freedoms, and that belief has guided my work as both your Senator and the Superintendent of Denver Public Schools. The freedom to rise, the freedom to learn, the freedom from violence, and the freedom to govern ourselves. We can achieve the freedom to rise by making sure all Colorado families can get ahead, fighting childhood poverty, and building an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top. We can achieve the freedom to learn by building a modern education system that serves all of our kids, pays our teachers well, and is committed to giving every child the same chance at a great education—no matter the zip code they are born into. We can achieve freedom from violence by passing common-sense gun safety laws, fighting the opioid epidemic, and ending the extremism that continues to flourish on social media. We can achieve the freedom to govern ourselves by reforming our electoral system so voters, not dark money, have the most power, and keeping the government out of our bedrooms and doctors' offices. These four freedoms are why I’m running for Governor. I know it’s at home in Colorado, that we can secure these fundamental freedoms and provide the rest of the country with the hopeful, optimistic vision it so desperately needs. Achieving these freedoms in our current political climate may seem next to impossible, but no matter how far off it may feel, they will always be worth fighting for. Friend, I can’t do this without you. If you’re ready to fight for these freedoms with me, please consider joining my campaign today. >> [] DONATE [] DONATE MONTHLY [] Thanks, Michael [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Team Pramila
subject: What we can achieve by passing Medicare For All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Every person should be able to go to the doctor if they are sick.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250505-5015-footer&t=1&akid=5015%2E420207%2E_LwQon)
Peter,
We all know the problem. The United States healthcare system is the worst of any advanced economy in the world. More than 25 million Americans are uninsured. Those who are insured face skyrocketing premiums, deductibles, and out-of-pocket costs. Millions cannot afford their prescriptions. **It's a cruel system and we must take action.**
We all know how to fix it. The United States can and must join every other major country on earth in guaranteeing health care as a right. Every person should be able to go to the doctor if they are sick. Every person should be able to go to the hospital without going bankrupt after.
**We all know we need Medicare for All.[If you stand with Pramila and our movement in support of universal health care for everyone no matter their race, ethnicity, zip code, or ability to pay, please add your name and amplify our petition today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250505?source=em20250505-5015&akid=5015%2E420207%2E_LwQon)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250505?amount=3&refcode=em20250505-5015&akid=5015%2E420207%2E_LwQon)**
Americans shouldn't have to worry about taking on mountains of medical debt just because they got sick — and with the _Medicare For All Act_ , no one would be put in this position ever again.
**By passing the _Medicare For All Act_ , we will ensure that:**
* Everyone will have health care coverage, including dental, vision, hearing, and long term care.
* Expensive premiums, deductibles, co-pays, and other out of pocket costs will be eliminated completely.
* Roughly 95% of all U.S. households would save money on health care costs.
* The U.S. would save hundreds of billions on health expenses annually.

[**Please add your name today and join our fight to finally put an end to corporate greed in our healthcare system and cement universal health care in our democracy for generations to come.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250505?source=em20250505-5015&akid=5015%2E420207%2E_LwQon)
Thank you,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250505-5015-footer&t=2&refcode2=5015_420207__LwQon&akid=5015%2E420207%2E_LwQon)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter — May is Mental Health Awareness Month. Addressing the mental and behavioral health crisis in Oregon has been a pillar of Tina's platform since the first day she stepped into office. While we've seen real progress over the past couple of years, there's still so much to do. **[Tina is working to address the mental health and addiction crisis and make significant improvements to our behavioral health care system. Tina has spoken with health care providers around the state, and time and time again, she’s heard about the difficulties they face in meeting their community’s needs.
She’s also heard from folks who want to make a difference in our mental health crisis, but have trouble affording the cost of the education and training needed to get a start in the field.
To address this crisis, Tina is making historic investments to meet our state’s need for behavioral health services, from increasing the behavioral health workforce to addressing the cycle of homelessness and untreated mental health issues.
No matter where you live or what you can afford, every Oregonian deserves access to high-quality health care, behavioral services, and support.
**[If you agree, please add your name in support of Tina's efforts to address Oregon’s behavioral health crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107148034/543748534/38755703?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjYyZTg0Ny1mODI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeI3T-hiPdaXQHbBpfkUGGzJmOXkn8bhyqRlUTtn9Xw=&emci=ff61e847-f829-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=0262e847-f829-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15353729)**
