| | Team, **Twenty-four election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 18 states — ten governors, four secretaries of state, two state elections board members, and eight attorneys general.** There’s no sugarcoating this: The foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. _And that’s not even including the two election deniers who are President and Vice President of the United States._ Election deniers have used their positions of authority to weaken election administration, push dangerous unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. **We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in 2025, 2026, and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots.** But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. The amount of donations we receive from emails like this one informs how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. name: Randy Villegas
subject: Thank you, folks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
Hi there, I just wanted to take a moment to say **thank you.** Because of you, we hit our April fundraising goal – and showed what a grassroots movement, built by and for the Central Valley, can do when we step up together. To be honest, I never thought a kid like me – the son of immigrants, who grew up working multiple jobs – would be here, running for Congress, leading a grassroots campaign to flip one of the most competitive districts in the country. **But that’s what makes this moment so powerful.** It’s not just about me. It’s about all of us. It’s about proving that the people too often left out of politics can be the ones shaping it. | | Peter - I just got back from being back on the road with my friend Maxwell Frost in another Republican-held district. Rep. Maxwell Frost and NC Dems Chair Anderson Clayton joined me for a packed house in Saxapahaw. It’s a rural part of the state — the kind of place where Democrats haven’t historically spent enough time but where we need to close our margins. [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/5W0ZV3yOiu4p0oqZOs_H8g~~/AAPPABA~/9mb-409zJHueK3F0jsV31l2TjSuiVXTJfiCoO41qmazrSzTuEb9WE_u66GQ7sQym4N0-GLxh086RL-0UO0JOyVjbxQckwrCI7_o2b9YpMP9m_LLCxjR3IlC9KvMWTAYCj4eWc4ELYaSJJQZ8D7cOiflS316xkAzMCaiejyV-ZM1ZufwVgfUykiNSmg1qBFP3GskwDlAGKWdBpoe0JDgW0fhFiG4ScFvHpFWWJovqn-AZQOg2d_wlzwhb9rN27MLN_eN00lOBaLA-5a6ePGE3_xVvFTR97PCIumVl6UADOvCb2v-qPRBCkvgRWEmTOw54AY8OHVoOzjrtrQWhRPQeDKCNHOaMc0R3COYoOdVi1Vs~) But the reality is that plenty of people here share our values and oppose the corruption and billionaire takeover in Washington. The demand was off the charts. We could’ve filled the room at least three times over. This town hall had an additional layer of significance because of who the incumbent Republican is. This town hall was in Richard Hudson’s backyard. He is the chair of House Republicans’ campaign arm — the one who told Republicans to stop holding town halls in March. [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/5W0ZV3yOiu4p0oqZOs_H8g~~/AAPPABA~/9mb-409zJHueK3F0jsV31l2TjSuiVXTJfiCoO41qmazrSzTuEb9WE_u66GQ7sQym4N0-GLxh086RL-0UO0JOyVjbxQckwrCI7_o2b9YpMP9m_LLCxjR3IlC9KvMWTAYCj4eWc4ELYaSJJQZ8D7cOiflS316xkAzMCaiejyV-ZM1ZufwVgfUykiNSmg1qBFP3GskwDlAGKWdBpoe0JDgW0fhFiG4ScFvHpFWWJovqn-AZQOg2d_wlzwhb9rN27MLN_eN00lOBaLA-5a6ePGE3_xVvFTR97PCIumVl6UADOvCb2v-qPRBCkvgRWEmTOw54AY8OHVoOzjrtrQWhRPQeDKCNHOaMc0R3COYoOdVi1Vs~) Well, his constituents are furious. Like so many people, they’re worried about what’s happening and don’t feel like their elected official cares about them or fights for their community. But I also know that everybody at that town hall made clear that they are going to stay engaged. They are a part of this opposition movement we’re building together, and they’re going to make Republicans feel the heat in their own backyard. It’s the kind of on-the-ground mobilization that matters if we are going to end this constitutional crisis, stop the giveaway to billionaires and corporations and preserve democracy. Maxwell and I know that we can’t let up for a second. It’s a moment we’re going to look back and have to ask ourselves what we did. If you are with us, I hope you’ll consider pitching in to fund this work. It requires significant resources to travel and mass mobilize people. [**_So please, split a contribution today between Maxwell Frost and my campaign to help us keep doing town halls and build an effective grassroots opposition to Trump and Musk. Anything helps. Even $1 is a powerful way to send a message that you are in this fight too._**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/fp1rkYc1vsG0XQroCSkqag~~/AAPPABA~/sG2hUycM9FyPOLDshH-Du4OARc-qEZFLEZFSVcEjQcIyx8nPOs7rUbSgLkkbd9pHDJkPumubRoR0fFtAjwcjh5MCZGUDWNxvMo2aqLfcbZwVWrPcZMsb4VcaKqHQQk4HLTa-hsj7D-JGKOQYfylewGh_mwQkWj99zTeh2Yirlp8gFpycwTQJD9qILPk-pjwDlR3eF8vsWAi4SMy9YTPCpEI0WPP92jpJvlWGzuCbnN9enJz8yXcsZ25gjSl9JCBRYpBOYUJ-drgxVeftbC1YX3ZUZr8GgSK9XrOJ_BrnFv5BIes4dcAhpnSpgwBBnT-9FGo2IKKFSKUfnNmcqOTOVd6YNx2h_p9K60qcrQ2dSoY~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/5c8FT3c4eY3neWYwxucXtg~~/AAPPABA~/QXeJ1OsUwGmnCy6LFLH2HjY5c2rOSp9NbaDmSaGcOY4ZMJlvR7Qj9RMt0_vpEgf1qRNS4VjDYxKtWz2p8WDksTi2QEfHxUsqwjo4zeRMbw5kZqFg3iPNW5002Xr2Ljc_d-LNz3smsv5SnRLRDBfDqpRTsO0OX6QQO9OS74LYdrvVYmrdqT-Mn1v3ls95acsV5X5cdrByD5Nej3QwsnI30gC_TUWUaAOkfEHAwcE4EVBQXtlUUXbq3ZK04kdolu1Z8aNwzRs4F7QRgRxJFjrHNA4bd_pzkvJjuYvrKkI0cigtGfZOa0BlFL9iTNACrqyoWExnxhrPk7pcwN3JPWHbAtxzeIa7tCWndoLBayxGYpK_ZYp5HfnS9LBYs9zGWxyh)

_Trump begging to be loved & accepted by a rich & famous elite that 's despised the gauche, self-loathing, talentless trash_
### Like Most Conservatives--Almost Every One an Artistic Failure--Trump Hates Hollywood for REJECTING HIM
The stories are legion of Donald Trump living the successful life of inherited wealth and business in Queens, yet gazing across the East River at Manhattan like a scorned lover. Because even though the putz inherited hundreds of millions of dollars, it. wasn't enough. Nope, Jabba the Rut craved fame and adulation as RFK Jr. does a whale's head with which to cruise around town with the top down.
**It is this obsession with those he knows have more class, talent, intelligence, wit, etc., that led Trump to pick a new target in his quest to be the biggest asshole President in history by a country 10K miles: Hollywood.**
This pathology isn't unusual on the Right. It's the same grievance animating the entire MAGA base ([and its elected officials](https://substack.com/redirect/9bbe51f4-009b-4923-ac6e-79c4ebd78b43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), who shuffle around in PJs thinking "I should've been a contender," whether in manufacturing, banking, etc. But, alas, they didn't make it, because those damn immigrants, DEIs & trans athletes robbed 'em of their birthright! No, not [the GOP they keep reelecting](https://substack.com/redirect/358002e5-43ff-48d4-9539-36a9651f7028?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the policies of transferring their jobs outta town faster than Trump can pay off a porn star.
So let's call this MAGA: "artistic" (I use the term very loosely) division. Loopy, talentless dicksaws who desperately wanted to be big on the big screen, but failed (Andrew Breitbart, Dana Loesch, Sarah Palin, it is endless). Trump's of this ilk, waking up with a woody each day to wet dreams and Siren calls of "Trump," "Trump,"... Yet, once awake, he realizes only folks chanting that name tend to look like this:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5d3b132a-476b-4a8d-906d-6608cf74455d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Matt Damon spilled the beans when he shared that Trump required films on his properties to provide him with a cameo in the film. Most producers said yes, and just planned to leave him and his weave on the cutting room floor in post-production. For some reason _Home Alone 2_ was too lazy or forgot, which the filmmaker, Chris Columbus, [very much regrets and wants to fix](https://substack.com/redirect/3eb4a220-711c-4bb0-a90b-c36300d135e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). (He's called it a "curse").
So Trump got that little extra fame-suckle he requires to walk around each day without Hindenburg-ing. That craving for love daddy never gave him. Though, no matrer the family situation, this craving for fame and recognition for their talents is not unusual among authoritarians. You may recall that Hitler first aspired to be a world-famous painter. Sadly he sucked at it, and the entire damn world is in many ways still paying the price.
So Trump's [going after Hollywood with tariffs](https://substack.com/redirect/085e74cf-33a5-40f7-84d8-c069eef6faa3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), because clearly killing exporters, farms, manufacturers, small businesses, stock markets, cattle ranches & more isn't enough destruction for the weakest man alive. He apparently**woke up one day and decided the problem with American cinema is that it 's just doing too well, so why not fuck that up too?**
Yeah, the guy [who danced with chickens](https://substack.com/redirect/68fdbe21-b229-432b-b01e-60926ddf03cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and gave us "Celebrity Apprentice" thinks he's some kind cultural gatekeeper--**a bloated, bone-spurred Roger Ebert full of blarney**. It's why he made himself Chair of the Board of Trustees of The John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts, a position he obviously earned through a keen eye for the creative arts. You know, like [Melania's...modeling. Yeah, that](https://substack.com/redirect/5ad41210-03ea-48c6-baee-baf203da4500?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In his deluded mind meanderings, foreign films are stealing our box office mojo and it's time to slap a tax on subtitles. This isn't an economic strategy--it's nationalist cosplay and personal revenge covered in popcorn grease--extra butter. The man's confused trade policy with a Rotten Tomatoes scorecard and wants to fix "woke Hollywood" by charging other countries a 100% tariff for their films, as if that'll revive _Sound of Freedom 2: Electric Boogaloo_.
Meanwhile, while Trump's busy launching a trade war against Bong Joon-ho and Greta Gerwig, the real-world impact is artists getting screwed, indie theaters shutting down, and yet another slice of American culture becoming collateral damage in his tantrum-fueled crusade against "people who make him feel dumb, weak and like the loser he's always been."
**Spoiler alert:[that's everyone](https://substack.com/redirect/977e61a8-a2b8-41a3-8ec2-9a13d0887a91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** [Has he seen the fucking polls](https://substack.com/redirect/9744490d-6233-4c40-bfcf-846834193a98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? This isn't about protecting American jobs--it's about punishing an industry that didn't cast him as the action hero in his own biopic, because lard-ass isn't in right now when it comes to leading men. Instead, Hollywood always saw him for what he is: **a tax-dodging, union-busting, blubbery-bodied, thin-skinned, wannabe strongman who 'd get booed off set at a fourth-grade film festival.**
* * *

This week we have a famous guests lined up! And a second one looks likely. **[So tune in on Thursday at 2pm et on Substack!](https://substack.com/redirect/45232dc3-f78e-4df4-a450-52c8278134f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

President Trump went on Meet The Press to set the record straight. He did not let Welker get away with any fake news or dishonest reporting. The tariffs of Chinese imports are working as a negotiation tool. The Chinese Ministry of Commerce is compiling a list of goods that are exempt from their 125% tariff as a way to ease tension and open up an avenue of negotiation. A series of recent polls have come out that seem to show that President Trump's approval is quite low. Legacy outlets have polling samples with about 25% Republicans while Trump received 50% of the vote, along with the 92% negative media coverage of President Trump, it's hard to take seriously anything these legacy outlets print or broadcast. Jim McLaughlin of McLaughlin & Associates is here to share what the real polling data says about President Trump and his approval rating. The Trump tariff, tax cut and deregulation agenda will get the economy booming and set up Republicans for success in the 2026 midterms.

name: Ron Wyden
subject: A death sentence for Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
We must stand against Trump's stooge.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107149116/543752143/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzg5MjkwMS1mZDI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VPG2NoagbB5km74_E2hjkhxGlBVKANK7qNycfbYd2c=&emci=de3e2ef1-ee29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=13892901-fd29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Tomorrow, the Senate will vote on whether to confirm Donald Trump's nominee to run the Social Security Administration, Frank Bisignano. **You can mark me down as**** _hell no._** During the confirmation process, Bisignano lied to me, my staff, and the Finance Committee multiple times. He directly contradicted a confidential whistleblower report I received, which showed Bisignano's close ties to DOGE operations at Social Security. According to the whistleblower, he has been involved with top-level staffing decisions, and receives regular briefings about DOGE's operations at the Social Security Administration. Trump has let Elon Musk's DOGE team run roughshod throughout the Social Security Administration, cutting off customer service, closing field offices, and delaying services. **The next administrator**** _must_****be an independent voice who's willing to stand up against blatant interference.** Social Security is a lifeline for millions of seniors and Americans with disabilities. A missed check could be the difference for someone to be able to pay rent, buy groceries, or pick up their prescriptions for the month. **But Trump and his inner circle of billionaire buddies are too out of touch to even know that – or care.** Mr. Bisignano was nominated by Trump not because he has a plan to improve customer service and make it easier for seniors to get their earned benefits, but because Trump knows that he will be a hatchet man on day one – eager to bring down whatever destruction on the program that Trump and Musk are planning. If Republicans in the Senate confirm this nominee, it will be a death sentence for Social Security as we know it. **This is too big a risk to take.** I vigorously oppose Frank Bisignano's confirmation, and I'm urging as many of my colleagues as possible to join me. _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: WOW! It Is Finally Here... I Am Beyond Excited
body:
Over the last several years, I have had numerous people encourage me to write a book... I am beyond happy to share with you not only is my FIRST book
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21173587.11418.1.f40db8561989951574c8111143b5b203) |
---
Over the last several years, I have had _numerous people_ encourage me to write a book... I am **beyond happy** to share with you not only is my **FIRST** book complete but it is **now available!** Pre-orders are now open for _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21173587.11419.1.db25485422703c6e48672612d874b073)_ The book will soon be offered on **Amazon** , **Barnes & Noble** and other bookstores but if you get your copy via this link: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21173587.11420.1.2dc7ffcdc78e9953e958c95aad99daa9) you will receive a **special edition signed copy** , the **downloadable ebook** to have on your iPad or other devices and **exclusive theme song**. I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is over 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21173587.11421.1.d41fc3725146185a71766d1236ba1f6a) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21173587.11422.1.09151f61e4bbb8fa62e6a1cae0182a79)
---
You can get the **Special Edition Signed Copy** plus the **downloadable ebook** and **theme song** today by visiting: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21173587.11423.1.885a15e972581c86d704dcdb8f5d5c6e) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Read: CHASING AFTER THE WIND ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21173587.11424.1.db39b3ae2aee8314d08995955105e3cf)
---

We’ve got a legendary endorsement to share — Stevie Van Zandt just backed Josh Gottheimer for Governor of New Jersey! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107149569/543753775/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250505_FR_StevieEndorsement_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTlkOWEyOS1mZTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPkkDQJkgdWg5w9CS006dZJ_qyUwpR7xIsWpRKETn38=&emci=eaf04f37-fb29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e99d9a29-fe29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=37438246) Last week, in Bergen County, Stevie Van Zandt — Rock & Roll Hall of Famer, E Street Band icon, and Sopranos star — took the stage in front of hundreds of energized Democrats and announced: _“Where’s the commonsense candidate? Where’s the guy that can get things done? Where’s that guy?

Well, I found him. His name is Josh Gottheimer.

Josh believes Jersey should not be one of the states with some of the highest taxes in the country. And Josh has a plan.

You know me well enough to know I would never steer you wrong. This is the guy that’s going to keep what’s best in Jersey and guide our state to be even better in the future — the next Governor of New Jersey, Josh Gottheimer.”_ Stevie sees what we see: a leader who will fight like hell for our families, stand up to Trump, and deliver lower taxes and costs for everyday New Jerseyans.

With Stevie’s powerful voice in our corner, we’ve got real momentum — but to keep it going, we need your help.

Trump waives to migrants across the Rio Grande w/ Texas Gov. Greg Abbott
Now that we are more than 100 days into President Donald Trump's second term, the honeymoon phase is over. Whether it's from weak-kneed Republicans or Democrats, plenty of criticisms have been lobbed at the White House since January 20.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Xcz4jSfliOcwdjviQOMU_n2SO--atLarWfLUopjS_YM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162906933)
What should not be forgotten is how successful the new administration has been at ending the four year-long border crisis the Biden and Harris team created on their first day in office. Democrats have been having a hard time trying to explain away Trump's success at the border, as I explain in a video here.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4fbd8571-e6ac-4f9f-910b-da783d1b5aa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We have to remember what the nation was facing before Trump entered into office. By the time of the election, millions of illegal immigrants were able to take advantage of the open border within only a few years. The Biden-Harris administration tried to save face by abusing parole authority by releasing thousands of people into the U.S. through the CBP One app everyday.
Historically, only a dozen or so immigrants were released via parole per year.
That way, there were fewer people who were crossing illegally and were instead being waved into the country through dubious legal authority. It was simply a move to improve the optics of the invasion. Even with the CBP One app and the Cubans, Haitians, Nicaraguans, and Venezuelans (CHNV) program, there were still thousands of illegal immigrants crossing because those two options often lacked capacity to meet the historic demand.
It's because of the CBP One app and Temporary Protected Status the Biden-Harris administration abused, it's why Trump is now trying to end said abuse. It's now the subject of lawsuits and federal courts intervening.
Regardless, Trump bringing Mexico to the table to conduct meaningful and long lasting border operations, along with undoing the damage Biden did on his first day in office, border crossings are at a historic low, instead of the historic highs.**[The encounter numbers were so high](https://substack.com/redirect/401af8d2-86de-478b-9191-e5ae52f26cda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** under Biden, U.S. Customs and Border Protection had to adjust the y-axis on their graphs several times.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/e1526a3f-2e6b-4632-b150-f5fe62cde305?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Scared Yet? This Is Just The Beginning**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1526a3f-2e6b-4632-b150-f5fe62cde305?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Wall Street Elites Are Manufacturing Billions Using Your Retirement**
In the chaos of the recent crash, the media had their scapegoats ready.
* "It's Trump's fault!"
* **" Trump's tariffs caused this."**
* **" Trump's tariffs are putting the economy in jeopardy."**

They used fear to push millions of Americans into panic. They distracted you with headlines.
**Hard-working people like you saw their retirement accounts shrink by the minute while the elites made billions with your 401(k) as their bait.**
It's the same script, over and over again, and you're not supposed to notice.
**President Trump saw this coming, and he fought hard to preserve a[little-known IRS loophole](https://substack.com/redirect/e1526a3f-2e6b-4632-b150-f5fe62cde305?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that gives you the power to exit this broken system with your retirement savings intact.**
It's tax-free, penalty-free, and a fully legal exit plan designed to protect your wealth from the greed of the elites pulling the strings.
**All of the details are inside our emergency[2025 Wealth Protection Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/e1526a3f-2e6b-4632-b150-f5fe62cde305?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
[Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/e1526a3f-2e6b-4632-b150-f5fe62cde305?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
Just take Biden's last full month. Despite people knowing Trump was going to be president soon, there were still 47,324 illegal immigrant encounters by Border Patrol. When Trump finally entered office the next month, encounters dropped to 29,105 encounters.
Trump's first full month in February saw only 8,346 encounters. The highest number under Biden was in December 2023, when CBP recorded almost 250,000 encounters.
Now, I was never good at math, but common sense tells me there is a reason why the highest numbers were under the Biden-Harris administration and the lowest numbers are under Trump.
The thing that angers me the most while covering the Biden-Harris border crisis is how our warnings about letting in so many people in such a haphazard way were ignored or dismissed because it was conservative media giving the alarm.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Xcz4jSfliOcwdjviQOMU_n2SO--atLarWfLUopjS_YM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162906933)
Thanks to Democrats, we have the Tren de Aragua in the United States. I can't stress enough that prior to 2021, this brutal gang did not exist in our country. That's because they had settled in South America, following the other Venezuelans that fled their home country when it started to take a turn for the worse.
When Venezuelans started to arrive at our southern border in great numbers in 2022, TdA followed and planted themselves in sanctuary cities to not only take advantage of lax border enforcement, but the lax criminal justice systems also enjoyed by America's criminals.
TdA is on the run now, but the fact they were able to establish themselves here in great numbers makes my blood boil, especially considering there are direct links of horrific crimes against U.S. citizens.
In the end, we must never forget how bad things were, and unless the GOP in Congress gets its act together, it can happen again if Democrats retake control of the government.

subject: Trump wants to reopen… Alcatraz?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39701%2E3422442%2EhgE28b)
Dear Derek,
Donald Trump said yesterday that he wants to turn Alcatraz back into a federal prison.
Let’s cut the BS: This would be a massive waste of money that doesn’t help any of us. It’s not what Californians want.
**[I’m running for governor to amplify the voices of California families. Will you chip in $5 to help us win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250505_1_ak?refcode=em20250505-39701&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39701_3422442_hgE28b&akid=39701%2E3422442%2EhgE28b)**
Let’s be clear about what Trump was trying to do this weekend: distract us.
He knows he is losing support because of his illegal deportations and disregard of due process. He sees that Americans are fed up with his chaotic tariff back and forth.
**Getting derailed by Trump’s clearly unserious Alcatraz proposal is exactly what he wants. We won’t give it to him.**
California’s next governor needs the backbone to call out Trump and fight back—whether that’s when he wants to turn a tourist attraction into a prison, or when he withholds federal disaster aid. Californians deserve better.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250505_1_ak?refcode=em20250505-39701&refcode2=39701_3422442_hgE28b&akid=39701%2E3422442%2EhgE28b)
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250505-39701&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39701_3422442_hgE28b&akid=39701%2E3422442%2EhgE28b)**

None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025. We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats. Thank you, Voter Verification Questionnaire 2025 Polling Team ********** ** If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 #################################

name: Team WFP
subject: We want to hear your thoughts on the first 100 days of this administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Last week, we hit 100 days of the second Trump administration. 100 days of chaos. 100 days of incompetence. 100 days of cruelty. And 100 days of WFP members joining millions of working people across the country in standing up against Trump and the MAGA billionaires trying to steal our futures. Now, with 100 days behind us, we want to know how you’re feeling about this political moment. **[Take our May 2025 Pulse Survey to share your thoughts on the work that we’re doing to block the far-right and build working class power, as well as the obstacles we’re facing together.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJaQTssyg4d7Li4IffO8KrY8TEq6bWS8AHmmiXWW05QaFTqWC-08HSYNnIZuEu6AtRk3MevAYWljiMysnjEdrGEO2ZhtUnOHujDkEG9edukemmcJtK67rFgXU1Ym4IyoB8Yr2woL5BIckQqc8Yjl0Cr9IDujEYz2SmGTdqGjtFnqT3CtGACmHtagW0GWb1CLyM6gkO663tB3DQMY4LOFjTpAOctrCLr65Dp0KsXa91cOPBqC6v3Vg_7QoW37Ag7R3FyKFr8dIAMf172QMUSrIDMvYCRTwO3F_dJIybXQwr3MWM5xs3suhy_YHrgLdutdao/4g8/XswHS3c7TbuDBBlhTNmUKA/h0/h001.BgO629YOdKh0DvvqOuo4xUN2doTMy0s71cRqMmO1Ya8)** **[Take the survey](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJaQTssyg4d7Li4IffO8KrY8TEq6bWS8AHmmiXWW05QaFTqWC-08HSYNnIZuEu6AtRk3MevAYWljiMysnjEdrGEzxa3ob3j9xVaWWJTVrvKEFy1PGP8pOSImX0sFekCzr-AcA4uTY29XIqjFudj1vdzEmXapEt7tIaX25Rssh_iQcWkKC6-chOoTWe0PfL18lUN3Atqo5DhY0YUQkh_5i-aStCr12zWP6XR0c1aUGVj82cQjmsO8ikFohv6ysoLk8_LrHghWTf2IcN_hbf7poWFBOZZcX1P9UUgGPoW87wTjPmyWj9LnDGgywAk_4N6pMQ/4g8/XswHS3c7TbuDBBlhTNmUKA/h1/h001.2UK32gym6sRCERrtJBLbJ1elMNXsUi8Q167UV02j8UM)** These pulse surveys are short, only taking a couple of minutes to complete. clean_body: | | | Peter, Last week, we hit 100 days of the second Trump administration. 100 days of chaos. 100 days of incompetence. 100 days of cruelty. And 100 days of WFP members joining millions of working people across the country in standing up against Trump and the MAGA billionaires trying to steal our futures. Now, with 100 days behind us, we want to know how you’re feeling about this political moment. These pulse surveys are short, only taking a couple of minutes to complete. But to us, they’re incredibly valuable. Every time you fill out a WFP member survey, you’re joining thousands of others and helping us get a fuller picture of our movement — of your priorities, of your concerns, of your hopes for our future. We read every single response, and we make sure our leadership knows how members like you are feeling in this moment. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: GOTV PAC
subject: We’re all in for Angie!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Congresswoman Angie Craig has made it official: She’s running for Senate in Minnesota.
And GOTV PAC is all in!
We’ve proudly stood with Angie Craig through multiple congressional campaigns — helping her defend one of the most competitive House districts in the country. In fact, Angie was one of the very first candidates we partnered with and has continually been a steadfast supporter of our mission and vision at GOTV PAC!
Now, as she takes on an even bigger challenge, we’re ready to stand with her again.
This is going to be one of the most competitive — and expensive — Senate primaries in the nation as Angie faces off against top-tier Democrats with statewide name recognition and Trump-aligned Republicans who are already circling.
But here’s the thing: Angie Craig doesn’t back down. As a business leader and pragmatic fighter with a record of bipartisan wins for working families, she’s the kind of candidate we need not just in the Senate — but leading the charge to take it back from MAGAs.
But if we’re going to help Angie, we have to start now.
Will you chip in $25 to help GOTV PAC support Angie Craig’s path to the Senate? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05052025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email05052025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email05052025]

OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05052025]
Let’s show Abbott that San Antonio voters don’t take orders from Austin.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05052025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05052025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: The Democrats
subject: Today...
body:
---
Derek — In a minute, we’re going to ask if you can pitch in to support the DNC. But first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to earn your first contribution of 2025: As Trump sends our economy into a tailspin and attacks our fundamental freedoms, it’s more important than ever that Democrats not only cut through the noise — but build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect more leaders who can check Trump’s power in their states, cities, and districts. **That’s exactly what we’re doing.** So far this year, we’ve focused on organizing everywhere and investing in state parties. In fact, the DNC recently announced a _$1 million_ monthly investment in state parties across the country — an investment unlike anything Democrats have done in modern times. We’re already seeing the results when we show up everywhere: Since the year began, Democrats organized across Wisconsin and kept Elon Musk from buying a seat on the Supreme Court, overperformed in states like Florida, and even flipped a deep-red district in Pennsylvania. On top of that, we’re working to meet voters where they are, day in and day out. Democrats have shown up at more than 100 People’s Town Halls in communities nationwide — including in areas where Republican representatives are too scared to face their own constituents. And we’ve launched a new War Room operation, focused on driving aggressive daily messaging to counter the Trump administration, leveraging creative opposition tactics and an expansive research operation and combating lies from the far-right. **To fund all of this work, we’re counting on your support. Here’s what we have on record for you so far this year:** _**Democratic National Committee 2025 Supporter Record**_ **Name:** Derek
**Supporter ID:** 22930333
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2025 Donor:** No — Not yet ❌
**Suggested Donation:[$3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250505_3330_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3330_22930333_nELshO&akid=3330%2E22930333%2EnELshO)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250505_3330_fr&refcode2=3330_22930333_nELshO&akid=3330%2E22930333%2EnELshO)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250505_3330_fr&refcode2=3330_22930333_nELshO&akid=3330%2E22930333%2EnELshO)**
---
****
Your donation today allows the DNC to strategically allocate resources where they're needed most — from efforts like holding town halls around the country to electing Democrats at every level this year, next year, and beyond.
[We know it’s not enough to just ask for your support. We have to earn it. And we hope this message helped do just that. If it did, will you make a $3 contribution to the DNC today? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250505_3330_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3330_22930333_nELshO&akid=3330%2E22930333%2EnELshO)
Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

We’re already seeing the results when we show up everywhere: Since the year began, Democrats organized across Wisconsin and kept Elon Musk from buying a seat on the Supreme Court, overperformed in states like Florida, and even flipped a deep-red district in Pennsylvania. On top of that, we’re working to meet voters where they are, day in and day out. Democrats have shown up at more than 100 People’s Town Halls in communities nationwide — including in areas where Republican representatives are too scared to face their own constituents. And we’ve launched a new War Room operation, focused on driving aggressive daily messaging to counter the Trump administration, leveraging creative opposition tactics and an expansive research operation and combating lies from the far-right. To fund all of this work, we’re counting on your support. Here’s what we have on record for you so far this year: Democratic National Committee 2025 Supporter Record Name: Derek Supporter ID: 22930333 Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2025 Donor: No — Not yet ❌ Suggested Donation: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** | ** Your donation today allows the DNC to strategically allocate resources where they're needed most — from efforts like holding town halls around the country to electing Democrats at every level this year, next year, and beyond. Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ceaa025e08344db38a7ca1480fa09d5d&_e=Eq_oJudmjlgMuy6yYC9ZWC8qh1JIHsxxZs913u3Gc1caj6zczIPM5JnL1Xcd7yTpKTnJfmbuh2mC3vQZl5VbGD-AUZQ5URqJXACRHCFKatA8aGgulrlW8waVs-Y5H2rMBT5G45e-6Q02Une0XTSJ6Bjlo2hP1MxuMOePomOo74V-qBDHBuUYtXgh8mEN0vo30porfalIW8SC7evMBPvr8dxwie67N17HTjXXpNZm7B3Mo04HYn-hYpUnvAMWioW3VF7a9Q1i_XpEkIqNDrEuWZeBixGtLmuBU6ubg9OXECcGbgxBicMFogRr_CS5PCokVYVsQEv3BHj4FCqJayzgbqJyDocXDL5v6XiHQCitWhCs5fbzEO_60QrMbem_vk3T5YKt2jJz_vHbJ-wU0vP9e3v47bNBBvyDJ2Xo1dCnxokaG3heA5LsGLvndqBS4MwX)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ceaa025e08344db38a7ca1480fa09d5d&_e=Eq_oJudmjlgMuy6yYC9ZWC8qh1JIHsxxZs913u3Gc1caj6zczIPM5JnL1Xcd7yTpKTnJfmbuh2mC3vQZl5VbGD-AUZQ5URqJXACRHCFKatA8aGgulrlW8waVs-Y5H2rMBT5G45e-6Q02Une0XTSJ6Bjlo2hP1MxuMOePomOo74V-qBDHBuUYtXgh8mEN0vo30porfalIW8SC7evMBPvr8dxwie67N17HTjXXpNZm7B3Mo04HYn-hYpUnvAMWioW3VF7a9Q1i_XpEkIqNDrEuWf7KxomQpbRlGJUdDbAxIigaTQ-QHgyFj1WkMYwjk9MhVgELr2exFpSn1HM8ixnpzxZ20ZGTXAtjxyFcSkiPJHukF1CDDjOq_yYqR60VY5oy68EjU1Ru72ZxmZMMAERu6o4aDoEjUlggNSYPDcrMP-zDdHq4GTuUcXtAFyaX9SJ6)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ceaa025e08344db38a7ca1480fa09d5d&_e=Eq_oJudmjlgMuy6yYC9ZWC8qh1JIHsxxZs913u3Gc1caj6zczIPM5JnL1Xcd7yTpKTnJfmbuh2mC3vQZl5VbGD-AUZQ5URqJXACRHCFKatA8aGgulrlW8waVs-Y5H2rMBT5G45e-6Q02Une0XTSJ6Bjlo2hP1MxuMOePomOo74V-qBDHBuUYtXgh8mEN0vo30porfalIW8SC7evMBPvr8dxwie67N17HTjXXpNZm7B3Mo04HYn-hYpUnvAMWioW3VF7a9Q1i_XpEkIqNDrEuWaWg7eLd8ixTb8rKqvFgKYpk9U863txqKnTNVjaPBEPKaYkF6B8A-sFC3XRx5UuF_4jyQDE2yWahWfSp88-EKoAp8VxSo9UFZZ8QBaswxbJ2FzjpTRvKiiXagAE2983-WaBLNVhk3JbqCnbqjTJHCRIvMy7e4pQ2wYQeGisnLLLc)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ceaa025e08344db38a7ca1480fa09d5d&_e=Eq_oJudmjlgMuy6yYC9ZWC8qh1JIHsxxZs913u3Gc1caj6zczIPM5JnL1Xcd7yTpKTnJfmbuh2mC3vQZl5VbGHGPXIRU4bHvB8tR-8ixDZfJXNyoEL5P5tpQpeSQc8kSiQ6TdDNC0JzRU_4_NCqv5MchZghHf83fiKV33DjrEEaP4qdi77CCiL2-SVWenkWJF2V1ZNvMh-FODJ_Bjhi57BWI111sjuk0L-q2aK7FOAbp90RgbQccx34sGYGTlviLh3sqR-V_nr0dBpQLVlCaipj5s4jlKextdKmdVr6P4QuzkHGc8LceTatcEtuP4oUINFUXP_fYdSW3l4Ya5er3Z1QAo9q0J-kqj6J9XCgSzn-oUhc24XUO8VDurxdYKzZ0MD4fRRIPdtVhVSdEmqdlCdOpHDfZW9ia4NWh2ROlKos%3D)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ceaa025e08344db38a7ca1480fa09d5d&_e=Eq_oJudmjlgMuy6yYC9ZWC8qh1JIHsxxZs913u3Gc1caj6zczIPM5JnL1Xcd7yTpKTnJfmbuh2mC3vQZl5VbGD-AUZQ5URqJXACRHCFKatA8aGgulrlW8waVs-Y5H2rMBT5G45e-6Q02Une0XTSJ6Bjlo2hP1MxuMOePomOo74V-qBDHBuUYtXgh8mEN0vo30porfalIW8SC7evMBPvr8dxwie67N17HTjXXpNZm7B3Mo04HYn-hYpUnvAMWioW3VF7a9Q1i_XpEkIqNDrEuWRMGmavkUq5s-Ape8eRkxRitwDPyUB0DH6bLB_Dvq88eLf5cc9NAgJVnW45HTGkBycLWrTEPvk8ZJk9sTusCOrveWW9XwYL079xl6Et4h6P-9Q9LT3zyepFK6D0iTrfs8QFKmXODNDsq4-73OkOPmlY5NYBeuwvtEF7q4qirm3Yg)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ceaa025e08344db38a7ca1480fa09d5d&_e=Eq_oJudmjlgMuy6yYC9ZWC8qh1JIHsxxZs913u3Gc1caj6zczIPM5JnL1Xcd7yTpKTnJfmbuh2mC3vQZl5VbGD-AUZQ5URqJXACRHCFKatA8aGgulrlW8waVs-Y5H2rMBT5G45e-6Q02Une0XTSJ6Bjlo2hP1MxuMOePomOo74V-qBDHBuUYtXgh8mEN0vo30porfalIW8SC7evMBPvr8dxwie67N17HTjXXpNZm7B3Mo04HYn-hYpUnvAMWioW3VF7a9Q1i_XpEkIqNDrEuWWv4IsglrXM0vKxZfvm-56tyk8ZyKbrrNdEEPhSVc5xWYWPybFhhGs_TMkgmP4n2FRv4AkkB_JvZdZqAaE8alCJBvhLvozZjSAPzhhTegq4Ty_tZF8Z_6y6UWpjU9E5ZvwLZCEtp1FudnVei-ZZ5J8drrBe70qXkP8nFYTtDvT_y)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ceaa025e08344db38a7ca1480fa09d5d&_e=Eq_oJudmjlgMuy6yYC9ZWC8qh1JIHsxxZs913u3Gc1caj6zczIPM5JnL1Xcd7yTpKTnJfmbuh2mC3vQZl5VbGD-AUZQ5URqJXACRHCFKatA8aGgulrlW8waVs-Y5H2rMBT5G45e-6Q02Une0XTSJ6Bjlo2hP1MxuMOePomOo74V-qBDHBuUYtXgh8mEN0vo30porfalIW8SC7evMBPvr8dxwie67N17HTjXXpNZm7B3Mo04HYn-hYpUnvAMWioW3VF7a9Q1i_XpEkIqNDrEuWQMyimHXKeZJXRAdG5bhGxzgxtudChNXeBwrXLt8SMNOpRx7qlEtht1Kdd2qIzfGgA_TiSUVaYB_e_NM_6hH31O1y9wgmkuvcLwTdGQfrD6rZNwXfEZp2pUc6GyqzVYzMm7XjJcAN6_b8EV1iuOAR0SgrogxQAiv60Vvc2epETLQ)
---

name: Rob Bonta
subject: BREAKING: New lawsuit against Trump and RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
I just filed another lawsuit to stop the Trump administration from illegally incapacitating the Department of Health and Human Services.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250505&t=1&akid=1772%2E1088799%2Ejm26me)
Breaking news:
**I just filed another lawsuit against the Trump administration for its attacks on the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HSS), an agency devoted to protecting the health and well-being of all Americans.**
The administration is trying to effectively incapacitate this critical department through the unlawful mass firing of about 10,000 full-time HHS employees, the consolidation of 28 HHS divisions into 15 divisions, and the closing of half of HHS’s ten regional offices — including one in San Francisco.
These illegal actions are part of Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s so-called Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) directive. If allowed, they’ll hurt, rather than help, Americans’ health and well-being.
As a result of the MAHA directive:
* Early childhood programs are at risk, including Head Start, which hundreds of thousands of children and families rely on for child care, early education, and health support;
* Workers across the country can no longer reliably access N95 masks following the closure of the nation’s only federal mask approval laboratory;
* Key Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) infectious disease laboratories have also been shuttered, including those responsible for testing and tracking measles, effectively halting the federal government’s ability to monitor the disease nationwide.

This recent mass firing, on top of other staff departures from a series of so-called “buy-outs,” means that in the last three months, HHS has lost roughly 20,000 employees.
**By attacking HHS from within, Trump and RFK Jr. are putting our states and our people in harm’s way — that’s why I’m suing to stop them.**
**[If you have my back in this fight for our children and families’ health, will you pitch in $5 or more today to fuel our grassroots campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250505?refcode=em20250505-1772&amount=5&refcode2=1772_1088799_jm26me&akid=1772%2E1088799%2Ejm26me)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250505?refcode=em20250505-1772&amount=5&refcode2=1772_1088799_jm26me&akid=1772%2E1088799%2Ejm26me)**
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250505&t=3&refcode2=1772_1088799_jm26me&akid=1772%2E1088799%2Ejm26me)**

That’s why it’s so important that we invest in rural organizing. That means showing up where voters are: in their communities, at the county fair, and knocking on their door. = = We know we can’t just show up in rural communities right before the election and expect voters to fall in line. We have to do the hard, on-the-ground work now to build stronger relationships and the infrastructure we need to be successful. This is about more than just one election cycle. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d419c523c394419bb8f5f3ed8abff88&_e=zSr3fjuZFaBfMFeeI7DCKWMs_N0eo1yWLPpXVruYhi3_H9yPDw8sSJJDNU7vKXA2MuZlpfcWy0YpcCjZ-uG6A1T1P4thlcaUAr7AuSS5Nr8fJxm_7g3QWmphwrIddVLM67N13m1jk6POm5gULvvnL5uABJHWNHj2ZQCf9VV-Fe3IKeGoxGTsh-bHFNfhpvSyIWyV8tJDGb8u9wWAr_O4JOL2W0jj3xrHNatlKNvlhhs3FEwe7q3LZkTcvI-vk_M7edJbGNtWfRA0AfbZef18ZJBGFpN3upRLcMRMCKXLGAWQqtjHbpSX8yphdXnh8pnKHZVNcyCVgC04SXY-TKKSon0XokbXeIOfIMcGw1H4yqU%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d419c523c394419bb8f5f3ed8abff88&_e=zSr3fjuZFaBfMFeeI7DCKWMs_N0eo1yWLPpXVruYhi3_H9yPDw8sSJJDNU7vKXA2MuZlpfcWy0YpcCjZ-uG6A1T1P4thlcaUAr7AuSS5Nr8fJxm_7g3QWmphwrIddVLM67N13m1jk6POm5gULvvnL5uABJHWNHj2ZQCf9VV-Fe3IKeGoxGTsh-bHFNfhpvSyUZO7Bef8LkvRg1OeR69z3KPXuEHBvToVDZsBRAmFImSKm1my49UZkBGKRoF41QBWuwksQliUzWzkZKfw0Pg4-Oco3iHzYeq77GyYPRNPYbr7z2gJFJrDDu2gb7nVWC63ss679DfufEcGVfKP3bzZhWfIWLFaZ0wxH3D6WrpQfGE%3D)**

**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d419c523c394419bb8f5f3ed8abff88&_e=zSr3fjuZFaBfMFeeI7DCKWMs_N0eo1yWLPpXVruYhi3_H9yPDw8sSJJDNU7vKXA2MuZlpfcWy0YpcCjZ-uG6A1T1P4thlcaUAr7AuSS5Nr8fJxm_7g3QWmphwrIddVLM67N13m1jk6POm5gULvvnL5uABJHWNHj2ZQCf9VV-Fe3IKeGoxGTsh-bHFNfhpvSyQ0UGN_ECIpdz2UNfHn3lWujgq8A1f5ZjcEN4cEu6Ufmcf6tgy3WZSasC1ZG_NRG3CNLLMlgf96DG3GthZlTLDZd0WE_ew4Uidtfy0aUkY1q5kZq0dwkNAYGodze9bjBKOev3ai6jbAM14bpSH3YtKpA76K0L2-igjsA6XUrD3Hk%3D)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it...The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere._** They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. ****AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.**** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue.**[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d419c523c394419bb8f5f3ed8abff88&_e=zSr3fjuZFaBfMFeeI7DCKWMs_N0eo1yWLPpXVruYhi3_H9yPDw8sSJJDNU7vKXA2MuZlpfcWy0YpcCjZ-uG6A1T1P4thlcaUAr7AuSS5Nr8fJxm_7g3QWmphwrIddVLM67N13m1jk6POm5gULvvnL5uABJHWNHj2ZQCf9VV-Fe3IKeGoxGTsh-bHFNfhpvSyvYXhRmMhdJNN_leZU4V4v7WAY9n-fgR-VokNmOQmBcrHjyFMV5unGhm1-Az9NdZRMcQKbJYe7osU0LEgArSVYYCDJp9QNfT8YymRqfgLJUypeE2igWO9syjNhyvgvjf6JA79zd4dQsXTLAfINp6Hgc7dEcgJcJVa8GSTuuWaJbA%3D)**

clean_body: We will call this what it is - abuse | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Team Mackenzie
subject: Radical Dems say “F*#k I.C.E.”, Target Mackenzie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
PA-7 Democrats Refuse to Support Law Enforcement

| | | | | [|
---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=4e1b54a4df&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| | | | | **Friends,** I don’t know if you saw it this weekend, but Bernie Sanders and his socialist, radical tour came to Bethlehem and it should be eye-opening for the people of our community.In case you missed it, Sanders called for the same socialist agenda he always does to come to our nation. He ended the rally by calling for a left-wing “revolution.”**But that’s not all...** One speaker - Enid Santiago - shouted “F**k I.C.E” during the rally. This vulgar insult directed at the men and women who enforce our immigration laws should not be tolerated. And it truly shows that these radicals will go to no end to throw open our country to illegal immigration once again.**And guess who was in the middle of it all...** The Democrats for Congress who want to run against Congressman Mackenzie. One of them - Lamont McClure - was endorsed by a speaker from the stage. The other - Carol Obando- Derstine - had her puppet master (the person who personally recruited her to run) - former Congresswoman Susan Wild there as well. It's more obvious than ever that if either of them gets to Washington they’ll push the far-left agenda promoted at the rally. Of course there was a “who’s who” of left-wing politicians from our area there too. Former Congresswoman Susan Wild, Congressman Chris Deluzio, County Executive Lamont McClure, and Carol Obando-Derstine should immediately and unequivocally denounce the vile rhetoric aimed at our law enforcement officers and make clear where they stand.**It’s clear that these people will stop at nothing to return us to the days of skyrocketing inflation, open borders, more crime, and the negative impact all those things have on hard-working families across the 7th District and across America.** I know the people of our community do not want to go backwards.That is why Congressman Mackenzie will remain focused on delivering the real results rooted in common sense that you send me to Washington to fight for. **And that’s why we need your help TODAY!****Enough is enough.** It’s time to stand up to this radical socialist agenda and defend the values that make our country strong.**If you’re ready to stand up against this radical agenda and help us fight back, chip in today to support our campaign and ensure we defeat these socialists in 2026!**
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=948ba17514&e=5ccada9200)

| Sincerely,
Andres Weller Campaign Manager Congressman Ryan Mackenzie

name: Hey
subject: My name is Pat Harrigan

body:
Our next deadline is nearly here. We're missing the resources to keep going, and I thought reaching out to you might help.
I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e057751a7a6c418cae1c97825408364e&_e=HNxVv3TIeUylFLfbpEH-xITaj04mbAAGWRCnLLrjMfUv2vZSSetW299oTrv6CMu4qTRZBvCzTPbjfRljVuXN6ezIDDZl1rQHa_4lHWceYniWBlHdjeX8AKtGSpx0WlPq_sMOZwdGjHZE8Bwje2zsXPd7qvG7NjI9Y9f2PVAtwWuSsWBpI_-ac-dyvY7AKwelIds89xlgN0tEuUT5PFiqPFeKJSfc3SYUZLoCU0komjtSWp1sRYl0eNZdY4HdwhhWCvr-C7xiJJ69hdiJU5PdDSyopqMV4D5UT48xKzWBsMgYO6fnNBs3P6d0EIFHk8O7S2Ee_Su9wWGdB9VtjTtJy9_fEhywdGvzkrDUh7kuIWYTvTzl5PqTQP2KHzOhXhwg7QUq2Hgklt2cy4xUndoAq8mZLotzu2f2PTw-m6NR24JRbeBqiy5mcil4Kqe4jocFOZCylEfGi70BSllOug4rHvBhdQswrobgM2M7Y0anQSdRoTqB4u8WFZxV5aDjIMfEdesGR4AsOY0z6sRIrQ8NE7oRmeqG1xdDjIh-DO5lzuPqJ-gUHMOp202CHySX0Hth8D4T05NK406RkA8lJcH1jg%3D%3D)
---

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e057751a7a6c418cae1c97825408364e&_e=HNxVv3TIeUylFLfbpEH-xITaj04mbAAGWRCnLLrjMfUv2vZSSetW299oTrv6CMu4qTRZBvCzTPbjfRljVuXN6ezIDDZl1rQHa_4lHWceYniWBlHdjeX8AKtGSpx0WlPq_sMOZwdGjHZE8Bwje2zsXLO0HGiCNBDrbfDhrdjIv3UgVAcn5nEW2O3eC1WHWTjqVyG0aR5MriFMb0jW0HfSQV4Rn6mB7TsbkE7_1t_pFqkkwAa05MLF7o08r5UPae2DN3W_dWl9OfWkWxbEfKPUHolPYM-9dqIj9kCmR4uP0kcRgSXccA55BvBPYbTVKxLGJvlgMet5tRegWRTQ9zYspoKpzca0h99p06SKOxwqDxyqnbDGGBQ6zQBReb9ADlKlNl-rACcb_k6QI8ix_XiLz0uiXz5_2J2KN_4IT7xCZ96xZMIUZJMPRtLgNT7PkC4plDvg_M-F9afzS9kTS2pqM04t393sMIo9syFv2ea7LIsS9QEX7D1VbKr-Jq2xRJq2Zl76cW5swXWW0EThWxujq0KTfbUDfzytS94sx-hWRjo%3D)
After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business.

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e057751a7a6c418cae1c97825408364e&_e=HNxVv3TIeUylFLfbpEH-xITaj04mbAAGWRCnLLrjMfUv2vZSSetW299oTrv6CMu4qTRZBvCzTPbjfRljVuXN6ezIDDZl1rQHa_4lHWceYniWBlHdjeX8AKtGSpx0WlPq_sMOZwdGjHZE8Bwje2zsXLO0HGiCNBDrbfDhrdjIv3UgVAcn5nEW2O3eC1WHWTjqCTZD2nsHLDUTSsmuRho6L9mVqAb8D8LWn_OdftzaBtoCNg1CJV5SsIiI8l4W0m3ru1JYSUu-01P6_ps9oGtJz5VFbAh3tmLAKp5ceFlSVEoADuwT_SNSd9FX_sLhXDLyGixm8JAoVqvqF0rMKn5b2zRph4HBNq8rGstCduryc5WmyKFjlzI9bbIO4aG-AfjbKWPlRST5t_wF4bpcHqyS8xsgpyTyJyIjiJIPCNhiR9ZT77IctG7K5Dx2Wha_kLEunmAkmkxv9aLEsW7LrNY-UGMHNUE4-koERnPgQ6xdOaPyVdwgHTnu4tyrBhtF-YLL5lNWg8Qd-f7C5BJ2ICK4DckQZRT-2_pTJQvkdQqpDt0%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office.****
**
Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won 't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e057751a7a6c418cae1c97825408364e&_e=HNxVv3TIeUylFLfbpEH-xITaj04mbAAGWRCnLLrjMfUv2vZSSetW299oTrv6CMu4qTRZBvCzTPbjfRljVuXN6ezIDDZl1rQHa_4lHWceYniWBlHdjeX8AKtGSpx0WlPq_sMOZwdGjHZE8Bwje2zsXPd7qvG7NjI9Y9f2PVAtwWuSsWBpI_-ac-dyvY7AKwelCWj3T3PwY8F-aLuKm5YZcTy3CS7EN10tkT2irndnHj36v7zOK5j-R7t5zcPXxfwqaJqUznN6rqf8RIciVlUxWCvgpgPo5Ep8IzmyfYQ_jTOiVXuOlQQzzxvA7ig_xj6lgGh8FvHGQDCZ5f413MXxLhzmKpKfR5ht7RRPcreFjlnGgTKbpRQ9B6iI3w7nFa_k7u7rO8C6_uhB3mIlAxNyT337tdv4Jg5dzJ1YQ-W7Kin78nPu4Vjq60L-mr24RvA_Ip2HvsYvDKPgx6VurlNnUe9d2LbaXj9Q-_848bQNi8gVqfuET3E6287EPMjBjPvkXXHpG-967kRKWc9IrYEZ-I5QNNxgjWCXVtbIcExNyzTxv4xogsK5Lig7vEv5RhGOOUnnRJ--uWmuFW3sEpwmnA%3D%3D)**
The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right.

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

**_Please have my back on this one:_** | [**GIVE $10 TO SUPPORT PAT HARRIGAN**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e057751a7a6c418cae1c97825408364e&_e=HNxVv3TIeUylFLfbpEH-xITaj04mbAAGWRCnLLrjMfUv2vZSSetW299oTrv6CMu4qTRZBvCzTPbjfRljVuXN6ezIDDZl1rQHa_4lHWceYniWBlHdjeX8AKtGSpx0WlPq_sMOZwdGjHZE8Bwje2zsXBVlz2NjC7lSuYlEyg33FyQL5s-Uf4vOGoYBe0gyIhHP_mIfbwSYgPsIQPx_GdhTjG5OQpUJzWCjGmJpA-aGTvYwm0IKpTH5HS6YQ9cWWDxbfvnrVa0Mw4DfUamMEOKA6D3faofkDJauXuKz2oYChdjrFc-v-dd41TnU9Ufx9sBmMqNjV7H4-GGl3v76ipXc6qflmPsNB-Z5_c1tWhs8lk6hXIdS7OzMQTu2TnQdZNXwh_aVU8K59cJRdGuJ7zYYQFsfnw3NLMxWy_vR5vdMTsh_T6zmTm6U4gON7_BMv-4MjgZ0uQVuI8OErxWmtedXLhq9_ln-No_Ku3VYr-0gO1iiDs6jDy6KqY-SC9IuAMXkAt8qRb4gDSrB5OvX-WPHI0dy6SN-heeu-HpSvmmkvjNFEoYfpyl7kOv448o4HFUt6EUQOPqmih3WbHYpozbFSg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Our next deadline is nearly here. We're missing the resources to keep going, and I thought reaching out to you might help. I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda! | Patriot, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office. Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won 't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you, and God Bless, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
| Peter,

I’m so grateful to share that because of your support, we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal!

Your commitment powers everything we’re fighting for: holding the Trump administration accountable, protecting our environment, defending public health, and building the foundation we need to retake the House in 2026.

Thanks to you, we’re building a strong grassroots movement that can meet this moment.

We still have a long road ahead, but today, I hope you’ll take pride in knowing you’re part of this fight — and that together, we’re just getting started.

Thank you again for being in this with me,

Dr. Ami Bera

Hi Friend,
Millions of Americans feel like no matter how many stretches, supplements, or pills they take... their achy joints just never seem to get better.
Most doctors blame old injuries, poor genetics, and more often than not — just "getting older."
However, breakthrough Harvard research recently discovered something shocking:
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e23453566/VaHR0cHM6Ly9jbGsubGl2ZXBhaW5mcmVlLm5ldC8xMDgxMy8xMTQv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDU/LbmNsUEVxdUJQag/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mdGpoXzA1MDUmdXRtX3Rlcm09ZHAmX25saWQ9NWJrZkdHSHhUayZfbmhpZHM9bmN4MUtjbE53SXBxNFdscw/gaBlIFg/s5k103e7d57) Many so-called "health foods" may actually be the root cause behind those sore, stiff joints that make you feel miserable...
And the worst “health food” of all of them is actually one extremely common type of protein that's likely in your refrigerator right now.
Researchers say this protein can actually trigger a vicious cycle of out-of-control inflammation in your joints, and even harm your immune system.
**[Click here to find out this one common “toxic” protein that’s the absolute WORST for your joints.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e23453566/VaHR0cHM6Ly9jbGsubGl2ZXBhaW5mcmVlLm5ldC8xMDgxMy8xMTQv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDU/LbmNsUEVxdUJQag/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mdGpoXzA1MDUmdXRtX3Rlcm09ZHAmX25saWQ9alBVdEtOMnpGMyZfbmhpZHM9bmN4MUtjbE53SXBxNFdscw/gaBlIFg/sfn66a7929b)**
