name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What Trump’s cabinet is saying behind closed doors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2538%2E4032634%2EAlQcLS)
---
When Donald Trump first declared his chaotic tariffs policy, most Americans were watching their 401(k)s yo-yo or bracing for prices to skyrocket. Meanwhile, it appeared that Trump and his cabinet members were busy giving out investing advice to their rich friends as the economy was in freefall. Mere hours before pausing a whole slew of tariffs, Trump posted on Truth Social: “THIS IS A GREAT TIME TO BUY!!! DJT” And that’s not all: According to additional reports, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has been making the rounds on Wall Street giving out exclusive, advance tips about Trump’s trade policy. He reportedly told a closed-door investor summit that the China tariffs would soon deescalate. And he gave other investors some non-public information about a potential trade agreement with India. All the while, some members of Congress were making well-timed trades ahead of the pause announcement. Two things are abundantly clear here:
1. The American people deserve to know if Trump and Bessent are running around to their billionaire friends, giving them stock trading tips.
2. No public official who has access to exclusive policy information should be able to trade stocks in the first place.

**The American people need to have confidence that their representatives in Washington are making decisions in the public interest — not to line their own pockets. That’s why I sent a letter to Secretary Bessent here demanding answers. And it’s why I’m continuing to push hard to ban members of Congress from buying and selling individual stocks to prevent this kind of craven corruption and market manipulation.** [**Add your name if you agree that we need answers from the President and his cabinet, and that members of Congress and their spouses shouldn’t be able to own and trade individual stocks.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-banstock/?source=EMZ25Q_ENG_E_20250505_V1S1&t=8&akid=2538%2E4032634%2EAlQcLS) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-banstock/?source=EMZ25Q_ENG_E_20250505_V1S1&t=9&akid=2538%2E4032634%2EAlQcLS)
---
I’ve been raising the alarm about corruption for years, and this latest episode with Bessent and Trump is exactly why. The American economy is not a game for them to rig to make themselves and their billionaire buddies richer.
Chaos, confusion, economic damage, and opportunities for corruption: that’s the hallmark of Trump’s rollout of these tariff policies. And these disastrous, overly-broad tariffs are already having a devastating impact on American families. Trump continues to engage in magical thinking about who’s going to foot the bill (hint: the American people) while he plays dealmaker from the Oval Office.
To make matters worse, Trump’s erratic decision-making on tariffs means frequent, seemingly random changes have created a scenario where wealthy investors and well-connected corporations can get special treatment. They benefit from insider tips they can use to time the market — all while Main Street, small businesses, and America’s families are left to clean up the damage.
They’re not even trying to hide it. You might’ve also seen the news that Donald Trump Jr. is founding a private Washington, D.C. members-only club — with a $500,000 entrance fee — where CEOs and billionaires can rub shoulders with politicians and lawmakers.
The American people deserve to feel confident that their elected representatives are acting in the public interest — not in the interests of their private stock portfolio. We’ve got to ban members of Congress from individual stock trading that’s ripe for corruption, but we can’t stop there. We need to ban federal judges, Cabinet secretaries, and other top officials from owning and trading stocks. And to really root corruption out of Washington, we’ve got to end lobbying as we know it, put a padlock on the revolving door, strengthen judicial ethics, and more.
[**The first step is demanding answers from Trump and Bessent on their behavior during the tariff-induced volatility, and banning members of Congress from trading individual stocks. Add your name if you’re with me.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-banstock/?source=EMZ25Q_ENG_E_20250505_V1S1&t=10&akid=2538%2E4032634%2EAlQcLS)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

**_[I sat down to write you this email today and ended up writing more than I had planned, but I hope you’ll take the time to read my message in its entirety](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jzGPozAQhX-N6UB4jB1SUOxelCtOuuauuK2QwQN4hTEZ20G7v_7kKEo5732a9552-2qnr46d3hnAYk1gAEy8MYDbx-EofbpfP8tjX9_Km_rtZHbhxxO9wwveRq39-x__j_5-h4-P72UebnjnLzx-7fiCn6EVOm3XrJ4uhenEZOqmwI6fGtW0Zy7aYuk4B2W4FFPbKDnABHLULUeQwLWQZ1nYDmqQtawlCAlcVYM6Yw0G66E1Z8MVa-pHTqUdkh01D_HQRN67avSuWLslxj08il0ZXAOOibA67EZoMsHguvgUsJz9Xg46xhVn8mkz5ZQ2k915mHrjt967Hqn_NPcS155C_yjWQJsfi2uKrg8-0YhMXLZxZaCy5NDY5Ji4DPRUIlK-D-IMFOU6ZLeZiUukhAV1Zj_sutqgTqyp58e0POTewf8AAAD__5xTkPE)_.**
As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, _and how different our country would be if the result were different_.
I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare.
Just think -
**Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life.** President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem.
**Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border.** President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country.
**Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs.** President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world.
Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades.
**Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC.**
That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, Patriot.
**_But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026._**
Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country.
Here’s the long and short of it -
**_[For the first time since being sworn in, I’ve teamed up with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik - one of my strongest allies in Congress - to raise $250,000 in the next 10 days](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jzGPozAQhX-N6UB4jB1SUOxelCtOuuauuK2QwQN4hTEZ20G7v_7kKEo5732a9552-2qnr46d3hnAYk1gAEy8MYDbx-EofbpfP8tjX9_Km_rtZHbhxxO9wwveRq39-x__j_5-h4-P72UebnjnLzx-7fiCn6EVOm3XrJ4uhenEZOqmwI6fGtW0Zy7aYuk4B2W4FFPbKDnABHLULUeQwLWQZ1nYDmqQtawlCAlcVYM6Yw0G66E1Z8MVa-pHTqUdkh01D_HQRN67avSuWLslxj08il0ZXAOOibA67EZoMsHguvgUsJz9Xg46xhVn8mkz5ZQ2k915mHrjt967Hqn_NPcS155C_yjWQJsfi2uKrg8-0YhMXLZxZaCy5NDY5Ji4DPRUIlK-D-IMFOU6ZLeZiUukhAV1Zj_sutqgTqyp58e0POTewf8AAAD__5xTkPE)_.**
That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it.
**_[You know by now that I didn’t come from much, so when I ask for something, it’s important](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jzGPozAQhX-N6UB4jB1SUOxelCtOuuauuK2QwQN4hTEZ20G7v_7kKEo5732a9552-2qnr46d3hnAYk1gAEy8MYDbx-EofbpfP8tjX9_Km_rtZHbhxxO9wwveRq39-x__j_5-h4-P72UebnjnLzx-7fiCn6EVOm3XrJ4uhenEZOqmwI6fGtW0Zy7aYuk4B2W4FFPbKDnABHLULUeQwLWQZ1nYDmqQtawlCAlcVYM6Yw0G66E1Z8MVa-pHTqUdkh01D_HQRN67avSuWLslxj08il0ZXAOOibA67EZoMsHguvgUsJz9Xg46xhVn8mkz5ZQ2k915mHrjt967Hqn_NPcS155C_yjWQJsfi2uKrg8-0YhMXLZxZaCy5NDY5Ji4DPRUIlK-D-IMFOU6ZLeZiUukhAV1Zj_sutqgTqyp58e0POTewf8AAAD__5xTkPE)_.**
I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country.
[CHIP IN](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jzGPozAQhX-N6UB4jB1SUOxelCtOuuauuK2QwQN4hTEZ20G7v_7kKEo5732a9552-2qnr46d3hnAYk1gAEy8MYDbx-EofbpfP8tjX9_Km_rtZHbhxxO9wwveRq39-x__j_5-h4-P72UebnjnLzx-7fiCn6EVOm3XrJ4uhenEZOqmwI6fGtW0Zy7aYuk4B2W4FFPbKDnABHLULUeQwLWQZ1nYDmqQtawlCAlcVYM6Yw0G66E1Z8MVa-pHTqUdkh01D_HQRN67avSuWLslxj08il0ZXAOOibA67EZoMsHguvgUsJz9Xg46xhVn8mkz5ZQ2k915mHrjt967Hqn_NPcS155C_yjWQJsfi2uKrg8-0YhMXLZxZaCy5NDY5Ji4DPRUIlK-D-IMFOU6ZLeZiUukhAV1Zj_sutqgTqyp58e0POTewf8AAAD__5xTkPE)

I know you probably hear that every single election is the most important of our lifetimes — but here in Georgia, I mean it when I say that the 2026 midterms will have lasting impacts on the future of our state and our country. Today, Governor Brian Kemp announced that he won’t be running for Senate next year, opening the door for **Marjorie Taylor Greene to run.** Peter, I’m sure I don’t have to tell you why Marjorie Taylor Greene would be the worst-case scenario to represent Georgians in the Senate. In just the last month, she made $750,000 worth of shady stock purchases in the wake of Donald Trump’s tariff announcement and the resulting stock market tumble, and is actively working with Donald Trump to cut Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security while giving tax breaks to billionaires who never asked for them and don't need them. Let me be clear: Marjorie Taylor Greene is a threat to our constitutional rights and freedoms, and we can’t afford to give her an undeserved promotion. But beyond that, the results of Georgia’s Senate race could determine the fate of the Senate majority and whether or not Democrats can issue a critical check on Donald Trump’s power. The implications of our Senate race here in Georgia can’t be understated. It’s more important than ever that we outwork, out-organize, and out-fundraise the Georgia GOP. [I can’t stress this enough: If we’re going to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene next year, we must start working now. clean_body: We can’t let that happen. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = I know you probably hear that every single election is the most important of our lifetimes — but here in Georgia, I mean it when I say that the 2026 midterms will have lasting impacts on the future of our state and our country. Today, Governor Brian Kemp announced that he won’t be running for Senate next year, opening the door for Marjorie Taylor Greene to run. Peter, I’m sure I don’t have to tell you why Marjorie Taylor Greene would be the worst-case scenario to represent Georgians in the Senate. In just the last month, she made $750,000 worth of shady stock purchases in the wake of Donald Trump’s tariff announcement and the resulting stock market tumble, and is actively working with Donald Trump to cut Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security while giving tax breaks to billionaires who never asked for them and don't need them. Let me be clear: Marjorie Taylor Greene is a threat to our constitutional rights and freedoms, and we can’t afford to give her an undeserved promotion. But beyond that, the results of Georgia’s Senate race could determine the fate of the Senate majority and whether or not Democrats can issue a critical check on Donald Trump’s power. The implications of our Senate race here in Georgia can’t be understated. It’s more important than ever that we outwork, out-organize, and out-fundraise the Georgia GOP. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = We will succeed. name: Bryan
subject: May 5 Campaign Update
body:
I'm working to put America first. Here is some of the work I've been doing to get our nation back on track.

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5d62d6d30d&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **May 5, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# Working to Put America First
---
| Last week, the White House [announced](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ead05e3aca&e=e907534017) additional details regarding successful efforts to secure our border. In addition to reducing catch and release by more than [99](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c444e49aa5&e=e907534017)% compared to the Biden Administration, we’ve also seen thousands of illegal aliens with violent criminal records arrested by federal law enforcement.
You can read more about our successful work [**here.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5fb424a07d&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| I recently joined Vicki McKenna on WISN to discuss the need for state and federal officials to work together to enforce our immigration laws and protect our communities. You can listen to our conversation below.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=0a446b02ce&e=e907534017)
| Over the past several months, Congress has been working to pass**** an **America First Agenda** that delivers meaningful results for our nation, including writing a budget that delivers on our shared priorities.
Last week, I and my colleagues on the House Financial Services Committee advanced our budget reconciliation instructions to the House. While our committee was charged with targeting [**$1 billion**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=4fbebbf9be&e=e907534017) in total savings in our jurisdiction, we were able to identify more than [**$5 billion**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8b89ebddce&e=e907534017) —allowing Wisconsin families to keep more of their hard-earned paychecks.
Committees in the House will continue working on the federal budget over the coming weeks to ensure we deliver on an America First Agenda that reduces costs for families, unleashes American energy, secures our border, and protects important programs like Social Security and Medicare.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=711bd456a1&e=e907534017)
| Finally, the [Milwaukee Journal Sentinel](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f910e07132&e=e907534017) recently highlighted our continued dominant victories in the 1st Congressional District.
_“ While Steil’s southeastern Wisconsin 1st Congressional District appears on paper to be the better Democratic pickup opportunity with its blue cities and tighter margins in recent statewide elections...**[Steil] has won nearly every election by double digits.**”_
We know the Democrats are after our seat again this cycle. But with our common-sense conservative policies, Wisconsin work ethic, and your continued support, we will beat them again.
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8ed08032e4&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/march-14050524?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=5e48520bde) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=5e48520bde)
---
|
